name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Wisconsin’s Senate race is TIED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hi folks, Tammy Baldwin here with an important update:

**A brand new poll shows that my Senate race in Wisconsin is TIED 50-50.**

My megamillionaire Republican opponent is gaining ground in Wisconsin — _and fast._

First, he plastered Wisconsin’s airwaves with more than $4 million worth of ads. Then, the Republican primary field cleared for Hovde, giving him more than 7 uninterrupted months to campaign against me. **Now, the latest polling has us tied.**

Republicans are going all in to flip this seat red, and we can’t expect him to let up. Eric Hovde has pledged to self-fund at least $20 million of his own personal fortune to defeat me, _and he’s on pace to spend even more than that._

Look, unlike my wealthy opponent, I can’t self-fund this campaign. I don’t have right-wing dark money groups or GOP megadonors who can spend a fortune to tilt the scales in my favor.

Instead, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me fight back. We need your help to reach undecided voters, keep our ads on the air, and make sure Hovde’s attacks don’t go unanswered.

[Will you split a donation between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign today to help me win this 50-50 Senate race? name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: The power of $1 in Missouri
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — **when you chip in toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce, you’re investing in one of the most competitive and affordable chances we have to flip a U.S. Senate seat this year.** Here are three reasons why:
1. **Josh Hawley is seriously vulnerable.** In 2018, he won his Senate seat with only 51% of the vote — and after he exposed himself to be a liar and a fraud by refusing to stand up for everyday Missourians in the Senate, his approval rating dropped to just 43% according to _Morning Consult._
2. **Missouri voters know how to take back their power at the ballot box.** They’ve broken with Hawley to approve measures that raised the minimum wage, expanded healthcare, and legalized weed with huge margins of victory over the last three election cycles. Now, with abortion on the ballot in Missouri this year, we know they’ll do it again by holding Hawley accountable for his crusade against reproductive rights.
3. **Every $1 in Missouri can go nearly five times as far compared to states like Texas and Florida.** Our state has small media markets, which means we’ll be able to reach Missourians with Lucas’ message early and often — on TV, online, and on the ground.

**The stakes have simply never been higher.** And with so much on the line this year, we can’t afford to let this opportunity we have in Missouri go to waste.
**[ELECT LUCAS KUNCE: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47290?refcode=em20240420-5319&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5319%2E614464%2EaCi730)**
Lucas Kunce is working hard to build the record-breaking, worker-led coalition that can take advantage of this moment and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.
**But with national insiders already spending millions of dollars to attack Lucas and prop up Hawley’s campaign, we need your help to do it, Peter.**
Missouri’s election-winning labor movement has started to unite behind Lucas — along with elected officials, community leaders, national organizations, and everyday people all across the state. But winning this race will be determined by our ability to keep up this grassroots momentum. So please:
**[Will you add a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford toward our campaign to replace Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat? Our campaign doesn’t accept a penny from corporate PACs, so your early support really does make a big difference.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47290?refcode=em20240420-5319&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5319%2E614464%2EaCi730)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47291?refcode=em20240420-5319&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=5319%2E614464%2EaCi730) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47291?refcode=em20240420-5319&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=5319%2E614464%2EaCi730) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47291?refcode=em20240420-5319&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=5319%2E614464%2EaCi730) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47291?refcode=em20240420-5319&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=5319%2E614464%2EaCi730) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47291?refcode=em20240420-5319&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=5319%2E614464%2EaCi730) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47291?refcode=em20240420-5319&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=5319%2E614464%2EaCi730) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47290?refcode=em20240420-5319&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=5319%2E614464%2EaCi730)

Thanks for being part of our movement,
Team Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240420-5319-footer&t=10&refcode2=5319_614464_aCi730&akid=5319%2E614464%2EaCi730)**

name: Jacky Rosen's Race (Nevada)
subject: We need to talk!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
Hey team,
We need to talk. Jacky Rosen's Nevada is one of the most important states to invest in this year. **You might not realize it, but her colleague Catherine Cortez Masto won her reelection by just a few thousand votes.** And the far-right will use that as motivation to try and take Nevada. We _can't_ let that happen.
Nevada isn't a state to ignore. It will decide fate of our Senate and the White House — full stop.
That's why we're reaching out to you today. [_**With most people chipping in $20 or so between Jacky and our movement, we're really counting on you to do the same.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83420367/468346323/1860800996?amount=20&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240420_2_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4OGQ2NWVkLTdhZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cRUKA-HjoCENTL8h-ZXRRxhcMEJ8tzPR3s1outMcbAY=)
When a statewide race comes down to just a few thousand votes, every single $1 donation makes a MASSIVE difference in voter turnout. And we need to make sure that every voter shows up on election day.
Look, we know you didn't wake up thinking you'd donate to Jacky's Senate campaign today._**But Nevada is within reach for the Republican party, and that's unacceptable.**_ We need you to step up and donate whatever you can to be split with Jacky's campaign.
[_**Let's show the far-right that we won't back down. Chip in today and make a difference in Nevada.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83420368/468346324/1860800996?amount=20&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240420_2_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4OGQ2NWVkLTdhZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cRUKA-HjoCENTL8h-ZXRRxhcMEJ8tzPR3s1outMcbAY=)
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Hey team, We need to talk. Jacky Rosen's Nevada is one of the most important states to invest in this year. You might not realize it, but her colleague Catherine Cortez Masto won her reelection by just a few thousand votes. And the far-right will use that as motivation to try and take Nevada. We can't let that happen. Nevada isn't a state to ignore. It will decide fate of our Senate and the White House — full stop. That's why we're reaching out to you today. = When a statewide race comes down to just a few thousand votes, every single $1 donation makes a MASSIVE difference in voter turnout. And we need to make sure that every voter shows up on election day. Look, we know you didn't wake up thinking you'd donate to Jacky's Senate campaign today.But Nevada is within reach for the Republican party, and that's unacceptable. **But first, there's three critical things I need you to understand:**
**1.** Senate Dems are the nation's last defense from a federal ban on abortion from the GOP, but we're also defending a one-seat majority. So we've got to jump on any chance we get to flip a Republican-held seat blue.
**2**. Extremist Sen. Rick Scott, as wealthy as he is unpopular, will be on Florida ballots this fall — _and so will a widely-supported referendum to enshrine reproductive rights in the Sunshine State's constitution._
**3.** **Florida will also have a Democrat like Debbie Mucarsel-Powell on the ballot, too.** If voters show up to save abortion and elect her in the process, Florida could be what saves our Senate majority, _and_ a federal guarantee of reproductive rights.
So I'm __ doing everything in my power to help Debbie defeat Rick Scott and the nasty attack ads his massive personal fortune can buy — **but I just got word from DMP HQ that they’re falling 39% behind on their crucial $50,000 daily goal.**
In other words, everything in my power still won't be enough. She needs a groundswell of support from grassroots Democrats like you, too.
**That’s why I’m reaching out to you — as the majority leader, I can't just stand just by when Scott is certain to try to buy this seat again. #### **When Other State’s GOP are more helpful than Alaska’s GOP, makes me wonder if our efforts would be more appreciated in other States...**
#### **Seems To Be The Case**
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
#### **Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.**
#### **The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**
#### _**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**_
#### _**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**_
#### _**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_
---
This is who is funding the [#RankedChoiceVoting](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6624c005bfa1a6366748e6f3&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6624be9b691a1f66dfafb02c&l=en-US&s=kF9L5Ti6pED4uOK9meI4voU4T2I%3D) group in Alaska 1630 Fund Swiss billionaire whose personal goal is to “(re)interpret the American Constitution in the light of progressive politics” has donated hundreds of millions of dollars to a left-wing group that is dumping millions into state ballot initiatives, a new report from Americans for Public Trust (APT) revealed. Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,”
---
---
|
---
**I’m not the only one who’s worried about**[**#RankedChoiceVoting**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6624c005bfa1a6366748e6f3&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6624be9b691a1f66dfafb02c&l=en-US&s=kF9L5Ti6pED4uOK9meI4voU4T2I%3D)**impact on vulnerable voters** Washington Secretary of State Steve Hobbs (Democrat) to discuss his opposition to RCV. Here is what Secretary Hobbs told us: “Ranked-choice voting adds a layer of complexity to voting that threatens to disenfranchise people who aren’t experts at the process. This includes people living with developmental disabilities – such as my son – for whom choosing one candidate is more straightforward than figuring out how to rank a list of them. Additionally, it can be a challenge for newly-naturalized citizens to adapt to American elections. Converting some elections to ranked-choice voting would increase the obstacles to exercising their rights as Americans. Top-two primaries present none of these challenges. You pick your favorite, then you send in your ballot. That’s something people can easily grasp. I stand firmly behind Top Two and encourage other states to learn from our usage of it.” Secretary Hobbs also recently told Crosscut: “Oh, I have lots of feelings about ranked-choice voting. I’m completely against ranked-choice voting; I used to be for it. But when you occupy this office, you have to take a step back and look at how elections affect everyone. Right? You know, the top three things, transparency, accessibility and security is what I look at. And then just with my own personal situation, my mom came to this country, she didn’t know any English. You know, we both learned by watching Sesame Street. And then my middle son is a child with special needs. So imagine, if you will, a naturalized citizen where English is not their first language, receiving a ballot, where they have to vote by ranked choice? How are they going to do that? They don’t know how to do that . . . And that’s why I am no longer for ranked-choice voting because you will disenfranchise people. They will not take full advantage of their vote because they don’t understand what they’re doing.”
---

**Overview of Election Types and Systems** The recent elections comprised various types, including Special Primary, Special General, Regular Primary, and Regular General elections. Each election type presented its own set of rules and systems. Notably, both the Special General Election and the Regular Primary occurred simultaneously. The Special General employed a Top 4 Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) system, whereas the Regular Primary followed a simpler system where voters were to select just one candidate. Complexity of Simultaneous Elections The concurrent scheduling of the Special General Election (using a Top 4 RCV system) and the Regular Primary (select one candidate system) undoubtedly introduced complexities. Voters received a single ballot that included both election types, potentially leading to significant confusion. This complexity was especially pronounced because the instructions for the Regular Primary (to choose one candidate) could easily be mistaken as applicable to the Special General Election as well. Voter Confusion and Election Outcomes The confusion among voters is highlighted by the election outcomes. In the Special General, a Democrat secured victory with 75,000 votes, despite Republican candidates collectively garnering 112,000 votes. This result suggests a significant portion of voters may have followed the Regular Primary’s instructions, opting to vote for only one candidate in the Special General as well. Such a scenario would inadvertently skew the effectiveness of the RCV system, where ranking multiple candidates is crucial. Introduction of Ranked Choice Voting Adding to the electoral confusion was the introduction of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) for Alaskans. As their first experience with RCV, many voters were unfamiliar with its mechanisms, which require voters to rank candidates by preference. The presence of both a new voting system and dual election types on the same ballot likely contributed to unintended voting behaviors and unexpected election results. Implications and Reflections The overlap of different voting instructions and the debut of RCV evidently had a profound impact on voter behavior and the election’s outcome. This scenario underscores the need for clear communication and voter education, particularly when implementing new voting technologies or systems. Ensuring that voters are well-informed and understand the distinctions between concurrent elections is crucial for the integrity and accuracy of electoral processes.

## Fidelity vs. Vanguard vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqqa15fut09accc3gsjlpf2er1uimlds12q1lmfo_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdie8o74cjh2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze5ekq4rcbv29bo3ea1arju8c5kolp4dear1id70_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdie8o74cjh2bs)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6lom24q3uen1do5gid366brdtn07c353t2k3adg_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdie8o74cjh2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z132b4u98c9datg152a2kvkpfuuol1h88tsatqh0_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdie8o74cjh2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Fidelity, Vanguard, and Schwab stack up »](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeuvrspmrhp8205qkf0ggd2gm0hpgcv15877sltg_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdie8o74cjh2bs)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Take this no-cost quiz to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area, each
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9ibn8vecna6eplb5ojdmktupgqrk72297olacco_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdie8o74cjh2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
|
---
| | | Unless otherwise indicated, information is as of 5/4/2023. SmartAsset has no obligation to update any content in this article. This article may potentially include a firm or firms that have a business relationship with SmartAsset, in which SmartAsset is compensated for lead referrals or cost per engagement. SmartAsset is not a client of the aforementioned firms. SmartAsset did not receive compensation for including any of the firms in the aforementioned article. This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. Sources:
1. ["Journal of Retirement Study Winter" (2020)](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0iqeqqmeaajshnr83unt8i0disn62l2kp7pure8_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdie8o74cjh2bs). The projections or other information regarding the likelihood of various investment outcomes are hypothetical in nature, do not reflect actual investment results, and are not guarantees of your future results. Please follow the link to see the methodologies employed in the [Journal of Retirement study](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmuvcnfoikic0u3t04psvl9v10hpinop0rg821po_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdie8o74cjh2bs).

We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32387%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4pgX8ei3qsoPEGHGr3bB%2fA&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32388%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V282XCizbcowfE5V9OOvIw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world’s elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, “We need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...

* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we’ll send the Great Reset seminar lectures --absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32389%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gsUkaHhUHsU8vg2pHOHCiQ&sysid=1)

Don’t miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z90gq7gmhh43j0ieq2f52re2qobki8gv294gs15g_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdiecor4s1h2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcnfiq1afhp6vh1h6so0d5tvo9u0n5t11sqgjol8_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdiecor4s1h2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Fidelity, Vanguard, and Schwab stack up »](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z16le79q5bdhlepd52el9hm3fuuek617c95efqro_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdiecor4s1h2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from The Capitol Report is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc2hku5noin8bml2ca5q7argg69iqfcpemb3fu30_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdieaob6cdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z90ks18ovfn0nqivuaaoq7ng71o4g2hnofen8lp0_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdieaob6cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrrb7e0smaeeq0fcr0vfrdllcgn8vk0mathv3mgo_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdieaob6cdh2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
President Trump has endorsed our campaign! Joe Biden is failing and we need Trump back.

| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjtiffudsiqcd16086a0fv1kpuf1jco8smkuqhk0_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdieeoj5cth2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z78j6urm8t1b3hpsjdqjraaf19gkhqantffnps9g_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdieeoj5cth2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Fidelity, Vanguard, and Schwab stack up »](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrlgi9im0rlphjjk5b1i0jn8fbfvjffaqk2qhtbg_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdieeoj5cth2bs)

name: Larry Klayman
subject: TORTURED: January 6 Peaceful Protesters Beg for Water
body:
Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze8acfm5qbutkbnkv3gof0ip7hvip5loacj5mero_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdieeoj4cjh2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkg3s7fnhvkba321fc82dqn5ralk6i70i17h97j0_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdieeoj4cjh2bs) Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvqbuf0mart05jq6motv02kuri5a112a851ad910_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdieeoj4cjh2bs)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what’s really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on.

**That’s why I’ve filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I’m Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 41 years.

You’ve seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdh0bejl54lq4r3e7lndkpuglu4645n1o8126gmo_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdieeoj4cjh2bs)**

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

**[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, $100, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Every dollar counts.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc60uojcij184aljqia652vckqc4eseroj4brbag_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdieeoj4cjh2bs)**

1600 Daily

body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv3bqalpp1oa5rn2tthg9016h63n1vt103qqkfk8_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdieeoj4cth2bs)

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn2rj7ue9tnac9hum4jvfkvfi0pkt7mhm6ncujg8_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdieeoj4cth2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
If I had another choice, I wouldn’t be emailing you right now...

| |

---
| | | My heart sank when I saw this headline from Roll Call:

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zilfnjp0bsq90kkeaasdd8ii7arkdp9eavbapifg_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdie9o36cph2bs "Roll Call")
---

I immediately thumbed through the latest FEC reports and wanted to share two major updates with you.
1) The Biden-Harris Campaign **QUADRUPLED** their spending last month to attack Conservatives in key swing states.

2) Democrats outraised our Republican candidates by an average of **21%** in competitive battleground districts handing them a huge advantage.
I'll say this as clearly as I can:

We are barely hanging onto our Conservative House Majority as it is. Now the Left's chances of taking full control of the House just SKYROCKETED.

_As I see it, whatever happens between now and the end of the month will decide everything._ Our biggest fundraising deadline to date is closing in and our path to victory depends on hitting it.

**And if we were on track to get there, I wouldn 't be emailing you right now. _[Asking you for anything is the LAST thing I want to do but I don't see any other choice - not if we want to win. So I'm humbly asking you to chip in a few bucks right here and right now before we fall short of our critical goal.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmf2ln1ibdplntat18bi7e8c375msp7ji3ceu4e0_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdie9o36cph2bs "Asking you for anything is the LAST thing I want to do but I don’t see any other choice – not if we want to win. So I’m humbly asking you to chip in a few bucks right here and right now before we fall short of our critical goal.")_**

Just imagine for a second if Democrats had control of the House...

Joe Biden would have FULL CONTROL of both Houses of Congress and could ram through any radical policy he wants. He could immediately:

**- SHUT DOWN** our impeachment inquiry
**- FORCE **woke propaganda into every classroom
**- UNDERMINE** our gun rights
**- PACK** the Supreme Court
**- GUT** voter ID laws

The only way we can bring this all to a screeching halt is by rallying an overwhelming Republican landslide in the next election. _**[That starts right here and right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z683a0sm2eeeehqp12r8jslfh5oq9au87svc0p7g_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdie9o36cph2bs "That starts right here and right now.")**_

If we keep falling further and further behind in the fundraising race, we may as well enjoy our Majority while we have it... Because the Democrats are coming at us from all angles - if we don't have the resources to defend ourselves, it's ALL OVER.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. clean_body: If I had another choice, I wouldn’t be emailing you right now... | | | | | My heart sank when I saw this headline from Roll Call: | "Roll Call" I immediately thumbed through the latest FEC reports and wanted to share two major updates with you. 1) The Biden-Harris Campaign QUADRUPLED their spending last month to attack Conservatives in key swing states. 2) Democrats outraised our Republican candidates by an average of 21% in competitive battleground districts handing them a huge advantage. I'll say this as clearly as I can: We are barely hanging onto our Conservative House Majority as it is. Now the Left's chances of taking full control of the House just SKYROCKETED. As I see it, whatever happens between now and the end of the month will decide everything. Our biggest fundraising deadline to date is closing in and our path to victory depends on hitting it. And if we were on track to get there, I wouldn 't be emailing you right now. "Asking you for anything is the LAST thing I want to do but I don’t see any other choice – not if we want to win. So I’m humbly asking you to chip in a few bucks right here and right now before we fall short of our critical goal." Just imagine for a second if Democrats had control of the House... Joe Biden would have FULL CONTROL of both Houses of Congress and could ram through any radical policy he wants. He could immediately: - SHUT DOWN our impeachment inquiry - FORCE woke propaganda into every classroom - UNDERMINE our gun rights - PACK the Supreme Court - GUT voter ID laws The only way we can bring this all to a screeching halt is by rallying an overwhelming Republican landslide in the next election. "That starts right here and right now." If we keep falling further and further behind in the fundraising race, we may as well enjoy our Majority while we have it... Because the Democrats are coming at us from all angles - if we don't have the resources to defend ourselves, it's ALL OVER. name: Lila Rose
subject: 3 stats you need to know
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vscsX54iVN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oscsX54iVN

Friend of life,

As you read this email, a
precious preborn baby is about to lose his or her life through
abortion. Despite the end of Roe v. Wade almost two years ago,
abortion rates are increasing.

The daily death toll of abortion
is 2,813 in the United States - that's 117 abortions per hour,
1.9 per minute, and one every 31 seconds.

The U.S. Supreme Court didn't end
abortion. Congress has refused to stop the spread of this
killing. But you CAN do something right now that will help turn
the tide and save lives.

Live Action has the content
proven to change minds about abortion and save lives, but we need
to reach mothers who are moments away from abortion, especially
in the most pro-abortion states.

We cannot reach these mothers -
and those who influence them - without the caring support of
people like you who invest daily in ending abortion.
Specifically, we are looking for 25 pro-life people in your state
to give just $50 today. Your gift will fund:

The creation and release of
Truth about Sex videos and resources to empower young women and
men to discover their own dignity and make life-affirming,
healthy choices

The ability to reach pregnant
mothers with the Window to the Womb web app that brings the
life-saving power of 3D fetal development imagery into their
pockets, showing how the precious preborn child is growing,
learning, and playing in the womb.

Providing local pregnancy
centers with tangible support like diapers while mobilizing
pro-life people to end abortion in their communities.

We cannot rely on someone else
getting involved to help end abortion. It is up to us to lean in,
invest, and save lives.

Here's your secure link to make
your gift and help save a baby:
https://give.liveaction.org/your-gift-will-save-lives-from-abortion/

Thank you for speaking for those
who cannot speak for themselves.

For Life,

Lila Rose
President and Founder

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB
111 Arlington, VA 22201

|
## Fidelity vs. Vanguard vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgg7k5ce8k1gm9eng3j08l89ono56fe1mteh8k1o_rp22sh2s8i6ep36ctg62ob6c5h2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjui7e350pombkfikjf66v5uc13dc3bcpf7afp3o_rp22sh2s8i6ep36ctg62ob6c5h2bs)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1jt7hlclhd77e0n8ubsvjn35ntjv6coam3kull0_rp22sh2s8i6ep36ctg62ob6c5h2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8rgia3oh4kp65sa6v4o4vk87dkhae6oo7lgfmm0_rp22sh2s8i6ep36ctg62ob6c5h2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Fidelity, Vanguard, and Schwab stack up »](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zso34q6k5tg2ptvu29tqr0kp57v5l1uunv5h91do_rp22sh2s8i6ep36ctg62ob6c5h2bs)
---
|
---

Get retirement ready. Take this no-cost quiz to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area, each

This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. name: Stephanie Mohr
subject: Pardoned by Trump
body:
As a wrongly accused police officer who was pardoned by President Trump

| |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Patriot, As a wrongly accused police officer who was pardoned by President Trump, I’m asking you to sign this **[**Emergency Pardon Petition**](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkMGOpCAYhJ8Gb3TgB0EPHmaizmXsdHon2SMB-e0mAdsgZl9_4-w-wFy_VCr11e_JTDbEsD6uNmFXcjF5N86biNEvNONabDTAQFImKXAjK99JDV6oCjuuudCMKeDVs0OrRNMuAp1iVlkQqpaKi6YWVrPW-Sp0Zw-TwFkrNeMXJiXMruEcFs601kQyGzGX_VKemHE7XAyzXQvadJlfqYrds5RtJ-KNwEhg3HE-Ml7siv5VzgSB8Xs3gRFYw2pYHJ1BLlTWi6JO6JpajQ2whjuhWiLGoySzv448IxH9e_9B78OVgDpxQh-OREQ_TP_JbNNmw2Mlov9nwrl57z_M5_DZj-bX1N9u5j5cze2Nft2_qtz57U-IMezqVHskG-K3R_nJz38DAAD__2-ufJs)** because right now a decorated police officer is sitting in prison for doing his job. On December 3, 2019, the Kansas City Police Department observed a red pick-up truck chasing another vehicle through the city streets. Officers unsuccessfully attempted to catch the truck – and involved the department’s helicopter to track it. The chopper tracked the car to the backyard of a home – and Detective Eric DeValkenaere and his partner were the first to arrive at the scene. Eric approached the passenger side of the pick-up and his partner approached the driver’s side, both shouting commands at the driver to STOP and SHOW HIS HANDS. Eric saw the suspect reach toward his waistband and grab a handgun, pointing it directly at his partner. Fearing the suspect would shoot, Eric discharged his firearm four times into the windshield of the pick-up as it continued driving into the garage.When officers entered the garage, they found the suspect deceased with his arm hanging out of the window and his .45 semi-automatic pistol on the ground. (A weapon they would later learn was stolen.)No doubt Eric saved his partner’s life that afternoon – and probably his own.**But instead of receiving an award for his heroic actions, Eric DeValkenaere was charged with Involuntary Manslaughter and Armed Criminal Action by a District Attorney desperately trying to hold onto her elected seat on the bench.** Worse, the Missouri Supreme Court just declined to take Eric’s case – exhausting his options through the justice system._Even though the Missouri Attorney General agreed Eric is innocent, woke anti-cop prosecutors and the defund the police mob somehow still won!_**A pardon from Missouri Governor Mike Parson is one of Eric’s last remaining options for freedom.****[Now you know why I’m asking you to follow this link to sign the Emergency Pardon Petition right away.](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkMGOpCAYhJ8Gb3TgB0EPHmaizmXsdHon2SMB-e0mAdsgZl9_4-w-wFy_VCr11e_JTDbEsD6uNmFXcjF5N86biNEvNONabDTAQFImKXAjK99JDV6oCjuuudCMKeDVs0OrRNMuAp1iVlkQqpaKi6YWVrPW-Sp0Zw-TwFkrNeMXJiXMruEcFs601kQyGzGX_VKemHE7XAyzXQvadJlfqYrds5RtJ-KNwEhg3HE-Ml7siv5VzgSB8Xs3gRFYw2pYHJ1BLlTWi6JO6JpajQ2whjuhWiLGoySzv448IxH9e_9B78OVgDpxQh-OREQ_TP_JbNNmw2Mlov9nwrl57z_M5_DZj-bX1N9u5j5cze2Nft2_qtz57U-IMezqVHskG-K3R_nJz38DAAD__2-ufJs)** My name is Stephanie Mohr and I’m proud to be on the Board of Directors for the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund – a non-profit organization that supports and defends wrongly accused officers like Eric. Over the last few years, LELDF has helped many men and women in blue clear their names and win back their freedom.I am also one of those officers LELDF has helped. You see, I used to be a police officer with the Prince George’s County Police Department in Maryland. Then one night I was called to a burglary scene. I did everything by the book – including releasing my canine to apprehend the suspect. We arrested the suspect, an illegal immigrant who was convicted and deported. So, imagine my shock when five years later the U.S. Department of Justice announced it was indicting me for violating the suspect’s civil rights by allowing my canine to bite and hold his leg so we could arrest him. And after two trials – in which the government flew in two illegal alien criminals to testify against me – I was convicted. I spent ten years in prison. But I was one of the lucky ones – not only did I have LELDF helping me fund and mount my defense – but they also helped me secure a pardon from President Trump restoring my good name.That’s why I can’t turn my back on a decorated police officer with a wife and three children at home waiting for him. **And I hope you won’t either.** **[**Will you sign the Emergency Pardon Petition to Missouri Governor Mike Parson right away?**](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkMGOpCAYhJ8Gb3TgB0EPHmaizmXsdHon2SMB-e0mAdsgZl9_4-w-wFy_VCr11e_JTDbEsD6uNmFXcjF5N86biNEvNONabDTAQFImKXAjK99JDV6oCjuuudCMKeDVs0OrRNMuAp1iVlkQqpaKi6YWVrPW-Sp0Zw-TwFkrNeMXJiXMruEcFs601kQyGzGX_VKemHE7XAyzXQvadJlfqYrds5RtJ-KNwEhg3HE-Ml7siv5VzgSB8Xs3gRFYw2pYHJ1BLlTWi6JO6JpajQ2whjuhWiLGoySzv448IxH9e_9B78OVgDpxQh-OREQ_TP_JbNNmw2Mlov9nwrl57z_M5_DZj-bX1N9u5j5cze2Nft2_qtz57U-IMezqVHskG-K3R_nJz38DAAD__2-ufJs)** Eric should have been commended for his service and life-saving actions that day, not convicted and sentenced to years in prison! The reality is we can’t get back the last several months Eric has been sitting in prison or the nearly four years this nightmare has been hanging over his head.But with your help today, we can bring Eric home to his wife and three children. **[So please, won’t you take just 30 seconds of your time right now to sign the Emergency Pardon Petition to Governor Mike Parson?](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkMGOpCAYhJ8Gb3TgB0EPHmaizmXsdHon2SMB-e0mAdsgZl9_4-w-wFy_VCr11e_JTDbEsD6uNmFXcjF5N86biNEvNONabDTAQFImKXAjK99JDV6oCjuuudCMKeDVs0OrRNMuAp1iVlkQqpaKi6YWVrPW-Sp0Zw-TwFkrNeMXJiXMruEcFs601kQyGzGX_VKemHE7XAyzXQvadJlfqYrds5RtJ-KNwEhg3HE-Ml7siv5VzgSB8Xs3gRFYw2pYHJ1BLlTWi6JO6JpajQ2whjuhWiLGoySzv448IxH9e_9B78OVgDpxQh-OREQ_TP_JbNNmw2Mlov9nwrl57z_M5_DZj-bX1N9u5j5cze2Nft2_qtz57U-IMezqVHskG-K3R_nJz38DAAD__2-ufJs)** After signing the petition, please make a generous donation to LELDF to fund this petition and the legal defenses of eight officers (including Eric) they currently support.Remember, LELDF is able to support wrongly accused and convicted officers like Eric and me because of the generosity of patriots like you. And with a pardon the final option to secure Eric’s freedom and restore his good name, I’m begging you to [**sign the Emergency Pardon Petition today**.](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkMGOpCAYhJ8Gb3TgB0EPHmaizmXsdHon2SMB-e0mAdsgZl9_4-w-wFy_VCr11e_JTDbEsD6uNmFXcjF5N86biNEvNONabDTAQFImKXAjK99JDV6oCjuuudCMKeDVs0OrRNMuAp1iVlkQqpaKi6YWVrPW-Sp0Zw-TwFkrNeMXJiXMruEcFs601kQyGzGX_VKemHE7XAyzXQvadJlfqYrds5RtJ-KNwEhg3HE-Ml7siv5VzgSB8Xs3gRFYw2pYHJ1BLlTWi6JO6JpajQ2whjuhWiLGoySzv448IxH9e_9B78OVgDpxQh-OREQ_TP_JbNNmw2Mlov9nwrl57z_M5_DZj-bX1N9u5j5cze2Nft2_qtz57U-IMezqVHskG-K3R_nJz38DAAD__2-ufJs)Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Gratefully,
---
---
Stephanie MohrDirector, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund P.S. Without your immediate action, Eric DeValkenaere – a decorated Kansas City Police Detective – will spend the next six years behind bars. His three beautiful children won’t have their biggest cheerleader at their graduations, maybe even their weddings. clean_body: As a wrongly accused police officer who was pardoned by President Trump | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, As a wrongly accused police officer who was pardoned by President Trump, I’m asking you to sign this because right now a decorated police officer is sitting in prison for doing his job. On December 3, 2019, the Kansas City Police Department observed a red pick-up truck chasing another vehicle through the city streets. Officers unsuccessfully attempted to catch the truck – and involved the department’s helicopter to track it. The chopper tracked the car to the backyard of a home – and Detective Eric DeValkenaere and his partner were the first to arrive at the scene. Eric approached the passenger side of the pick-up and his partner approached the driver’s side, both shouting commands at the driver to STOP and SHOW HIS HANDS. Eric saw the suspect reach toward his waistband and grab a handgun, pointing it directly at his partner. Fearing the suspect would shoot, Eric discharged his firearm four times into the windshield of the pick-up as it continued driving into the garage.When officers entered the garage, they found the suspect deceased with his arm hanging out of the window and his .45 semi-automatic pistol on the ground. (A weapon they would later learn was stolen.)No doubt Eric saved his partner’s life that afternoon – and probably his own.But instead of receiving an award for his heroic actions, Eric DeValkenaere was charged with Involuntary Manslaughter and Armed Criminal Action by a District Attorney desperately trying to hold onto her elected seat on the bench. Worse, the Missouri Supreme Court just declined to take Eric’s case – exhausting his options through the justice system.Even though the Missouri Attorney General agreed Eric is innocent, woke anti-cop prosecutors and the defund the police mob somehow still won!A pardon from Missouri Governor Mike Parson is one of Eric’s last remaining options for freedom. My name is Stephanie Mohr and I’m proud to be on the Board of Directors for the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund – a non-profit organization that supports and defends wrongly accused officers like Eric. Over the last few years, LELDF has helped many men and women in blue clear their names and win back their freedom.I am also one of those officers LELDF has helped. You see, I used to be a police officer with the Prince George’s County Police Department in Maryland. Then one night I was called to a burglary scene. I did everything by the book – including releasing my canine to apprehend the suspect. We arrested the suspect, an illegal immigrant who was convicted and deported. So, imagine my shock when five years later the U.S. Department of Justice announced it was indicting me for violating the suspect’s civil rights by allowing my canine to bite and hold his leg so we could arrest him. And after two trials – in which the government flew in two illegal alien criminals to testify against me – I was convicted. I spent ten years in prison. But I was one of the lucky ones – not only did I have LELDF helping me fund and mount my defense – but they also helped me secure a pardon from President Trump restoring my good name.That’s why I can’t turn my back on a decorated police officer with a wife and three children at home waiting for him. And I hope you won’t either. Eric should have been commended for his service and life-saving actions that day, not convicted and sentenced to years in prison! The reality is we can’t get back the last several months Eric has been sitting in prison or the nearly four years this nightmare has been hanging over his head.But with your help today, we can bring Eric home to his wife and three children. After signing the petition, please make a generous donation to LELDF to fund this petition and the legal defenses of eight officers (including Eric) they currently support.Remember, LELDF is able to support wrongly accused and convicted officers like Eric and me because of the generosity of patriots like you. And with a pardon the final option to secure Eric’s freedom and restore his good name, I’m begging you to you in advance for your support. | | Gratefully, Stephanie MohrDirector, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund P.S. Without your immediate action, Eric DeValkenaere – a decorated Kansas City Police Detective – will spend the next six years behind bars. His three beautiful children won’t have their biggest cheerleader at their graduations, maybe even their weddings. And the only way to get him out is to get Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon him. I hope you’ll also make a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF. No matter what, please pray for Eric and his heartbroken family. | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! | | | ---|---|--- © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | The Republican Team PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e7ee01b56b894b059f0a68b93a14eaa2&_e=T1WY-b2CLyAbhWi6UvdgH4hAJo7P0174DQuY5Mjz96JcPEWgX-2brOfoznrb8K2YbYdCHdNMDkVvp74ayMJcFfong0KMNPM4luZvj_Ns-G2Wu4MPy302EPgfkcxnJZ0tVik0v8uAI4e9RwGeuYuqMTi5VRJMN_15AaUfIhk00HmBWnJBTo92ixkEKrw7TIgyoEjcWUz-pF6CZi9vtJ6TQgRZ_tZ65uz7cthK2PEtIeCix3YXNfFBE2s8Sb6aEppk8vOMZc10Wxd5Hy0byibSiv_0EHTwW0Lqi8TRFjby_IxBYMNiUEDVfIqSBee-R5zzNzdaCy57gEy9sLxt3_Hw0WrTptynsXqZWEQVaL1-GTzQmomOwavuhKBDVUWy2hmlTn01ofx6cOvo6IDTPnD0Cg%3D%3D)
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e7ee01b56b894b059f0a68b93a14eaa2&_e=T1WY-b2CLyAbhWi6UvdgH4hAJo7P0174DQuY5Mjz96JcPEWgX-2brOfoznrb8K2YbYdCHdNMDkVvp74ayMJcFfong0KMNPM4luZvj_Ns-G2Wu4MPy302EPgfkcxnJZ0tVik0v8uAI4e9RwGeuYuqMTi5VRJMN_15AaUfIhk00HmBWnJBTo92ixkEKrw7TIgyoEjcWUz-pF6CZi9vtJ6TQgRZ_tZ65uz7cthK2PEtIeCix3YXNfFBE2s8Sb6aEppk-GZEPzuOfSL5YM8nqn_FtMURvEawr4Z7w9QJp6FqeAs4g4Z5_y-qvEfn3pVFbJ_qvy8nErHVfTuHIwrTKOLx3D8k964HxrPXEYD5P6YxVbfMJe5PBw5NTtlUUvt2AGhSduyFX_vgw-eY7yYWz6FQ5g%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we... Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dff4976fbee745c6bfbed78987bd26b3&_e=lz_5O7CB2IABCKFjHIgsz0yw0w8NyD7JHje42JesMzrkPZ16_954PT4HsSxbYZQrl33zxllhiWyIPqwcyWSUReME8hEGdtcbkFRloLIZJkWQHW5rlVoM-UfxvLQyc3d6oNnbOh0GGpghmZ3zxKSQ1EzlNS0nScX3UgVjvp_DZVURtne9rQIHXXPaQCIGov9MXs_Kos9SWQ2QcJJgHqCyWf1BMoQMEO-8d0Alcun4W15PJyjZMry-Hu5QGMw0E5FD1pnBTe56SMomhsqHELVxQjcISIPMWmV_i6v3pIKa5Wf3Epz3V-bWEkRPL3jAAh_uFfPXeu9V5pDyXi1qJnQNuH5zfZhDua5XXm_1fKqGQzKC0ar2aGlY4Er4N7cdGeSHB2rDZOJXH5Lxw3M8gUgxAQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dff4976fbee745c6bfbed78987bd26b3&_e=lz_5O7CB2IABCKFjHIgsz0yw0w8NyD7JHje42JesMzrkPZ16_954PT4HsSxbYZQrl33zxllhiWyIPqwcyWSUReME8hEGdtcbkFRloLIZJkWQHW5rlVoM-UfxvLQyc3d6oNnbOh0GGpghmZ3zxKSQ1EzlNS0nScX3UgVjvp_DZVURtne9rQIHXXPaQCIGov9MXs_Kos9SWQ2QcJJgHqCyWf1BMoQMEO-8d0Alcun4W15PJyjZMry-Hu5QGMw0E5FD9gCYq7vkxskLDRWkDOnAuFzH9QENBCkS5jGYhtc5G4v6m7L9liq3l5hm7mbUEH6Lu-9Kg6ZO1L0dqCbYRsIcx8FdUfMeW5DC_UDX_RPCaCltuQiXUp3dnAL9RZ_mKWyp6F7ApFIY2bk1vsSbiAruzA%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dff4976fbee745c6bfbed78987bd26b3&_e=lz_5O7CB2IABCKFjHIgsz0yw0w8NyD7JHje42JesMzrkPZ16_954PT4HsSxbYZQrl33zxllhiWyIPqwcyWSUReME8hEGdtcbkFRloLIZJkWQHW5rlVoM-UfxvLQyc3d6oNnbOh0GGpghmZ3zxKSQ1EzlNS0nScX3UgVjvp_DZVURtne9rQIHXXPaQCIGov9MXs_Kos9SWQ2QcJJgHqCyWf1BMoQMEO-8d0Alcun4W15PJyjZMry-Hu5QGMw0E5FD9C0S9wn8GPBlO7m_9CZB8wbhoj3KTk2gPdjlSGpH-tl24IPAofmoUqD6EO2XAxINa0OvIFCakfgLzY7_yxXj-LVok0YUB0IMA0DKzI0Cpkxe_yHPG_ntk86YbmVGGwRWCZw2t7MPm7G66Ym_mNzbrg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

clean_body: What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Fellow American, My name is Larry P. Arnn, and I'm the president of Hillsdale College, a Christian liberal arts college in southern Michigan. Hillsdale was founded in 1844 with the mission of providing "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the blessings of civil and religious liberty." A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox. Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Austin Theriault
subject: Do you support President Trump?
body:
President Trump has endorsed our campaign! Joe Biden is failing and we need Trump back.

Fellow Patriots: President Trump has endorsed our campaign! I deeply appreciate his support. Joe Biden is failing and we need Trump back. Can you join our team today? [Click here to join President Trump and send $5, $25, $50, or more to fuel our campaign!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c690497%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EFgtLMRqdDVOa34XYHn8eQ&sysid=1)

[Do you agree with TRUMP? Please donate to our campaign -- I would be grateful for your support today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c690499%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r3r3xjibQTKvtQaXOnF7Dw&sysid=1) I'm looking forward to working with President Trump to take Maine's 2nd Congressional District back for the people. | Peter—

Supporters like you are a critical piece of our work here at the Center for Reproductive Rights—and right now we are working harder than ever.

It's why, Peter, we want to know what your priorities are when it comes to reproductive rights around the world. We'll be sharing your feedback with our program colleagues to make sure your voice is heard as key decisions are being made.

[**Will you take a moment to fill out our short survey so we can understand what matters to you, one of our most dedicated supporters?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83421139/468354948/801223101?sourceid=1149065&utm_campaign=24emcl102304wsx&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=welcome_series_two&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODVkODA0My1jOGZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s8G3VkEUq3bJxdZUVq2iw5gNfyQzbVp6kJqhT1tkKjo=&emci=67cb7b09-3062-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=e85d8043-c8ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=954237) (We promise it'll take just a few minutes!) | [**TAKE THE SURVEY**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83421141/468354950/801223101?sourceid=1149065&utm_campaign=24emcl102304wsx&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=welcome_series_two&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODVkODA0My1jOGZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s8G3VkEUq3bJxdZUVq2iw5gNfyQzbVp6kJqhT1tkKjo=&emci=67cb7b09-3062-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=e85d8043-c8ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=954237 "TAKE THE SURVEY")

We look forward to hearing from you!

Onward,

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: All I had was a pen
body:
Kari Lake thinks the January Sixers are patriots. I think that anyone who supports those terrorists and traitors shouldn’t be allowed anywhere near the U.S. Senate.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5426cfaf-d9e4-4c46-bbd2-d6ff2effd9f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| | | | | I won’t ever forget it, Peter. Standing on the House floor. Hearing shouts, pounding, breaking glass. Barricading the door, teaching my colleagues how to use their gas masks. Texting my staff, telling them to hide. I carried a rifle in Iraq and all I had to defend myself on January 6th was a pen. But I was ready to fight. And after that day, Trump’s loyalists crawled right back to him. Witnessing them reject what they lived through, watching them ignore the testimony of the police officers that defended us that day while they were beaten, bloodied, pepper sprayed, cursed at... it makes me sick. Kari Lake thinks the January Sixers are patriots who were “invited in” — she even campaigns with them. I think anyone who supports those terrorists and traitors shouldn’t be allowed anywhere near the U.S. Senate. This race in Arizona is just me and her. It’s on us to stop her march to more power and influence. Whoever wins in Arizona is going to determine which party holds the Senate, and could even decide whether Trump takes back the White House. I need you with me, and I need you to take this race seriously. [**Please split a donation of $20 — that or anything you can give — between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to crush Kari Lake’s campaign and defend our democracy.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T88ac3326-a07e-4c30-a9c3-3bde122afdae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
