---
| Thanks for your support. As we gear up for one of the toughest elections of our lives, it means a lot to have you behind me. Ruben
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Girls’ sports are on the line
body:
We won't rest until our daughters can compete fair and square.
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM1O6zAQhZ9msms0njj2zcKLWyp3AeoGiYruHNshRjZJnZTQt0cNhe38fOfTMWmMobsqkFsg6oObgAiq_0B0fl1Svrynx_3mgF_7zVkcUn3b0gMQzdfR_53eKaVPJsTbVO4Kp6rOIS-8YpJVEhHrpuhVJ7vKkuG1bBl6SdYbyYT9R6bmhLwpgiIkjpwYY1ySKBsmW-da5giFbdAAxzWnNMnnYA2b5sXkPAyptEMqourneZxWMQ2klzyUHxcb_WX6ebNDAtJ3ZSD9CaR7LY7H521aWqj02kK1O59ejD6ZJyqycuMSYgyTkMDx7RfzHQAA__82WV_w)

---
Patriot, Riley Gaines here. The integrity of girls’ sports is on the line, and it's time to get real about the fight ahead.

Imagine this: your daughter trains hard and puts in the sweat and tears, only to have her shot at victory taken away by males muscling their way into competitions meant for girls. That's not just unfair — it's wrong.

With your help, we're slamming the door shut on this madness. Your support fuels our battle to keep girls' sports for GIRLS — no exceptions, no compromises.
---
[**STOP THE MADNESS**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGO3CAMhp_GuSUyhsDkkEPbKHuotPeeKgbIDKsQWEKUmbevGI0q2Rf78__b1iGtfnmOoH4C0d3bHYiA_wCi7z9nyMdX-P3RfuLjo_2Wn6GvXfoFROWZ3H_0rdK5oP1aq2pq7MgXi6JxI1OMK0Tsh-Y-XuSihCXGLgsblMPhahj1KBaBVnIlGz8SkkBBjDGhSHYDU1drr8wSSjOgBoEvn04Hl73RbC-nzjnG0JkYmnW8l5L212Iz0Lw7c2TXnX7LzlYCaH5Pbm3KfjM-rW5vU45fzhSgOa7P9uXQZr-6Z3vTfnN7VePzUcJfo0PS_rYBn5Ah1hxqMAKSFQjO-iMAn97_kI9ji8AnIYURfX_hyJErfnnjxeUKn5kBSR3isRXgE_VNHm06_br6XSoQeHtdbWL4FwAA___56oVn)
---
We won't rest until our daughters can compete fair and square.
---
[**DEFEND OUR GIRLS**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGO3CAMhp_GuSUyhsDkkEPbKHuotPeeKgbIDKsQWEKUmbevGI0q2Rf78__b1iGtfnmOoH4C0d3bHYiA_wCi7z9nyMdX-P3RfuLjo_2Wn6GvXfoFROWZ3H_0rdK5oP1aq2pq7MgXi6JxI1OMK0Tsh-Y-XuSihCXGLgsblMPhahj1KBaBVnIlGz8SkkBBjDGhSHYDU1drr8wSSjOgBoEvn04Hl73RbC-nzjnG0JkYmnW8l5L212Iz0Lw7c2TXnX7LzlYCaH5Pbm3KfjM-rW5vU45fzhSgOa7P9uXQZr-6Z3vTfnN7VePzUcJfo0PS_rYBn5Ah1hxqMAKSFQjO-iMAn97_kI9ji8AnIYURfX_hyJErfnnjxeUKn5kBSR3isRXgE_VNHm06_br6XSoQeHtdbWL4FwAA___56oVn)
---
The momentum is growing around the country for our mission, so we can’t slow down now. There is an uphill battle to November, and we must elect politicians who will fight for our girls, not bend the knee to radical activists.

_**[_**Can I count on you for a donation of $25 to even the field?**_](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGO3CAMhp_GuSUyhsDkkEPbKHuotPeeKgbIDKsQWEKUmbevGI0q2Rf78__b1iGtfnmOoH4C0d3bHYiA_wCi7z9nyMdX-P3RfuLjo_2Wn6GvXfoFROWZ3H_0rdK5oP1aq2pq7MgXi6JxI1OMK0Tsh-Y-XuSihCXGLgsblMPhahj1KBaBVnIlGz8SkkBBjDGhSHYDU1drr8wSSjOgBoEvn04Hl73RbC-nzjnG0JkYmnW8l5L212Iz0Lw7c2TXnX7LzlYCaH5Pbm3KfjM-rW5vU45fzhSgOa7P9uXQZr-6Z3vTfnN7VePzUcJfo0PS_rYBn5Ah1hxqMAKSFQjO-iMAn97_kI9ji8AnIYURfX_hyJErfnnjxeUKn5kBSR3isRXgE_VNHm06_br6XSoQeHtdbWL4FwAA___56oVn)**_
For girls everywhere,
Riley Gains

body:
RFK Jr. is ready to win the White House, protect our privacy, and heal America!

Dear Peter,
The right to privacy was a core principle of our Founding Fathers, and shadowy surveillance programs should not be monitoring Americans without a warrant!
But this is exactly what’s happening under the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (FISA), _which was just extended two years with the support of both parties._
Enacted after 9/11, the law allows alphabet intelligence agencies—the FBI, CIA, and NSA—to collect phone calls, texts, emails, and other communications from non-Americans outside of the United States.
Unfortunately, despite clear mandates, intelligence agencies are still conducting backdoor searches to review communications __from Americans__ , in clear violation of the 4th Amendment.
Hundreds of thousands of violations have been documented with little or no recourse.
Former President Donald Trump was apparently lobbying on his social media platform to end FISA. But the truth is, Trump shamefully reauthorized the program during his administration.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fisa_4_21_24_rs_nd1&n=3)
Donald Trump failed to protect our privacy and caved to the Deep State, _when it mattered the most_.
This should remind you that there's little difference between the two parties, especially when protecting your privacy. _It's time for a change_ , which is why more than 52% of Americans now consider themselves independent voters!
As President, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will reform America's intelligence services to protect our Constitutional rights.
RFK Jr. is ready to win the White House, protect our privacy, and heal America! name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: Dem-Aligned Voter Reg Website Harvesting Data for Partisan Messaging | Biden's Use of Executive Power + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | | Good morning, and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dc9112af8e&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fd20843323&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Thank you to all who joined us this past Thursday for our webinar, "Chaos and Crisis: Behind the Walls of George Hill Correctional Facility." Above is the uploaded audio.
|
---
|
### **1.[Democratic-aligned voter registration website harvests personal data for partisan, political messaging](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ef7ff8ef2a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
**“** Vote.pa sounds very much like the real Pennsylvania Department of State website: vote.pa.gov. The website’s logo — a deep blue outline of Pennsylvania with a white ‘vote’ inside the borders — looks thematically similar to the blue keystone with a white ‘PA’ used in official state websites. But tucked away at the bottom of the page is the note that the site is a project of Commonwealth Communications, a 501(c)(4) political nonprofit run by J.J. Abbott, Governor Wolf’s former press secretary turned political operative.
**Why It Matters.** “The website’s[ privacy policy](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=090d3e33d4&e=b7b3eddce2) page (which[ studies say](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=18214ec4a4&e=b7b3eddce2) less than nine percent of website visitors actually read those disclaimers) makes clear: ‘We may use your personal information in connection with our political efforts and activities.’ And of note, Vote.pa asks for a phone number, while the state website makes clear that phone and email are optional. And, ‘We reserve the right to share your personal information to third parties as part of any potential business or asset sale...’ — meaning the website is well within its rights to sell data collected from a visitor.”
**Quotable.** “Third-party organizations should under no circumstances collect people’s personal information under the guise of ‘voter registration,’” House Appropriations Chairman Seth Grove said. “Vote.pa is an obvious attempt to steal information from voters or potential voters who are very likely looking for the Department of State’s website. I believe all elected officials should call out these websites as bad actors and commit to sharing official government websites.”
**And there’s more!** A [follow-up story by Todd Shepherd](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d897cfa366&e=b7b3eddce2) shows that the chicanery goes all the way to the top. Like several other Democrats, Governor Josh Shapiro allowed his signature to be used on mailers guiding people to request mail-in ballots through the deceptive website. A request for comment to the governor’s office was not returned. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ffa63ee75f&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Biden’s use of executive power threatens American democracy](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=be127f195f&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Andy Bloom_
**“** When it comes to using executive power to tamp down the invasion at the Southern border, President Joe Biden pretends to be confused. In fact, Biden uses executive power when he wants, often testing constitutionality and dangerous to democracy. Immigration, in general, seems to befuddle this administration – sometimes. Other times, he claims not to be confused or secretly favors what’s happening. Biden was clear about using executive orders to undo the policies put in place by former President Donald Trump, which had slowed illegal immigration to the lowest levels in years. On his first day in office, Biden suspended the Trump-era ‘Remain in Mexico’ policy.”
**Why It Matters.** “Biden, or whoever is really running the country, has amazing moments of clarity when he wants to use executive power. Executive orders were used to undo many of his predecessor’s actions. He’s used executive powers to spend money without Congressional approval and even to ignore Supreme Court rulings. Heck, he thinks he can even change the Bill of Rights if he wants to.”
**Quotable.** Here’s what Nancy Pelosi, then House Speaker, had to say when Biden announced his plan. “People think that the president of the United States has the power for debt forgiveness,” she said during a press conference. “He does not. He can postpone, he can delay, but he does not have that power. That has to be an act of Congress.”
The Supreme Court confirmed what Pelosi said in a 6-3 ruling. Undeterred, Biden directed Education Secretary Miguel Cardona to find a different path by which the administration could forgive student debt. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ab60392522&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Podcasts**
* **[Voices of Reason: Ep.3, Why the PA political map bleeds red while the vote leans blue](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=db430a99fa&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Kitchen Table Politics: Tim DeFoor](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5d8e4c03d0&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. Lightning Round**
* **[Shapiro tied to unofficial voter registration website secretly harvesting user data, mailers show](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3d1135b44e&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Seth Higgins: Whom do nonprofit healthcare systems serve?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b07520b87a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Being a Democrat means never having to say you’re sorry](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=15f9125684&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Preserving a dream — Dream Garden and the Curtis Center](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f20d60d30c&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[David Mitchell: Nurse practitioners can solve rural health care shortages](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bb25124e48&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
Media writing about the media is often just boring and self-obsessed. But with the NPR scandal now roiling the news, it is hard to look away. Two articles at _National Review_ this week — [one by Charlie Cooke](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fe6d2d6a4d&e=b7b3eddce2), [the other by Jeff Blehar ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5a5295fa74&e=b7b3eddce2)— get to the heart of how at NPR (like most places) the fish rots from the head. The truly bizarre speeches, tweets, and rantings of NPR’s CEO, Katherine Maher, sound like a parody of an excessively woke person. Sadly, they’re all too real.

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week. | | | | | | | Good morning, and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. and get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | Thank you to all who joined us this past Thursday for our webinar, "Chaos and Crisis: Behind the Walls of George Hill Correctional Facility." Above is the uploaded audio. | | 1. By Todd Shepherd “ Vote.pa sounds very much like the real Pennsylvania Department of State website: vote.pa.gov. The website’s logo — a deep blue outline of Pennsylvania with a white ‘vote’ inside the borders — looks thematically similar to the blue keystone with a white ‘PA’ used in official state websites. But tucked away at the bottom of the page is the note that the site is a project of Commonwealth Communications, a 501(c)(4) political nonprofit run by J.J. Abbott, Governor Wolf’s former press secretary turned political operative. Why It Matters. “The website’s page (which less than nine percent of website visitors actually read those disclaimers) makes clear: ‘We may use your personal information in connection with our political efforts and activities.’ And of note, Vote.pa asks for a phone number, while the state website makes clear that phone and email are optional. And, ‘We reserve the right to share your personal information to third parties as part of any potential business or asset sale...’ — meaning the website is well within its rights to sell data collected from a visitor.” Quotable. “Third-party organizations should under no circumstances collect people’s personal information under the guise of ‘voter registration,’” House Appropriations Chairman Seth Grove said. “Vote.pa is an obvious attempt to steal information from voters or potential voters who are very likely looking for the Department of State’s website. I believe all elected officials should call out these websites as bad actors and commit to sharing official government websites.” And there’s more! A shows that the chicanery goes all the way to the top. Like several other Democrats, Governor Josh Shapiro allowed his signature to be used on mailers guiding people to request mail-in ballots through the deceptive website. A request for comment to the governor’s office was not returned. | | 2. By Andy Bloom “ When it comes to using executive power to tamp down the invasion at the Southern border, President Joe Biden pretends to be confused. In fact, Biden uses executive power when he wants, often testing constitutionality and dangerous to democracy. Immigration, in general, seems to befuddle this administration – sometimes. Other times, he claims not to be confused or secretly favors what’s happening. Biden was clear about using executive orders to undo the policies put in place by former President Donald Trump, which had slowed illegal immigration to the lowest levels in years. On his first day in office, Biden suspended the Trump-era ‘Remain in Mexico’ policy.” Why It Matters. “Biden, or whoever is really running the country, has amazing moments of clarity when he wants to use executive power. Executive orders were used to undo many of his predecessor’s actions. He’s used executive powers to spend money without Congressional approval and even to ignore Supreme Court rulings. Heck, he thinks he can even change the Bill of Rights if he wants to.” Quotable. Here’s what Nancy Pelosi, then House Speaker, had to say when Biden announced his plan. “People think that the president of the United States has the power for debt forgiveness,” she said during a press conference. “He does not. He can postpone, he can delay, but he does not have that power. That has to be an act of Congress.” The Supreme Court confirmed what Pelosi said in a 6-3 ruling. Undeterred, Biden directed Education Secretary Miguel Cardona to find a different path by which the administration could forgive student debt. | | 3\. Podcasts | | 4\. Lightning Round | 5\. What we're reading Media writing about the media is often just boring and self-obsessed. But with the NPR scandal now roiling the news, it is hard to look away. name: Lorig Charkoudian
subject: We’re on social media!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lorig Charkoudian, Jill Feasley, Treasurer, Tebabu Assefa, Chair
body:
Follow our social media channels to stay updated on everything my team and I are doing to deliver for Maryland!

Folks,

I’m as nervous as a pregnant Jenny. **_April’s halfway over, and I’ve yet to meet any of my fundraising goals..._**

It’s been a difficult road for Republicans on their fundraising recently. Biden’s been riding a gravy train with biscuit wheels, getting million-dollar donations left and right.

**_I’m more of a traditional kind of guy._**

So, let me cut to the chase: _I’m behind, and I have less than 24 hours to submit my numbers and get ahead._ How much am I short by?

| [**$749.82**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f6e83f189f664ef6831319461cc9e11d&_e=VMDohpFhje0DBihnSXNcYUJyqGOFH_hyttbfOWzI5Z1aaRsl2F4RtUSZsDt-ylajP-38LQLQHhlTZux_Emoyq5BVaeHuYzoOGmKOD8z1JNRHk2pYJcWhdW9TH6b-x8YbfXJ6yj641-tTrlyiP6slb2uMjr5C52Ee97ToKe3yeqttUadRhNuJd7xgdYGTvQisamGDVkRuWf6A0afQJedagNI9j2Z_GSAlQYSz-X8Id8yGBsVZumqeYZ9iseKYluZiLDKAKH4c0G-ad1qQs80wsub9M5ZfFmC8Y1yjPxPNEM4mv7zlSOYvi5z8koyOtLXPpTbDYqtxqUfr2mgtk7aYC3nW5DVUr_IbDQYHZaqe6ehmLGaM44EJNq1TjlZQ7mxlNjQ13HOuXjoEmySNtNSrJg%3D%3D)

It’s been a difficult road for Republicans on their fundraising recently. Biden’s been riding a gravy train with biscuit wheels, getting million-dollar donations left and right. I’m more of a traditional kind of guy. So, let me cut to the chase: I’m behind, and I have less than 24 hours to submit my numbers and get ahead. How much am I short by? | Hey. I know this is no big deal for big Dem donors, but for an average American like myself, this makes all the difference. My team and I will be forever grateful to you personally when we sit down and go over our donor list tomorrow. Thanks for stepping up. It’s people like you I rely on. \- Senator Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

name: Ted Corcoran
subject: One of my favorite weeks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Friends,
Today kicks off one of my favorite weeks of the year, and _no it’s NOT Shark Week!_ It’s National Volunteer Week!!
All On The Line is a strong and powerful difference-maker because of our strong and powerful volunteer network. **We want to make sure ALL of our volunteers across the country feel the love — so we’re putting together a special thank you card for them.**
[**Will you take 30 seconds to say you appreciate our volunteers?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83424656/468362574/2008362362?refcode=eng_aotl_redite_email_natlvolweek_email_20240421_AOTL_NatlVolWeek_Ted&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5ODdlNDE4LWRmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gGanuyJ-EGRYG9l6yqyfC3sp1JSETrOYzYe61uXwcV8=&emci=0bb45761-77fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=a987e418-dfff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=8431045)
[Sign The Card](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83424657/468362575/2008362362?refcode=eng_aotl_redite_email_natlvolweek_email_20240421_AOTL_NatlVolWeek_Ted&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5ODdlNDE4LWRmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gGanuyJ-EGRYG9l6yqyfC3sp1JSETrOYzYe61uXwcV8=&emci=0bb45761-77fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=a987e418-dfff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=8431045)
---
As I reflect on my time with All On The Line — all the way back to when I started as a volunteer in North Carolina back in 2019 — I can’t help but smile when I think of all the amazing memories I’ve shared with our volunteers.
Like Carla, a fellow veteran, who traveled half-way across the state of North Carolina in order to testify in support of fair maps for her community. A community made up of current and former servicemembers that deserve fair representation.
Or Trey, who on a moment's notice, made his way to the Capitol building in Montgomery, Alabama to raise his voice in support of communities impacted by gerrymandering.
I could share countless stories like these with you, but I’d be writing a novel to you! I know you’re just as inspired as I am by our amazing volunteers who work tirelessly for fair maps across the country.
**[Please join us in thanking our volunteers for their hard work during National Volunteer Week by adding your name to our thank you card today! →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83424659/468362578/2008362362?refcode=eng_aotl_redite_email_natlvolweek_email_20240421_AOTL_NatlVolWeek_Ted&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5ODdlNDE4LWRmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gGanuyJ-EGRYG9l6yqyfC3sp1JSETrOYzYe61uXwcV8=&emci=0bb45761-77fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=a987e418-dfff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=8431045) **
Thank you,
Ted Corcoran
Deputy Campaigns Director

**_[All On The Line](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83424660/468362579/-1578943632?refcode=eng_aotl_redite_email_natlvolweek_email_20240421_AOTL_NatlVolWeek_Ted&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5ODdlNDE4LWRmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gGanuyJ-EGRYG9l6yqyfC3sp1JSETrOYzYe61uXwcV8=&emci=0bb45761-77fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=a987e418-dfff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=8431045) is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. clean_body: | Friends, Today kicks off one of my favorite weeks of the year, and no it’s NOT Shark Week! It’s National Volunteer Week!! All On The Line is a strong and powerful difference-maker because of our strong and powerful volunteer network. We want to make sure ALL of our volunteers across the country feel the love — so we’re putting together a special thank you card for them. As I reflect on my time with All On The Line — all the way back to when I started as a volunteer in North Carolina back in 2019 — I can’t help but smile when I think of all the amazing memories I’ve shared with our volunteers. Like Carla, a fellow veteran, who traveled half-way across the state of North Carolina in order to testify in support of fair maps for her community. A community made up of current and former servicemembers that deserve fair representation. Or Trey, who on a moment's notice, made his way to the Capitol building in Montgomery, Alabama to raise his voice in support of communities impacted by gerrymandering. I could share countless stories like these with you, but I’d be writing a novel to you! I know you’re just as inspired as I am by our amazing volunteers who work tirelessly for fair maps across the country. Thank you, Ted Corcoran Deputy Campaigns Director is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. 1️⃣ **_Celebrate🎉:_ State Dems win special elections and defend Michigan trifecta **
In Michigan, Democrats Peter Herzberg and Mai Xiong won their special elections on Tuesday. [These wins secured Democrats’ critical trifecta, blocked a Republican power grab, and set the tone for key races this fall → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWwpbRT_BYJsLvsW0RbBHsbCF6b0md7iw-BhSZ2XP4udpUZIX-uuZ9BYYs8zfpS7jpKsjnuFwZFZPpTaZ-WbuOIJEVTuLRDg9q4fXjefvFxUKhEaR7eU8XXOuI2jx9JDzl2XvfWbWR02hWzlfL8yQZn7qDb1fL0xQov8vtYKPKA2hCOKb7i_H-8Fh1spBJ4YxNnaK8T94K1SO5fgtj7sNOZHGNkiiJsp76f7Tn8Ht4fBwSuzPJkPuV6SnaGBrhPLQlVu44dRRAaXDmsckHn4s-24EcpT3aDaDD_yXSXxmlDQMdipVILKbBlWlPvagecAQ-LmEOtI5oIVUZ8DSTYx0oqBLsBqgw-eOaTQNLHhhWi_NVyk1cEafoUIBW1zvpnRj2KwF6qYJYwnmR4bJvmRSxU84mGQnbxvdLZHttWrvHYcsPq7OIIP6pzkDYclea7gw-bED_Cn_wyXVQpdzIoa-5wRKuTnpFwtAsW3PcfQ8FwFbE586wbXhlTgteaZ21jDY1tXuXkGs9FE8VfaJP_cRZk2vZOxDT-zYucMQjYz2cIK9jWwpC1Kc11T-ZIq3eLp23MC-IPyyNgxd2USWLEIXIhXGOJVkFV4iVrG-76MBZ-9Ibp6ZxBsqA2Whg1_Q6C5fbBESM6ir3zdce4NHcwDcfcY/45p/e0o5t2fMQO6VxWKnG9yxQw/h1/h001.DJtlujQcZmhFmsBmsB_B2E9Z0HFw1cvoYCyOP-It1kM)

2️⃣ **_Arizona:_ House Republicans block Democrats' efforts to repeal abortion ban **
In Arizona, Democrats are working hard to repeal a 160-year-old abortion ban Republicans recently upheld. [**The fight for abortion access and reproductive freedoms continues in key target states and nationwide →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoV27-AzmerCmMImPbPj3VSqSxHVDqUKV2SoWfpkXRracEc_-httjhGJmB_Cwaek-0KhVO4oSKw7hC8Oyk5fFoCmWwt6-Y2t1jsNSs5an__C5y4jK1c74o5xP56DaMHG6UKWCz8_vr3afamACAJ_FPW8_0cnNW0Ny1EgoI3MWEeHJXlXBt3v6qPB-YFxoh2Ie77KMZJ-ockNuoZWP9ep7pS13fP-08yKth7MgK4mYtse2pREvjwXzGH2jRdjXAVvFeVQbLcsSYvJ0uFLfdPWpaBmzHqReEmPCwBl6-eTMudHVW1zK2xcyDS_G90MXW8oPEJjL2zj-k5hs3GzTUTFZo0z2PnY4n-9B5yJhvBpEOkUlH_chOeG7xopoawRpvyLJJM2eh49Sh2EMJmSz3fABzFPSL7SzRQvxVFmSrLvvu_5f2xKzVjxYXe7Kb5Fn7UJqzCPqLtWwUxSR6hTXApTGoSILW93fdsrrLzRedfhVIxEJfx_-QjLVhcmH9FXYbYozEZEyCqJVo5N3rMhVznznvFvsz_v3uEl7x2KKYnrZ7QmIC4fRwQKcDNYhgFU6Nh_4TfISHIW452j9H2OpGW6tAG-KrriI4Ehgs7-30FrQc1PLqkKK237e8feTQ5Ihoa4KBA/45p/e0o5t2fMQO6VxWKnG9yxQw/h2/h001.mvhl7DpR3cDTSgt_AbOg0VzTnwE-gym8Fs4em_lxYYQ)
3️⃣ **_Florida:_ DeSantis backtracks on book ban law **
In Florida, following the passage of a 2022 law making it easier to challenge books in schools, DeSantis has started to backtrack after the bill was used to challenge texts like the Bible. [**Republicans’ attack on books was never about parents' input on literature, it’s always been about discrimination towards the LGBTQ+ community, and sanitizing our history and culture →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoc5lroAYgnBM-pxs59wzI1Sov2kh7wGANJPuK_CV0JwzMqSH4YESUsao5mb9aKy2zRen7C5k91zugk0Qe7VSM3TbBGsCA2ADbyJ7Lq9VUQykqUz0DAGv3vdUWnEPjFsafb4jIo93bI0qFPptbBrwZObiX_b6tS_TUnGuz0GvAYrbs0_8UXMbZnyFJ6g7GRJrECr7d7T8IjaCqT90umcS4nlPGaKMpqepJL1gCJzIQ3zlzM9VVAO51A6dz2BFuOiunHTtj5IQY29w-WvCOaWSFLT2NXQvmB0FgltKLL6c3saFUnXnJtueThtIyylVwb2tlYD28qp4yTYSMIcXVDPL_8OmYdA8YRC6I4kh2qQLFj-89e4WQGr-4XnSXe3bTlbuOGFmCTtGyBOZdZCdRYThQ8XVrUCKtv_nZDvpevR9V9wAs2agfMoon2BZ-3mJ3cK96x6oRko8GXkxe31QhggyiRgDCft8twUAUg_jbwaDlPbjIorVg-d9k80tZhTxdPHLS4GMRjG5squBHD_K5RwccXQmOJxXwumZ3qF0S0bMplt3CTFVBBZyQFlNEG2M6GdOehpt0yqyp0Z-Dfb23a88Dxi3_pCJw-5xCmIuIXsJSA_wZYw57fbRXWW4W56e-VWvzuhw1iEqDCnQrGLfX82lBaUbWqRv3ZrkaiUpI85kGc0hYAEoBDKxdlpdRMJBDgYWug/45p/e0o5t2fMQO6VxWKnG9yxQw/h3/h001.m5AYd7R5Hpdc-AJSN7CJZIs06YYY9EftqdL2YWcRSU8)
4️⃣ **_Idaho:_ SCOTUS permits Republicans’ ban on gender-affirming care **
In Idaho, as legal battles continue, the state has been given the go-ahead to enforce its ban on gender-affirming care for transgender minors. [**The Supreme Court’s emergency decision only applies to this specific case, leaving open the door for other states to test their limits with dangerous bans →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMTHpY68KeBL-tuPFtNUwAZQ3SWeRS7RNgGJP7ocskeHdkKjHJoXljKhKaJ3jYS-grClYxhOCpdyhReSpRvV3QRaJmtq7HDXgTD6_G8asK4VjsefwbmLaFvPlhlUXKJ5jQwx5us7z8jMmu5qrTr7KqrQdxjvoDR5gdga3g_d9j-IvBc3NV309zMwQROye-QZrf1UFhte3qggxBx_6PwJBG_J96cGeM45fijNygWcriPOS11mIqnhkYBltyAv1W5-Vae0lY_nGaqEMvx5ySiJlXXNov4CuZD0t-iVoWIDVnfz5Y_463jzIz4V03R0Zf6r075kVAFk0cyR8yRkhvXrwg-Y6yQsDAEmzYWzKi9ZIDEfHBrkDEPEXhFM8yabtMTTWAJaxptiY-e3etBLqkJS8cXD7axO_e7w3jdDFtX1yyTaWZmpuR4Hxd86QmeLWp1F_qfkCPrFp8RAwtj23MK5aZi_thYiohgWy6hDLEPzDl_Qp2F3eHSUOc4qMguGUA7QyFa3MM4xXzULFC4o4o3UZCLZFiJJRmdXLa3OVEM8xpoic_Z7Nfk8waYJ0Bcub7AyEcEM3IQOFbYAvXIfpv06UPOIa75jdupebfw2xSDxaP-nClOn6HqCO3HWHR72F08f4Jw/45p/e0o5t2fMQO6VxWKnG9yxQw/h4/h001.r9O1_Tosanb9i474g7k2i_iYU6APzfRGHqelsPqevdM)

clean_body: Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, April 21st, 2024 | | | | | 1️⃣ Celebrate🎉: State Dems win special elections and defend Michigan trifecta In Michigan, Democrats Peter Herzberg and Mai Xiong won their special elections on Tuesday. 2️⃣ Arizona: House Republicans block Democrats' efforts to repeal abortion ban In Arizona, Democrats are working hard to repeal a 160-year-old abortion ban Republicans recently upheld. 3️⃣ Florida: DeSantis backtracks on book ban law In Florida, following the passage of a 2022 law making it easier to challenge books in schools, DeSantis has started to backtrack after the bill was used to challenge texts like the Bible. 4️⃣ Idaho: SCOTUS permits Republicans’ ban on gender-affirming care In Idaho, as legal battles continue, the state has been given the go-ahead to enforce its ban on gender-affirming care for transgender minors. 🗳️ Special Elections: Democrats are facing a slew of elections this year – some as soon as next week – so, ****** | | ---|---|--- | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | **MEET ERIC**

Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others.

When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his family and his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services and love to vulnerable children.

clean_body: It’s not an exaggeration to say that this race will come down to a handful of votes, and the Democrats have a head start pouring millions into this race. | Fellow Conservative, THIS RACE IS TIED!! ⬇️ ⬇️ It’s not an exaggeration to say that this race will come down to a handful of votes, and the Democrats have a head start pouring millions into this race. Every dollar we raise will make a difference between victory and defeat in a state that will determine who controls the Senate AND the Presidency. -- KEEP UP THE PRESSURE -- | Even though this race is tied, if Tammy Baldwin and Chuck Schumer outraise me during this critical stage of the campaign, they will have the advantage in November. Sincerely, Eric Hovde Republican for U.S. Senate | MEET ERIC Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others. When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his family and his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services and love to vulnerable children. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Hovde for Wisconsin

It is no longer safe to organize a protest in Louisiana, Mississippi, or Texas... who will be next?

**[We’re facing an uphill battle against extremists and an ultra-conservative court intent on undermining our rights. First step in fighting back? name: Lucas Kunce
subject: U.S. Senator Josh Hawley’s ties to the mifepristone case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
If the Supreme Court blocks access to the most commonly used abortion pill, we’ll have one man to thank.
#
Peter — last month, the United States Supreme Court heard arguments in the case to ban the most commonly used abortion pill, mifepristone, nationwide.
**This radical out-of-touch lawsuit was first ruled on by a campaign donor who Josh Hawley made a federal judge (and picked to oversee the case through “judge shopping”). It’s been led by Josh Hawley’s wife. And it’s even been directly supported by Josh Hawley’s taxpayer-funded role as U.S. Senator.**
**[FIGHT BACK: CHIP IN →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47251?refcode=em20240421-5312&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5312%2E614464%2ECmRSxb)**
They’ve been working toward this moment since 2019, when Josh Hawley was sworn into the Senate and confirmed his campaign donor, Matthew Kacsmaryk, to be a federal judge in the Northern District of Texas — despite bipartisan opposition over his bizarre obsession with controlling other people’s bodies.
Alliance Defending Freedom, the organization where Josh Hawley’s wife works as lead counsel, knew that Kacsmaryk shared their extreme views on abortion and reproductive rights. So when they filed a lawsuit, led by Josh Hawley’s wife, that aimed to restrict access to the abortion pill in all 50 states, they picked Matthew Kacsmaryk in the Northern District of Texas to be their judge.
It should come as no surprise that Kacsmaryk — Josh Hawley’s donor and judge — ignored guidance from the FDA and reproductive health experts across the country to rule in favor of the suit led by Hawley’s wife.
Hawley later used his Senate office to file an amicus brief defending the ruling.
The sequence of events is one of the clearest examples of this kind of corruption to date. **Since the ruling, federal courts have even announced a new policy to prevent this kind of “judge shopping.”**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47251?refcode=em20240421-5312&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5312%2E614464%2ECmRSxb)
**[FIGHT BACK NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47251?refcode=em20240421-5312&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5312%2E614464%2ECmRSxb)**
**This is what we’re up against in Missouri this year, Peter.**
Control-obsessed elites like Josh Hawley are willing to do whatever it takes to strip away the essential freedom for everyday people to decide if and how they can build and raise their families.
Their first step was overturning Roe v. Wade. Now they’re attacking reproductive rights across the spectrum — from enacting Missouri’s exceptionless abortion ban, to outlawing the abortion pill across the country, and now restricting access to IVF.
**This election is our one and only opportunity to hold Josh Hawley accountable, and we can’t afford to waste it.[So Peter, will you help us get this message in front of Missouri voters by rushing a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47251?refcode=em20240421-5312&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=5312%2E614464%2ECmRSxb)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47271?refcode=em20240421-5312&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=5312%2E614464%2ECmRSxb) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47271?refcode=em20240421-5312&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=5312%2E614464%2ECmRSxb) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47271?refcode=em20240421-5312&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=5312%2E614464%2ECmRSxb) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47271?refcode=em20240421-5312&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=5312%2E614464%2ECmRSxb) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47271?refcode=em20240421-5312&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=5312%2E614464%2ECmRSxb) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47271?refcode=em20240421-5312&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=5312%2E614464%2ECmRSxb) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47251?refcode=em20240421-5312&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=5312%2E614464%2ECmRSxb)
---
I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate because it’s time to put Missourians in charge of their own bodies, families, and lives. That’s why I’m fighting to codify Roe v. Wade, restore abortion access in Missouri, and protect reproductive rights across the country.
I hope I can count on your support this year, Peter.
Thanks for everything,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240421-5312-footer&t=12&refcode2=5312_614464_CmRSxb&akid=5312%2E614464%2ECmRSxb)**

So when they filed a lawsuit, led by Josh Hawley’s wife, that aimed to restrict access to the abortion pill in all 50 states, they picked Matthew Kacsmaryk in the Northern District of Texas to be their judge. It should come as no surprise that Kacsmaryk — Josh Hawley’s donor and judge — ignored guidance from the FDA and reproductive health experts across the country to rule in favor of the suit led by Hawley’s wife. Hawley later used his Senate office to file an amicus brief defending the ruling. The sequence of events is one of the clearest examples of this kind of corruption to date. Since the ruling, federal courts have even announced a new policy to prevent this kind of “judge shopping.” This is what we’re up against in Missouri this year, Peter. Control-obsessed elites like Josh Hawley are willing to do whatever it takes to strip away the essential freedom for everyday people to decide if and how they can build and raise their families. Their first step was overturning Roe v. Wade. Now they’re attacking reproductive rights across the spectrum — from enacting Missouri’s exceptionless abortion ban, to outlawing the abortion pill across the country, and now restricting access to IVF. This election is our one and only opportunity to hold Josh Hawley accountable, and we can’t afford to waste it. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate because it’s time to put Missourians in charge of their own bodies, families, and lives. That’s why I’m fighting to codify Roe v. Wade, restore abortion access in Missouri, and protect reproductive rights across the country. I hope I can count on your support this year, Peter. Thanks for everything, Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Amber Padora
subject: SCOTUS must do the right thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Hi, friend, it’s Amber Padora. Last year, a hardline Texas conservative federal judge ruled that mifepristone – a drug that has been used to aid in early abortions for over two decades – could no longer be used in the US.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=232cffc473db463f999a4371efa157ac&_e=QR09tt3qtGT0Sj9351dL_EeXktPLhf6Nji8vLOiPSNuoEPAHVj8jfjliEJzxbmvPI7LjZEbLZIb_U_8qJ0X3g-mof6t89tSAUo3-FOJ3SDmWRQ-czgIRHGQMCCs-J0tc3_aP2p81gM1oDRylBErU7yVN1vQBRRGdYy00lnXfY3GAMifuMOhCLxbqJSes25AxTJlLGq_SEYXHLo2BrpW4ZON60_XuoMCdOQeQfe4b17VpDYq4-hwADUzca3xUzYTxh03jWPMIpr6gMK6KW-UckjdVcBWyq8iLBuoBNQXCLl0tYmiwk3rxrUYXT5z50GluqayrFkgE7Sgxuh8YPH9kszjiMNU7p6EtHBIjedYMGmIYjukCMtsu5nIMeWmyLqvCcBFh9-2md7R6lGWUJ7SEdQ%3D%3D) Hi, friend, it’s Amber Padora. Last year, a hardline Texas conservative federal judge ruled that mifepristone – a drug that has been used to aid in early abortions for over two decades – **could no longer be used in the US.** This is just one more step in the GOP’s attempt to **take away the right** to an abortion and to ban the lifesaving drugs that provide women with the health care they need. It’s not about being “pro-life” – it’s about controlling women. As a mother, I fear for the future that my daughter will grow up in if this ruling is allowed to stand. What else will be on the chopping block after abortion? Contraception? More of our fundamental freedoms? I’m not waiting around to find out. _**We need to send someone to Congress who will fight to defend these basic rights. And that’s John.**_ **[John will always defend a woman’s right to choose – and if sent to Washington, he will ensure Mifepristone is available across the country. Please support his campaign and help us protect abortion rights by donating today.?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=232cffc473db463f999a4371efa157ac&_e=QR09tt3qtGT0Sj9351dL_EeXktPLhf6Nji8vLOiPSNuoEPAHVj8jfjliEJzxbmvPI7LjZEbLZIb_U_8qJ0X3g-mof6t89tSAUo3-FOJ3SDmWRQ-czgIRHGQMCCs-J0tc3_aP2p81gM1oDRylBErU7yVN1vQBRRGdYy00lnXfY3GAMifuMOhCLxbqJSes25AxTJlLGq_SEYXHLo2BrpW4ZON60_XuoMCdOQeQfe4b17VpDYq4-hwADUzca3xUzYTxP7SBwdVGu0ecR3L17T5Ao--08M9w-FJEfZP1iMDSHnjeXQQV6yzJrxxmQ2yvMf9g0PIPVM2tyFwS04pM7jBy2YeYcxgMMs7D6TLsmJbC7jZBvQLKfxh8cJvwJlsoDYIAxdPkc7s1sw3kL-BF42pVBQ%3D%3D)** If a right-wing federal judge can decide to ban an abortion drug, and that ruling can help to ban the drug nationwide, who is to stop an anti-vax judge from doing the same thing for a vaccine or any other life-saving drug? If a judge can ban a drug that’s been in use for over twenty years, who is to stop a judge from banning contraceptives altogether? We will not live in a country in which ONE radical judge can ban a safe drug with decades of previous approval and use. John will see to that in Washington. **[Rush a donation to help him continue the fight.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=232cffc473db463f999a4371efa157ac&_e=QR09tt3qtGT0Sj9351dL_EeXktPLhf6Nji8vLOiPSNuoEPAHVj8jfjliEJzxbmvPI7LjZEbLZIb_U_8qJ0X3g-mof6t89tSAUo3-FOJ3SDmWRQ-czgIRHGQMCCs-J0tc3_aP2p81gM1oDRylBErU7yVN1vQBRRGdYy00lnXfY3GAMifuMOhCLxbqJSes25AxTJlLGq_SEYXHLo2BrpW4ZON60_XuoMCdOQeQfe4b17VpDYq4-hwADUzca3xUzYTxleHt1_uEYafX-TCEYDKXedZnZYikxf6GCS5uFerXSgEbF6mbc4O36PiixtPYhtVAH-94ivZ_U7zpByhO_schyjMhNAgB1K9RyXRQ1C-9Yz4wsPB3l_g__w2gg-XE7Wir1zKIbo3byCw3vRkbMuqRhw%3D%3D)** Thank you for being on our team, Amber [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=232cffc473db463f999a4371efa157ac&_e=QR09tt3qtGT0Sj9351dL_EeXktPLhf6Nji8vLOiPSNuoEPAHVj8jfjliEJzxbmvPI7LjZEbLZIb_U_8qJ0X3g-mof6t89tSAUo3-FOJ3SDmWRQ-czgIRHGQMCCs-J0tc3_aP2p81gM1oDRylBErU7yVN1vQBRRGdYy00lnXfY3GAMifuMOhCLxbqJSes25AxTJlLGq_SEYXHLo2BrpW4ZON60_XuoMCdOQeQfe4b17VpDYq4-hwADUzca3xUzYTxPLO0762BsxbK1hfDH4yHaBLuHJVGaXYuEOFR5OVYQJl_O_0hWXnrWbDqdVXo6JM4XM6YCSOIY4Dkkx6HuUFI0rY4hvGNZCgxOzm0USj9HBVL1VA6Yoq_ziMSUStG7hEO_KLK0pauM9E5yhfT6NCP4g%3D%3D) I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CD-04. clean_body: Hi, friend, it’s Amber Padora. Last year, a hardline Texas conservative federal judge ruled that mifepristone – a drug that has been used to aid in early abortions for over two decades – could no longer be used in the US. | | | Hi, friend, it’s Amber Padora. Last year, a hardline Texas conservative federal judge ruled that mifepristone – a drug that has been used to aid in early abortions for over two decades – could no longer be used in the US. This is just one more step in the GOP’s attempt to take away the right to an abortion and to ban the lifesaving drugs that provide women with the health care they need. It’s not about being “pro-life” – it’s about controlling women. As a mother, I fear for the future that my daughter will grow up in if this ruling is allowed to stand. What else will be on the chopping block after abortion? Contraception? More of our fundamental freedoms? I’m not waiting around to find out. We need to send someone to Congress who will fight to defend these basic rights. And that’s John. If a right-wing federal judge can decide to ban an abortion drug, and that ruling can help to ban the drug nationwide, who is to stop an anti-vax judge from doing the same thing for a vaccine or any other life-saving drug? If a judge can ban a drug that’s been in use for over twenty years, who is to stop a judge from banning contraceptives altogether? We will not live in a country in which ONE radical judge can ban a safe drug with decades of previous approval and use. John will see to that in Washington. Thank you for being on our team, Amber I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CD-04. Lauren Boebert recently jumped into my district in a desperate attempt to stay in DC. My campaign is powered by grassroots donations - donate anything you can monthly to keep Boebert OUT of this seat. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: We cannot let this go unchallenged
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83430434/468382360/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240421_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjYxNmQ3YS1lN2ZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j1-5lJUHj_H0kSh8gAOHa9YINGo5Djm37RJxRgSp42Y=&emci=ab24b9be-29ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=db616d7a-e7ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=15529135) | Friend — Jahana is not like most representatives that you will find in Congress. Her story is one of achievement despite the odds and overcoming the obstacles that so many people face. Growing up in the cycle of poverty and addiction, she found herself pregnant at 17. She had her daughter, went back to school, received multiple degrees, reached the pinnacle of teaching, and now sits in Congress. Education helped save her life, which is why she is a fierce advocate for equitable access to educational opportunities for all students and families. She understands that education provides a foundation for economic stability and the beginnings of a lifelong capacity for empathy, compassion, and generosity. Having been in the classroom for over a decade, she also understands that college is not for everyone so we need to provide multiple pathways to success as part of the K-12 experience. But right now, our public schools are in need of robust investment — to remedy inequities, provide much needed resources, and support students, teachers and staff. Since being elected in 2018, she has actively advocated to make higher education and workforce readiness more accessible, affordable, and equitable. She has championed legislation to lower costs for students and support technical and apprenticeship programs. **Jahana knows we cannot mistake our progress for victory, though.** Backed by extreme MAGA Republicans, her opponent would ground our progress to a halt if he successfully defeats Jahana and flips this seat red. **To keep up her work fighting for all of the people of CT-05, just like she fought for every student in her classroom as a public school teacher, she will need your support:** [**Before our April 24th filing deadline, will you make a donation to help send Jahana back to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83430436/468382362/-1149761541?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240421_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjYxNmQ3YS1lN2ZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j1-5lJUHj_H0kSh8gAOHa9YINGo5Djm37RJxRgSp42Y=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83430439/468382365/-2115183998?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240421_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjYxNmQ3YS1lN2ZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j1-5lJUHj_H0kSh8gAOHa9YINGo5Djm37RJxRgSp42Y=)

clean_body: | | Friend — Jahana is not like most representatives that you will find in Congress. Her story is one of achievement despite the odds and overcoming the obstacles that so many people face. Growing up in the cycle of poverty and addiction, she found herself pregnant at 17. She had her daughter, went back to school, received multiple degrees, reached the pinnacle of teaching, and now sits in Congress. Education helped save her life, which is why she is a fierce advocate for equitable access to educational opportunities for all students and families. She understands that education provides a foundation for economic stability and the beginnings of a lifelong capacity for empathy, compassion, and generosity. Having been in the classroom for over a decade, she also understands that college is not for everyone so we need to provide multiple pathways to success as part of the K-12 experience. But right now, our public schools are in need of robust investment — to remedy inequities, provide much needed resources, and support students, teachers and staff. Since being elected in 2018, she has actively advocated to make higher education and workforce readiness more accessible, affordable, and equitable. She has championed legislation to lower costs for students and support technical and apprenticeship programs. Jahana knows we cannot mistake our progress for victory, though. Backed by extreme MAGA Republicans, her opponent would ground our progress to a halt if he successfully defeats Jahana and flips this seat red. To keep up her work fighting for all of the people of CT-05, just like she fought for every student in her classroom as a public school teacher, she will need your support: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. ---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! Jill and I have fond memories of taking our kids and grandkids to Rehoboth Beach in Delaware. There’s just no better way to spend a hot summer day than with your toes in the sand, looking out at the ocean.
That’s why we wanted to extend that experience to a lucky supporter like you! When you’re done with your beach day, you’ll get the chance to cool off and enjoy some ice cream with Jill and me.

name: Bernie Moreno
subject: I ‘shouldn’t be a Senator’
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate<-
body:
Fellow Patriot,

Recently, the Never Trumpers at _The Washington Post_ published a column stating I don’t deserve to win this race in Ohio and that I shouldn’t be a U.S. Senator... _over my support for President Trump._

If there’s one thing I’ve learned over the last few years, it’s that if _The Washington Post_ says it, _ \*\*you know it can’t be trusted!\*\* _

\*\*I 100% support and endorse President Donald J. Trump, and he 100% supports and endorses me in this race, but we both need you to step in as well. ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5411159.2352.1.5b88e3064c7eb7c3e3449ada62e32562 )\*\*

We need to win the Senate _and_ the White House to end the madness coming out of Washington and start putting America First again.

-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5411159.2353.1.8616b6aa55069ebd357c73d7bf314fb1 )<-

\*\*Will you stand with President Trump and me by splitting a donation of $20, $40, $60, or more between our two campaigns?\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5411159.2354.1.9f77e9bb3d76af5c3b9ae371af4ca37f )

Your support will ensure we can win back a Senate majority that can work with a White House once again led by Pres. Trump.

The liberal elites and their fake news allies will do everything they possibly can to extend the suffering of American families and keep our nation woke and weak.

\*\*Please rush your support now to help President Trump and me fight back and restore America First leadership in Washington.\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5411159.2355.1.1003aa2162fed4dcee603f4d6ce077b8 )

-> \*\*_Split A Donation Between Bernie And Pres. Trump »_\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5411159.2356.1.394390838fc35977f79d5580d40b4c86 )<-

Thank you,

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5411159.2357.1.323140999e196d1cb0a654690003186d )

Bernie Moreno

GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio

->

\*\*Meet Bernie Moreno:\*\*

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5411159.2358.1.78b53051730920d04359bd30e67dda86 ) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

-> \*\* Join Bernie ➞ \*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5411159.2359.1.230e74480cd13b486c8fd1d4d7a0ff49 )<-

<-

-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5411159.2348.1.1a515e93846cb1f2c5c0fa46aebe083d )<-

->

\*\*FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA\*\*

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5411159.2349.1.427bb34a44f0de8aee0649367b2975a8 ) ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5411159.2350.1.92f062436abbf6db4f562b5389d3b643 ) ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5411159.2351.1.c2ca6ac5fb63a16ae5ccd603d7be0edb )

The liberal elites and their fake news allies will do everything they possibly can to extend the suffering of American families and keep our nation woke and weak. \\Please rush your support now to help President Trump and me fight back and restore America First leadership in Washington.\\ ( ) -> \\Split A Donation Between Bernie And Pres. Trump »\\ ( )<- Thank you, ( ) Bernie Moreno GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio -> \\Meet Bernie Moreno:\\ ( ) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. -> \\ Join Bernie ➞ \\ ( )<- <- -> ( )<- -> \\FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA\\ ( ) ( ) ( ) <- -> -> ->Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate<- <- <- ->

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Bergman's betrayal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
"Lorinser blasts Bergman for his 'lack of integrity, honesty, and wisdom' after vote against Ukraine"
Last night, we witnessed a stark reminder of why integrity, honesty, and wisdom are not just virtues, but absolute necessities in our leaders.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext]
As Rep. Bergman was voting against world stability and democracy, I was at an event and talked with 'Yoopers for Ukraine'.
The passage of aid for Ukraine is a signal of hope, but our representative's opposition is a betrayal of a promise.
Help me defeat Jack Bergman.
MAKE A CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext]
Friends,
Last night, we witnessed a stark reminder of why integrity, honesty, and wisdom are not just virtues, but absolute necessities in our leaders.
Rep. Bergman's vote against aiding Ukraine speaks volumes about the representation we lack, the values he cannot uphold, and the leadership Michigan's 1st District does not have.
Let's be clear. Integrity isn't just a word to toss around; it's a promise to uphold the values we profess. When our elected officials claim to support Ukraine's fight for survival but fail to back it with action, they betray that promise.
Honesty matters. After hearing promises he would, the constituency expected Bergman to stand against tyrants like Putin, not enable them with a vote that undermines our principles and global security.
Wisdom is the ability to discern right from wrong, even in the face of political pressure. The consequences of neglecting Ukraine are dire, not just for them but for our nation's security and the entire world's stability.
As someone who has dedicated years to international diplomacy, I can attest that we cannot afford to abandon our allies. Doing so only emboldens our adversaries, putting us all at risk.
This isn't about partisan politics. It's about fundamental principles. Americans deserve leaders they can trust who will uphold their promises and prioritize the safety and security of our nation above all else.
Last night, Rep. Bergman failed us. But, let it be a rallying cry for us all. We must demand better, hold our leaders accountable, and never waver in our commitment to doing what's right, even when it's difficult.
Let's ensure that America stands strong with leaders who embody the integrity, honesty, and wisdom that define us as a nation.
Friends, will you help me replace Jack Bergman so we can have a representative who prioritize world stability, national security, and democracy over partisan politics? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext]
Thank you.
-Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for U.S. Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

Howdy friend,
Ted Cruz is up for reelection, and we think it’s about time we kick him out of office once and for all.
From taking vacations while thousands of Texans lost electricity and water to literally reading _Green Eggs and Ham_ to filibuster the Affordable Care Act, Ted Cruz has proven again and again that _he doesn’t care about Texas_.

Since 2013, he’s been too busy serving his corporate donors to make life better for all of us. body:
FYI

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=19224763a3804a4aa7eb8e88e89d7a05&_e=awOn1Uw-nfOhRVQepZG7JmOs8A3lBJe4gtN_VQ0mrY6SauNrxOEyCGxmXqvaVVcF3Dt2z_Xiq2tU8tgDhT-Wfw1SyLHk1yurAj4o8_DLLfPeaubFYIQjRFRvJ6FVNwC0I-JasOPLgEatZgeNJut92VuueuzPGqocilQwVFtJ6fymO7dzyCdcQwUcBtCTVdi-IiT-BjR9W-82y-IhqadPVymBOD8fgKLXKnsJGdpDcSg1crCm056AYHja9M6-EZscn_ecj3XzjxIYqgWFM7J8oVELoM_rU_YOgbvZjPECFz6ZushoR-6_hgUI8yYS5oAWy88EWWe4dTlcX8h4Vk19zkz1-mrR6dXETtkW2ZCx84rCGImpnK04dfbHtlTyZG65V4qUOtVJIhcjajpVXeGbelZUVcbcGEevnNqvoMVYZ_4%3D)

I emailed you.

I texted you.

Now, I’m reaching back out because my opponent raised SEVEN MILLION last quarter, and we can’t afford to lag behind his fundraising efforts.

_**It’s not all bad news. We showed strong numbers, too. But right now, the circumstances are requiring me to take action; we need to do just a little more.**_

More than 90% of my donations came from donors like yourself, who put your money where your mouth was and donated ANYTHING they could spare. It’s because of YOUR HELP that we’ll beat Ruben in November, but I have a HUGE fundraising deadline coming up that we can’t afford to miss.

We need people in Washington that the swamp hates, and their least favorite person in the entire nation is...

Me, Kari Lake.

| | | Peter,

This is shocking: **[over 36,912 Chinese Nationals have been spotted at our border trying to get into America.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=02bcc7149b8a480581b35acb5bf7a466&_e=dBmrl0LpS0L2Rn1_C_2lcdQhRHMGHGD4FPhx0mUck7C1EFUwEMjohrP3WGHlArC3Cfn27zvKX2gJv3epF-ISis3sWVFl0Nfx3KD0v2Ij23lUr2J7pGCKeju1-AK9tNJUsb9JV4jFZC_pp2P8Yjl3vGNouMTHs67zdEfPPVjSd93DHih38MskAoGQ9m1e3cS5NuWT9I0N8DuTH85tIjxu1_PzCAi1C_xlabF1xkFGKt86SX5yK6_yQh3ZG6dSf4uLavTBOOT4xljDn0PQIDZPDcPZ89LN9ct8bnG92jY8MgvJ5U1_8SmJ6uIOavlGy2djrF86MhxYlWWY2lazZSKfda5XAFDcA6cuEizoGRT6bfhDEzk4DOnkUlmTtm7oGTvzjUFGBrlcPQ9e-FeeAFxrzA%3D%3D) **

**These include known Chinese Communist Party members.**

_And what has Secretary Mayorkas done about it?_

This is ridiculous, and Secretary Mayorkas is claiming there’s “nothing he can do” while our border descends into chaos.

**Make no mistake: He and Joe Biden are the reasons our border is wide open.**

We’ve asked him to do his job. We’ve told him about the crime spreading throughout our country because of illegal criminals invading through the Southern Border. **He either doesn’t listen or doesn’t care.**

**There is no other option: it’s time to impeach Secretary Mayorkas and remove him from office IMMEDIATELY.**

**[**If you want to see him GONE and secure our border once and for all, add your name today to DEMAND his impeachment.**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=02bcc7149b8a480581b35acb5bf7a466&_e=dBmrl0LpS0L2Rn1_C_2lcdQhRHMGHGD4FPhx0mUck7C1EFUwEMjohrP3WGHlArC3Cfn27zvKX2gJv3epF-ISis3sWVFl0Nfx3KD0v2Ij23lUr2J7pGCKeju1-AK9tNJUsb9JV4jFZC_pp2P8Yjl3vGNouMTHs67zdEfPPVjSd93DHih38MskAoGQ9m1e3cS5NuWT9I0N8DuTH85tIjxu1_PzCAi1C_xlabF1xkFGKt8hqS0LTPPN50qIEr_SNZYSdLflV_eHuP9bVWb5V6cMYWLbF1k6t7zybjE39C4G_aZ6WKtb12Ja-HanI_hTkKBHUEKTBZThkvqAxheSby1zXkrSxJtoyqplIMLyyX1fu3KD0xRYkfHB7TBCqoAPMO2yehfZE2qahwT45-RmwyuZIg%3D%3D)**

body:
The GOP will pull out all the stops to try to flip PA-08, and we need to be equally prepared to defend our seat.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83435858/468400543/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGYxMDc2Ni1mMGZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FLoxRoraI-be7y1M9ss4doRVRdZ_XpTImty3Z9b8-_c=&emci=ffbb8e3f-a3fd-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=08f10766-f0ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

As we gear up for Tuesday’s primary election, we wanted to look ahead and prepare you for what comes next. After the primary, all of our efforts will be focused on the general election, and **we need to make sure we're ready for the challenges ahead.**

Here's what we can expect:
1. A massive influx of **dark money** flooding into our district funding advertisements and GOP outreach.
2. **More visits from top national Republican figures** rallying their base behind Matt's opponent.
3. All eyes in the national media on us as this "toss-up" race unfolds. **The outcome of this election could determine the future of our country, and it's up to us to show the nation that PA-08 stands behind Matt.**

But here's the good news: **Matt is ready for this tough fight.** He knows how to win, and he's determined to continue fighting for the people of PA-08 in Congress. All he needs is for you to have his back.

**The GOP will pull out all the stops to try to flip PA-08, and we need to be equally prepared to defend our seat.** We must counter the impending attacks and misleading messages to ensure voters are well-informed by Election Day.

[**Will you chip in $10 to help us hit the ground running on April 24th and start the general election strong?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83435859/468400544/-995738445?refcode=em24_240421_prifr3_fnd_gq_act___chq_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240421_prifr3_fnd_gq_act___chq_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode2=08f10766-f0ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGYxMDc2Ni1mMGZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FLoxRoraI-be7y1M9ss4doRVRdZ_XpTImty3Z9b8-_c=) clean_body: The GOP will pull out all the stops to try to flip PA-08, and we need to be equally prepared to defend our seat. | Peter, As we gear up for Tuesday’s primary election, we wanted to look ahead and prepare you for what comes next. After the primary, all of our efforts will be focused on the general election, and we need to make sure we're ready for the challenges ahead. Here's what we can expect: 1. A massive influx of dark money flooding into our district funding advertisements and GOP outreach. 2. More visits from top national Republican figures rallying their base behind Matt's opponent. 3. All eyes in the national media on us as this "toss-up" race unfolds. The outcome of this election could determine the future of our country, and it's up to us to show the nation that PA-08 stands behind Matt. But here's the good news: Matt is ready for this tough fight. He knows how to win, and he's determined to continue fighting for the people of PA-08 in Congress. All he needs is for you to have his back. The GOP will pull out all the stops to try to flip PA-08, and we need to be equally prepared to defend our seat. We must counter the impending attacks and misleading messages to ensure voters are well-informed by Election Day. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks, Cartwright HQ In 2022, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. He's gearing up for another tough re-election, and he needs your support to keep PA-08 blue. name: David Hogg
subject: Ashwin Ramaswami is a Leader We Deserve
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Ashwin is incredible — he’s a 24 year old software engineer who worked with the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency to secure our elections.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240421-1&t=1&akid=584%2E587540%2Ep1paAr)
Peter,
A couple weeks ago we rolled out our first slate of endorsements in the 2024 elections. Since then I’ve been shining the spotlight on each of them one by one, and today it’s time to introduce you to **Ashwin Ramaswami** , who’s not only running for the Georgia State Senate but RUNNING AGAINST ONE OF TRUMP'S FAKE ELECTORS (I can’t believe that’s true but it is).
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240421-1?refcode=em20240421-1&amount=5&refcode2=584_587540_p1paAr&akid=584%2E587540%2Ep1paAr)
[**Pitch in $5 to help us make sure he wins →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240421-1?refcode=em20240421-1&amount=5&refcode2=584_587540_p1paAr&akid=584%2E587540%2Ep1paAr)
Ashwin is a 24 year old software engineer who worked with the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency starting in 2020 to secure states’ election systems across the country. **So he knows what it’s like protecting our elections from threats. Now he’s running against one.**
He went to Stanford where he studied computer science and is in his final year of law school at Georgetown. In that time he’s worked at the Georgia Attorney General's office and worked as an engineer and consultant for multiple tech companies.
Instead of going to work at a major tech company, Ashwin has decided to follow the path of public service and it’s certainly not because of the $23,000 a year salary that legislators are paid in GA. It’s because he loves his community and wants to protect it from his current state senator who is one of Trump's fake electors. Ashwin also happens to be in the most competitive state Senate district in Georgia. So we thought why not send a clear message to Trump and all of his cult followers that Gen-Z is mad as hell and we aren’t gonna take it anymore.
We’re going all out to help Ashwin and our other endorsed candidates win this November — but we can’t do any of our work without your grassroots support.
[**As a grassroots organization, we don’t take corporate donations. Can we count on you to pitch in $5 today to help us make sure Ashwin and all of our endorsed candidates WIN on Election Day?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240421-1?refcode=em20240421-1&amount=5&refcode2=584_587540_p1paAr&akid=584%2E587540%2Ep1paAr)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240421-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240421-1-584&refcode2=584_587540_p1paAr&akid=584%2E587540%2Ep1paAr)**
Thanks,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20240421-1&t=2&refcode2=584_587540_p1paAr&akid=584%2E587540%2Ep1paAr)**

clean_body: It’s not an exaggeration to say that this race will come down to a handful of votes, and the Democrats have a head start pouring millions into this race. | Fellow Conservative, THIS RACE IS TIED!! ⬇️ ⬇️ It’s not an exaggeration to say that this race will come down to a handful of votes, and the Democrats have a head start pouring millions into this race. Every dollar we raise will make a difference between victory and defeat in a state that will determine who controls the Senate AND the Presidency. -- KEEP UP THE PRESSURE -- | Even though this race is tied, if Tammy Baldwin and Chuck Schumer outraise me during this critical stage of the campaign, they will have the advantage in November. Sincerely, Eric Hovde Republican for U.S. Senate | MEET ERIC Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others. When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his family and his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services and love to vulnerable children. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Hovde for Wisconsin

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: I'm hoping you'll let me tell you a story, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
the hope of achieving our American Dream
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83436663/468402828/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1110-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTU1NTI0M2MtZjFmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yqRm-WDW8YVwz0KTJl-yYHvO5__GqpCiDEiiDTFfEUA=)
Hi there, friend, it's Debbie. If you don't know me already, I'm the Democrat running to defeat Sen. Rick Scott in Florida.
I'm about to ask you to make a donation to support my grassroots campaign. But first, I'm hoping you'll let me tell you a story about doughnuts and the American Dream. [**(If you're short on time and ready to chip in, you can click here to help me flip Florida blue!)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83436664/468402829/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1110-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTU1NTI0M2MtZjFmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yqRm-WDW8YVwz0KTJl-yYHvO5__GqpCiDEiiDTFfEUA=)
When I was 14 years old, my mother, my sisters, and I left our home in Ecuador in the hope of achieving our American Dream. As I adjusted to life and high school in a new country, my mom worked double shifts to support our family. But even still, it was a struggle to pay the bills and afford rent for our small, one room apartment.
When I turned 15, I got a job at a local doughnut shop. **It was hard work, but it's what my family needed to make ends meet.**
I'm not the only one who got their start in the doughnut business. When he was a young man, my opponent, Rick Scott, **_bought_** two doughnut shops.

While I was a teen making minimum wage to help keep the lights on at home, Rick Scott was an owner.

**For me, the doughnuts represent a lifeline that helped my family afford rent. ****For Rick Scott, they represent the beginning of his private corporate career.**
I went on to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress. Rick Scott went on to oversee the largest Medicare fraud in the nation’s history, amass a fortune of hundreds of millions, and buy a Senate seat.

If you ask me, our differing stories in the doughnut business make the differences between us pretty clear.
**I know we can win — and new polling data shows our campaign 4 points ahead! But Rick Scott spent $64 million to buy this seat in 2018 and has already written _six-figure_ personal checks to his campaign this time around.** **[I can't win this race without your help. So please, if you have anything to spare, will you rush $5 now to defeat Rick Scott and give Floridians the leadership they deserve?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83436665/468402830/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1110-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTU1NTI0M2MtZjFmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yqRm-WDW8YVwz0KTJl-yYHvO5__GqpCiDEiiDTFfEUA=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83436666/468402831/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk1110-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTU1NTI0M2MtZjFmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yqRm-WDW8YVwz0KTJl-yYHvO5__GqpCiDEiiDTFfEUA=)

Debbie

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Folks,

I’m more nervous than a cat in a room full of rocking chairs.

I reached out the other day about how I won’t be able to hold down the front lines much longer without the resources and support from strong conservatives like yourself.

A LOT of my supporters responded, but I was just alerted – you still have not.

My request is simple. I just need $1 from you, Friend.

If you feel up to the task of pitching in, you can do so here: **[[LINK]](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=9030cf3b8b9a4c588d0a81d70bce24bf&_e=BXhGWM3Mx2trYS0sVi2CFQNlITCYD4Pwke2k_gXmPHE0nF0Fnv58UuIsE0rBdOOadcts6ujHEummHAYn2l2ryhe0vDXy6n_M_RhrJJi-NDfBJ0duPMS8fWW0D063cPHKyyH6JyjrssciwDc7zfkosd2GAxk_dbNDxbQKEA3lbL6CeFrrSpdCzM1CxtChSOhxajTU5gYheaWu1ShG0yCUYdW550FDOUYckNK8bnOH9gkccmrZAFCuW_mveSRiiafSGdsDWDIjJ09xpSB30KoIHr-no-cmOhlX5ACJEJj7yWy4PWUUudhg0oKkJnQJ1orLgElg1rAmntDMbjZC05YKLWpViaOLz1WpspJciqizgqOaaeBTygoqPseQG0J9cOmk)**
