I'm up a creek without a paddle, and my pirogue just sprung a huge leak.

I'm giving it all I got to stand up for you and our Conservative values, but everywhere I turn, there are more and more of them woke loonies.

I can manage to hold down the front lines, but I won’t be able to much longer without the resources and support from strong, conservative patriots like yourself.

Friend, even if you can chip in $1, it’ll go a long way in eliminating woke ideologies from the halls of our government!

I won’t take up any more of your precious time, but just know I rely on folks like you who are willing to do what it takes to preserve American Freedom!

Senator Kennedy

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Our race is tied
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Hi Derek,
Tammy Baldwin here with an important update:

A new poll shows that my Senate race in Wisconsin is TIED.

My megamillionaire Republican opponent is gaining ground in Wisconsin —
and fast.

First, he plastered Wisconsin’s airwaves with more than $3 million worth
of ads. Then, the Republican primary field cleared for Hovde, giving him
more than 7 uninterrupted months to campaign against me.

Now, the latest polling has us statistically tied.

Republicans are going all in to flip this seat red, and we can’t expect
him to let up. Eric Hovde has pledged to self-fund at least $20 million of
his own personal fortune to defeat me, and he’s on pace to spend even more
than that.

Look, unlike my wealthy opponent, I can’t self-fund this campaign. I don’t
have right-wing dark money groups or GOP megadonors who can spend a
fortune to tilt the scales in my favor.

Instead, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me fight
back. We need your help to reach undecided voters, keep our ads on the
air, and make sure Hovde’s attacks don’t go unanswered.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2247?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20240421_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TammyBaldwinsplit_TammyBaldwin_NA_mmfr.1.3&t=1001&akid=6689%2E1827488%2EjSLkgE ]Will you split a donation between Tony Evers and my campaign today to
help me win this toss-up Senate race? All eyes will be on how we respond
to this polling update.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately.

clean_body: | Hi Peter, I wanted to make sure you had the chance to take my and share your thoughts. Do you have a couple of minutes to answer a few questions for me now? Or, if you’ve already completed the survey, consider forwarding it to a friend so they can pass along their input. | It’s important to me and my team to hear from as many people as possible so we can consider all points of view on the issues affecting our communities. Thanks for your help, Roy Begin forwarded message: \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Cooper Date: Apr 12, 2024 Subject: Peter, will you take our Spring Priorities Survey? Do you have just a few minutes to do us a favor, Peter? --- We’re hoping for at least 500 responses before next Monday. It shouldn’t take more than a couple minutes of your time. Thanks so much, Team Cooper = --- = North Carolina is set to be one of the most important swing states in the 2024 elections. Republicans need to win NC to return Donald Trump to the White House. Meanwhile, Roy is committed to flipping our state blue for President Biden. Roy is term-limited and can’t run again this time, and our upcoming gubernatorial election is considered the most competitive gubernatorial contest in the country. Meanwhile, Republicans hold just one-seat supermajorities in both chambers of the state legislature — we MUST break the supermajorities to prevent the GOP from enacting their radical agenda in North Carolina. = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
When it comes to expanding Democrats’ Senate majority, these are three names you need to know. | |
---
Derek, Ted Cruz. Rick Scott. Josh Hawley. When it comes to _expanding_ Democrats’ Senate majority, these are three names you need to know. All three of these MAGA extremists are up for reelection this year, which means we have an opportunity to defeat all three of them -- but only if we have the resources to reach voters across Texas, Florida, Missouri and elsewhere as early as possible. **That’s where this grassroots team comes in. So we’re asking:[Can you make a $7 contribution to our Democratic Momentum Fund now to help Democrats expand our Senate majority, so we can keep building on the progress we’ve made by electing Democrats nationwide up and down the ballot?](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtZhEPIBZhuriKFStUT1aLziydVecZLPAiX_XBvBjCR5AdM7_1gQI0qiyLtHFNxGoELRpkX-xMNl_A-i8IJy9_PzBfhUW3jYTlUiHobuWeuG65qguwt7lnCYobn1BJV64vutn_MF07DehvevesyhnsTtEzpbCFYCJNzOUKfc5Dq4qaZHWAyrbMMhrxsu1XSFALKMYf4b0SRPnnrSXUPqBKwj1C37eJJjD3SNwQ9vdpicHZMSFGFUOQVWdsDdawUupOelyOZKqwe3im0hyNy4i3pUiO_Ppvj6WKxLrZo1ZHh0hZOyoLgSaauLOn8GIJ5sF-iPc04OmysED7kVG9SVvtaK1LNcCKnqfFo80t98h5a8pmkLVjjYzPvJUIUKmoJLi5Enna1m973cQEzOm3GBjtNw3WOP0TKHb870a2c1M1myBRy1QT4zDORFAUHQF6zEMbYpeNl_raZNTHTRzZscVi8FJGk-sI8HA4xDEdGGuwQ_XMYtMkYajA_iUtBnmcEAKpocwz0OHAu3xQUn7-ht2WAw/45p/nDbnpoKZRjuKkyCsx_Aopg/h0/h001.MhTK5N_NAJWegC_sV2PzTbgEgTDzYGn0B7IHnnVnI4I)**

body:
Here at GIFFORDS, our guiding light is hope.
#

Hi there, we hope you’re having a relaxing Sunday.
We don’t want to take up too much of your time today, [**but we’re humbly asking you to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC if you’re able to.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr24.Y_Rik7&refcode=em240421-1-30&t=1&akid=7980%2E3935704%2Evz7i9P)
Here’s why:
The power dynamics within the gun lobby are changing. The NRA is a shell of the organization it once was, and now the National Shooting Sports Foundation (NSSF) has begun their climb to become the new face of the gun lobby.
Just like the NRA, the NSSF promotes a message of fear to sell more guns and maximize profits for gun manufacturers. They push a false narrative that everyone is the enemy, and that you should always be on the offensive.
This school of thought is killing people.
While the gun lobby uses fear-mongering tactics to push their “guns everywhere” agenda, here at GIFFORDS, our guiding light is hope. That’s because we know that with commonsense gun safety legislation, our communities **can** be safer from gun violence.
We saw our hope in action just last week when President Biden finalized a rule to bring us closer to universal background checks than we’ve ever been before.
We have dared to dream that a better future is possible. And because of that, real tangible progress has been made in our movement to end gun violence. From the landmark Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, to hundreds of state bills, and historic funding for community violence intervention, your support has yielded results.
[**But the fight is far from over. It’s going to take all of us using our collective voice to stand up to the NSSF as they try to tear down our movement for gun safety. So please, make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to stand with us in this crucial fight.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr24.Y_Rik7&refcode=em240421-1-30&t=2&akid=7980%2E3935704%2Evz7i9P)

As a daughter of a former union meatcutter, having been unhoused, a low-wage worker and a mother of two, Congresswoman Cori Bush knows the struggles our communities face on a daily basis. Since being elected to Congress in 2020, she’s proudly fought for regular, everyday people. However, Republicans in Congress are more concerned with increasing **tax cuts** for billionaires and corporations than expanding food assistance programs for millions of children and families. It’s time to put an end to our rigged system. Tax the rich. Tax corporations. Fund our communities. And side with working families! **[Sign on now, and join us in demanding Congress side with us and tax corporations fairly >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJaAnbHSqO70zhlgIAo17N_AIAKtnUnpgOGjGnyCzyfgeLi_9YiwDxnQIw9qgZ71L2yv1dWepYwq8xbTo4n_82jc_joEOgs1lVD21_lNWf3c-GBUOWv4sp8bRLr4tMlLP8vP34Afwo_nbZjLoJF86Mm6zeU4zl_aLxUgEvB6RqQ_hcJD07u-LmMs7SCOD8HA9FHqjEBA-870Xu6Ods2PfvLNDL_8JtKU3yoS5ZUJ1tRI2JQoAKFybXDNzFIhMj4zf26RhOvJpTW34VKULDskgm-ZN2M4OAmED-6CKIzvFJkb1IHhnAyZHhBCq6AhLljn5vgGRYcp_b3S4Mc4DONdguMdNsUfhf758-pVKpJF82Jsr4dHLARCwKDhdjRK8T0pnghontRgoH_dMOrpqR2QPGhraU29x3I6YcX2F1kddluKnKAX5uaZt-qWOi4v4JKcsTjIX-vLOCGDYTvla7ypmKVWuNyBitgnpUXdLcioaScVt0xgqJqczQmvD6ypwLJsMXJYdvATkT1BPuhqLxQ2a3xA/45p/KPpaeuIuQUyRjlw2-CXC0Q/h6/h001.PQXjsAUWZLwJiv2utP-86tw6cfZzEmuapvrgQJs8Hwo)**

As a frontline Ferguson activist, a formerly unhoused single mother of two, a nurse, a survivor, and a pastor, Congresswoman Cori Bush knows the struggles our communities face on a daily basis. In 2020, she defeated a 52-year political dynasty on a mission to save lives; in 2022, St. Louis sent her back to Congress with a strong mandate to champion racial, economic, reproductive, gender, health, and environmental justice.
Now, Cori is running for re-election to continue doing the most for everyone, starting with those who have the greatest need. **[Join Team Cori today >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu2opHxbrdLylj8Xz4KZ1hRY9Bj1CaqijIXCDlo6e7EAY38HYPPPPDkoI3R4S75UJTpBfoQU7ZVMMTH6-mxTcd7GvE-35rpe3JgNzAIEXazH9O1yh_6Nh_Ijp9qv_6OvAFS7DRXuTUXdK9xYeZ1Rzo92nX7sHqohU1QLLsB2ipKSGpkx3sb2GIXw4ZtYLfAsonn0-q7CXFUqDK-WQDCPxQ-jPVaNbATxEbw2AgK6T4NfTSFPloz-VnkZegQqNI4dMaeyIHmfIRmhVZnX_2cVOk8UPld_Vqeo4HR3jn9cludP_O18OR9lSolV0VJS35fS5s/45p/KPpaeuIuQUyRjlw2-CXC0Q/h9/h001.rmrh-lEvfRPzlnVLmYlGGR6ha8ilCt9DireLbkEYpIk)**

clean_body: | | Peter, ...Did you know that if you filed your taxes this year, you’re paying more federal income taxes than Nike, FedEx and corporations paid in 2020? And between the years of , 35 major U.S. corporations — including famous names like Ford, Netflix and Tesla — paid less in federal income taxes than they paid their top five executives. It’s time corporations pay their fair share. As a daughter of a former union meatcutter, having been unhoused, a low-wage worker and a mother of two, Congresswoman Cori Bush knows the struggles our communities face on a daily basis. Since being elected to Congress in 2020, she’s proudly fought for regular, everyday people. However, Republicans in Congress are more concerned with increasing tax cuts for billionaires and corporations than expanding food assistance programs for millions of children and families. It’s time to put an end to our rigged system. Tax the rich. Tax corporations. Fund our communities. And side with working families! In solidarity, Team Cori | | As a frontline Ferguson activist, a formerly unhoused single mother of two, a nurse, a survivor, and a pastor, Congresswoman Cori Bush knows the struggles our communities face on a daily basis. In 2020, she defeated a 52-year political dynasty on a mission to save lives; in 2022, St. Louis sent her back to Congress with a strong mandate to champion racial, economic, reproductive, gender, health, and environmental justice. I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. name: Summer Lee
subject: re: my primary in 2 days
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

I’m in Congress today because of this grassroots movement. Because of
people like you, I was able to go up against the Democratic establishment
and the millions of dollars in attacks from right-wing groups like AIPAC
and Moderate PAC and WIN this seat for Pennsylvania’s 12th District in
2022.

Now, I need your support again to take on my Republican billionaire-backed
opponent in the April 23 Democratic primary and WIN in 2 days. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-sl.wJpHnY&refcode=em20240421-34415&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=34415%2E1203867%2Eq1mJO3 ]Can you
split a donation between me and Justice Democrats to help save this seat
and keep up our fight for progress?

In 2022, I was an underdog running to take on the status quo and deliver
the bold change our communities need and deserve. Now, I’m Pennsylvania’s
most progressive member of Congress, and the only Democratic incumbent in
the state facing a primary challenge.

Since my term began in 2023, I’ve delivered $1 billion in good-paying
jobs, public transit, affordable housing, and other community projects to
PA-12 in one single year.

I’ve stood with workers on the picket lines, coordinated roundtables to
combat food insecurity, fought for clean water and lead remediation,
introduced the OLIGARCH Act to stop billionaires from cheating the system
on the backs of hardworking families, and a whole lot more.

I was also one of the first members of Congress to call for a permanent
ceasefire and release of all hostages in Gaza, which further put a target
on my back.

Now, the richest man in Pennsylvania — anti-choice, anti-education, and
pro-Trump billionaire Jeff Yass — is funding Moderate PAC as they try to
replace me with a moderate who will do his bidding in Congress.

There’s still so much left to fight for and achieve, and I know that if we
come together now like we did in 2022, we can beat the odds and win.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-sl.wJpHnY&refcode=em20240421-34415&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=34415%2E1203867%2Eq1mJO3 ]My primary is this Tuesday: can I count on you to rush a split donation
to my campaign and Justice Democrats so we can not only defend my seat but
also protect my fellow Squad members from being ousted this year?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-sl.wJpHnY&refcode=em20240421-34415&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=34415%2E1203867%2Eq1mJO3 ]Contribute $5

Thank you for making progress possible,

Summer

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240421-34415-footer&t=1022&refcode2=34415_1203867_q1mJO3&akid=34415%2E1203867%2Eq1mJO3

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=34415%2E1203867%2Eq1mJO3

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
We urgently need more lawmakers who will invest in life rather than death and destruction. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWW8zch_03pDg_OZ-v-KtX1PP4MnEDvBROBpMWH8KySnVFZPNTZzPTylvCyebnpHRqr_VBoEMao39bEzqhWOACqoH3GvCKoIxlHQd3fB7EV_wJ6BCcMEy4UQ33haVxNVVcuok7sJhiZOGBlpitiVjj3AQM_Q4Q3V320cczU6N9wiFCVz1U3ACl0InrC8arzt7i9MbQChOhGjrC3aVbquOaPO7PjJPVI8fwNgWNfum1na3ARlZt5hpbsA6idm4qNcVFn0kUuAtDCCOyLHFoHs5SbZY9ckoAgBy7_0Eg1AT_-WTtMcfp7L-W8px8ghSweJIc/45p/o_6945stTeS0_KB9XzmWUw/h0/h001.o7-RD4wNAyMH7qe53jkq_ttgPx4i8ISZpQfcSVNrO2E)
---
Friend, Yesterday, my colleagues in Congress passed a bill to send **$26 billion U.S. tax dollars to Israel’s Prime Minister Netanyahu as he carries out the genocide of Palestinians and incites a regional war in the Middle East.** This ongoing support for the Israeli government’s atrocities is a devaluation not only of Palestinian lives, but of all life. **It endangers not only Palestinians and people in the region, but also our Middle Eastern and North African (MENA) American neighbors, who already face systemic erasure from our federal government.** Since federal agencies began following racial and ethnic data standards in 1977, the MENA American community has been counted as “white” on the census and other government forms. Heeding calls from advocacy groups who’ve pushed to change this for decades, I’ve led efforts in Congress to push federal entities to include a MENA response category whenever collecting demographic data, including on the U.S. Census. And we just had a transformative victory, with the federal Office of Management and Budget announcing a new MENA checkbox on the Census and other government forms. This is an important start to ensuring that the Middle Eastern and North African community finally receives the recognition and resources they deserve. But we still have so much work to do to ensure our lawmakers see MENA Americans as human beings worthy of dignity. **We urgently need more people in Congress and at all levels of government who will invest in life rather than destruction, and who value all life no matter faith or ethnicity.** My Rooted in Community Leadership PAC is training and supporting candidates who see our shared humanity and who will fight to meet their constituents’ needs, rather than sending billions of our tax dollars to commit war crimes abroad. [**Can you chip in today to my re-election campaign and my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC? clean_body: We urgently need more lawmakers who will invest in life rather than death and destruction. | | | Friend, Yesterday, my colleagues in Congress passed a bill to send $26 billion U.S. tax dollars to Israel’s Prime Minister Netanyahu as he carries out the genocide of Palestinians and incites a regional war in the Middle East. This ongoing support for the Israeli government’s atrocities is a devaluation not only of Palestinian lives, but of all life. It endangers not only Palestinians and people in the region, but also our Middle Eastern and North African (MENA) American neighbors, who already face systemic erasure from our federal government. Since federal agencies began following racial and ethnic data standards in 1977, the MENA American community has been counted as “white” on the census and other government forms. Heeding calls from advocacy groups who’ve pushed to change this for decades, I’ve led efforts in Congress to push federal entities to include a MENA response category whenever collecting demographic data, including on the U.S. Census. And we just had a transformative victory, with the federal Office of Management and Budget announcing a new MENA checkbox on the Census and other government forms. This is an important start to ensuring that the Middle Eastern and North African community finally receives the recognition and resources they deserve. But we still have so much work to do to ensure our lawmakers see MENA Americans as human beings worthy of dignity. We urgently need more people in Congress and at all levels of government who will invest in life rather than destruction, and who value all life no matter faith or ethnicity. My Rooted in Community Leadership PAC is training and supporting candidates who see our shared humanity and who will fight to meet their constituents’ needs, rather than sending billions of our tax dollars to commit war crimes abroad. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and her Rooted in Community PAC | | | | | | | | | | This April, we also mark Arab American Heritage Month. I just re-introduced a resolution recognizing this month and honoring the invaluable contributions Arab Americans have made in the United States. As a proud Arab American Congresswoman representing one of the largest Arab American communities in our country, I know how important it is that our federal government represents our community and sees us as human beings. Thank you for being by my side and for valuing all life. In service and solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Apr 20, 2024 Subject: My colleagues just voted to send $26 billion to Israel’s government as it commits genocide To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Today, the U.S. House of Representatives voted to send $26 billion of our tax dollars to Israel’s government as it commits genocide against Palestinians. All while many Americans are struggling to afford basic needs like rent and healthcare. This is unacceptable and heartbreaking, and it could escalate a regional war. No U.S. weapons or tax dollars should be used to kill more civilians in the Middle East or anywhere else in the world. Clearly, we need more people in public office who see our shared humanity and who value all life, no matter faith or ethnicity. I founded the Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to train and support these kinds of candidates, who speak out to save lives and who care deeply about their communities. Who will fight for bold changes to meet their constituents’ urgent needs. Israel’s government is using U.S. weapons and tax dollars to kill Palestinian civilians and to bomb multiple countries in the Middle East. This violence and dehumanization has very real consequences for people here in the United States, including MENA (Middle Eastern and North African) Americans who are facing bigotry, repression, and violent harassment. National media and lawmakers have also targeted Arab American communities like Dearborn, which is in my congressional district. As a proud and unapologetic Arab American woman serving in Congress, and the Congresswoman representing one of the largest Arab American communities in our country, I know how important it is that our federal government represents our community and sees us as human beings. That’s why I just re-introduced a resolution recognizing April as Arab American Heritage Month , to honor the invaluable contributions Arab Americans have made in the United States. I’ve also led efforts in Congress to end our federal government’s systemic erasure of MENA (Middle Eastern and North African) Americans. Our MENA neighbors have been forced to identify as “white” since 1977, when federal ethnic and racial data standards began. This distortion has hurt our communities and limited federal investment opportunities. We had a transformative victory recently: After decades of groups’ advocacy, federal entities will now include a MENA response category whenever collecting demographic data, including on the U.S. Census. In addition to demanding an end to this genocide, I will keep pushing to get April permanently designated as Arab American Heritage Month and to ensure that the MENA American community finally receives the recognition and resources they deserve. We all deserve representatives who see us as full human beings, and who prioritize our needs as constituents rather than spending our tax dollars to commit war crimes. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and her Rooted in Community PAC | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much for your support. I’m honored to fight for you, and for all our rights, in Congress. name: Doug White
subject: Local Governance's Disturbing Reality: Unveiling Yakima's MAGA-Driven City Council Power Play
body:
Twenty Million pro-Democratic Message Impressions and More to Come
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/7fOy1JPDp/c?w=QtOaxGEsyVMQIxWcNDhdr4ciT-OdM8yGGDCURhxphOw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvLzdmT3kxSlBEcD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | In This Newsletter
1. Our Newly Minted Vision Statement
2. RAU: The Most Spectacular Way Forward
1. Value Driven Pro-Democratic Value Messaging
2. Octogenarian Peace Brigade
3. Capturing Newly Registered Voters Early
3. Unveiling Yakima's MAGA-Driven City Council Power Play: Exposing Local Governance's Disturbing Reality

In the next newsletter: Strategy for C/EW turning blue. Yes really!
---
| | |
---
| | 1\. Our New Vision Statement
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | 2\. RAU: The Most Spectacular Way Forward
---
| | We at RAU could not be more grateful for the support and encouragement we have received. Our work continues to expand in ways that benefit the communities we serve, and we are ever respectful of the need to share power. No one person or organization can be successful alone; it takes many. We hope that RAU continues to earn the trust of our partners and the communities we serve. 2.1 Our pro-Democratic messaging campaign has been a huge success. We have delivered over twenty million messages to the far-flung corners of Central and Eastern Washington (C/EW). However, we recognize that this is not enough. RAU has evaluated this strategy and determined that we can deliver much greater value. In May/June, we will hold a workshop that will include local organizations, entities invested in the success of rural Washington, community representatives, communications specialists, and data analysts. Together, we will design a program utilizing social media, direct-to-IP, and other communication networks to create a messaging strategy aimed at reaching youth, marginalized populations, and low voter turnout demographics. This will be the largest initiative of its kind ever conducted in C/EW.Using technology and messaging strategies, we will "listen" to these groups to understand why they are disconnected from the political process. This information will be used to develop tailored messaging campaigns and programs to support these groups in ways that are most relevant to them. The insights gained will be shared with campaigns, policymakers, non-profits, and others whose true intent is to serve and support democratic values.
2.2 The Octogenarian Peace Brigade is the working title for Shirley Grossman and Roz Luther's project with Rural Americans United. Based in Spokane Valley, these two dynamos will be hitting the road, traveling to small towns up and down Congressional District 5. While there's still much planning to be done, the premise is simple: elevate the voice and visibility of rural America.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | By venturing into these small towns and either organizing events or participating in local ones, they aim to make marginalized people aware of their importance and to signal that work is underway to change the untenable circumstances they face due to far-right intimidation. Currently, we're reaching out to Democratic county parties in CD5 to seek permission and cooperation for this tour.We're fortunate to have experts like Glenn Rudolph, Chair of LD 13 (soon to become LD 15), lending their expertise. Glenn's understanding of one-on-one conversation techniques in far-right areas is invaluable.If you'd like more information or are able to support this project, please respond to this email or reach out to Shirley at emacap@comcast.net.
2.3 There are twenty counties that comprise C/EW, and some have as few as two people identified keeping the Democratic values torch burning. RAU's core belief is to rebuild the political infrastructure, and it is here that we can help. A team based in Yakima, with volunteers all across C/EW, is reaching out to Democratic organizations to offer support if needed for the important second contact for newly registered voters.Graph of Washington State New Voter Registrations.
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/7fOy1JPDp/c?w=5fGCaIgRTSwEDNvVjlhzGm6vV1uruAXexPY4a86phHU.)
---
| | We know that it takes multiple contacts to prompt action from a person. With first-time young voters supporting Trump 3:1 over Biden and newly registered Latinx voters still showing low voter turnout, it is critically important to maintain a level of connection. We are offering to send postcards to all newly registered voters to let them know that others who believe in Democratic values are here, organized, and can offer support and guidance.If you are an organization active in voter registration or new voter outreach, we would like to hear from you.
---
| | |
---
| | We need your support! Thanks to your incredible generosity and belief in our communities, we've grown faster and achieved more than we ever imagined. But to keep pushing Democratic values into the heart of rural Washington, we need your help. Please consider making a generous monthly donation to support our cause. Every [contribution](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/7fOy1JPDp/c?w=oeHe2PWxDEBbjUQOSrrD8r0wtCuFdNctswEeXjIsWYA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL25ld3NsZXR0ZXItYXByaWwtMjAyNCIsInIiOiI0M2ZiYWQ4Yy05N2Y2LTQzN2ItOTBmNC0yOGFiNDIyMmRlMTEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ) makes a difference!
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/7fOy1JPDp/c?w=AP582o5ZNFzxJ4p2iIlodqjQ2jdU7lLbdO7vcZY9tjI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL25ld3NsZXR0ZXItYXByaWwtMjAyNCIsInIiOiIwYzVmYjFjNi0yNmEzLTQ2ZGMtOTBkMC0wNjljZjJiNTMzNDkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | Our new mailing address is:420 S. 7nd AveSuite 180 PMB #110Yakima, WA 98908
---
| | |
---
| | 3\. Unveiling Yakima's MAGA-Driven City Council Power Play: Exposing Local Governance's Disturbing Reality
---
| | What has been shared in previous newsletters are fragments that comprise a larger picture: a concerted effort to seize control of local government, reshape it as an effective tool, and impose a narrow and unpopular ideology on the majority, thereby distorting and corrupting the very foundation of our nation – democracy. ([read more in last newsletter](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/7fOy1JPDp/c?w=Y7aKuKs-h9rhPC4DlcODOWXo8gZq8lrDqqOJ98LlbTk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3Bvc3QvcnVyYWwtdm9pY2VzLXJlc3RvcmluZy1lcXVpdHktdG8tb3VyLWVsZWN0aW9uLXByb2Nlc3MiLCJyIjoiYTJmMTNlOTctOTZmMy00Y2M2LTk0MGMtMDQ0ZmZjNGM0Nzc5IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0))The MAGA members of the Yakima City Council (MMYCC) recently moved to diminish community input on council decisions by disconnecting from several Community Committees addressing issues such as Climate and Diversity. These committees previously had a legal bond with the Council, necessitating collaboration. However, MAGA's aversion to oversight led to their dissolution. Mayor Patricia Byers justified this action by stating that the committees could now operate more freely, but in reality, they have been stripped of authority, leaving the MMYCC unaccountable to community input or oversight.This is not the first brazen attempt by the MMYCC to reshape the Council and local government to advance the Project 2025 agenda. It's alarming to witness how easily our government can be corrupted, with few checks in place to protect against such abuse.Project 2025, when implemented at the local level, is termed "Territorial Transformation." A Facebook post revealed that Yakima City Mayor Patricia Byers, Council member Mathew Brown, and Council member Chip Roy were welcoming [Sean Feucht](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/7fOy1JPDp/c?w=oy0VszqBsJI5u7ICW8fj0mzt_ucjEEymKP9zt-oo8Eo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cub3BiLm9yZy9hcnRpY2xlLzIwMjMvMDgvMDEvcGFjaWZpYy1ub3J0aHdlc3QtZmFpdGgtbGVhZGVycy1kZW5vdW5jZS1zZWFuLWZldWNodC10b3VyLW92ZXItaGF0ZWZ1bC1yaGV0b3JpYy8iLCJyIjoiYTJmMTNlOTctOTZmMy00Y2M2LTk0MGMtMDQ0ZmZjNGM0Nzc5IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0) to Yakima's [SOZO Sports Complex on June 9, 2024](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/7fOy1JPDp/c?w=mN1u-_IZnHvjfP8MI8ualyBdY9mYiADg3N1hMwc5YN8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL2V2ZW50cy83MjY5NDU0NjE5Nzg3Nzg4LyIsInIiOiJhMmYxM2U5Ny05NmYzLTRjYzYtOTQwYy0wNDRmZmM0YzQ3NzkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ). Feucht's ministry espouses Christian Nationalism and is vehemently anti-LGBT, shedding light on why the Community Diversity and Inclusion Committee was axed by the MMYCC. Machinations are proceeding with disturbing precision.

| |
---
| | Lastly, the Yakima City Council's proclamation recognizing May 2, 2024, as National Prayer Day raises concerns. While a day of prayer may not be objectionable, falsely attributing a religious role in the founding of America undermines the secular nature of our government and the freedom to worship, or not, as one chooses.The purpose of starting the National Day of Prayer was to humbly come before God, seeking His guidance for our leaders and His grace upon us as a people. However, the first amendment of the constitution states, "Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion." Manipulating local government is shown to be more effective than State or Federal levels due to lesser oversight. Mayor Patricia Byers' reasoning for disconnecting the Community Committees from the government seems accurate for a day of prayer, but counter to the purpose of Community Committees.

| | Lastly, while a proclamation may not seem like a "serious" government action, [Washington State RCW 38.08.030](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/7fOy1JPDp/c?w=79aaNxEbdMHWw2m47XdQuQ-QINcqBsuh3AzjjTuxR-E.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hcHAubGVnLndhLmdvdi9yY3cvZGVmYXVsdC5hc3B4P2NpdGU9MzguMDguMDMwIiwiciI6IjU2NjNkMzUzLWQ2NGItNGU4ZC1hY2EzLWIwNDUzMzhkYTViNyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9) outlines a Proclamation of complete or limited martial law by the Governor. These small twists and turns gradually erode our trust in our system of government creating fear and confusion. In Central and Eastern Washington young voters were three times more likely to cast their ballot for Trump than for Biden and Democratic voter turnout was down 42%! Rural Americans United was created to fight back. We educate, remind and persuade people that Democratic Values mirror theirs the best and will provide a future that benefits us all. We provide a strong voice for Democratic Values across Central and Eastern Washington.

clean_body: Twenty Million pro-Democratic Message Impressions and More to Come | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | In This Newsletter 1. Our Newly Minted Vision Statement 2. RAU: The Most Spectacular Way Forward 1. Value Driven Pro-Democratic Value Messaging 2. Octogenarian Peace Brigade 3. Capturing Newly Registered Voters Early 3. Unveiling Yakima's MAGA-Driven City Council Power Play: Exposing Local Governance's Disturbing Reality In the next newsletter: Strategy for C/EW turning blue. Yes really! | | | | | 1\. Our New Vision Statement | | | | | | | 2\. RAU: The Most Spectacular Way Forward | | We at RAU could not be more grateful for the support and encouragement we have received. Our work continues to expand in ways that benefit the communities we serve, and we are ever respectful of the need to share power. No one person or organization can be successful alone; it takes many. We hope that RAU continues to earn the trust of our partners and the communities we serve. 2.1 Our pro-Democratic messaging campaign has been a huge success. We have delivered over twenty million messages to the far-flung corners of Central and Eastern Washington (C/EW). However, we recognize that this is not enough. RAU has evaluated this strategy and determined that we can deliver much greater value. In May/June, we will hold a workshop that will include local organizations, entities invested in the success of rural Washington, community representatives, communications specialists, and data analysts. Together, we will design a program utilizing social media, direct-to-IP, and other communication networks to create a messaging strategy aimed at reaching youth, marginalized populations, and low voter turnout demographics. This will be the largest initiative of its kind ever conducted in C/EW.Using technology and messaging strategies, we will "listen" to these groups to understand why they are disconnected from the political process. This information will be used to develop tailored messaging campaigns and programs to support these groups in ways that are most relevant to them. The insights gained will be shared with campaigns, policymakers, non-profits, and others whose true intent is to serve and support democratic values. 2.2 The Octogenarian Peace Brigade is the working title for Shirley Grossman and Roz Luther's project with Rural Americans United. Based in Spokane Valley, these two dynamos will be hitting the road, traveling to small towns up and down Congressional District 5. While there's still much planning to be done, the premise is simple: elevate the voice and visibility of rural America. | | | | | By venturing into these small towns and either organizing events or participating in local ones, they aim to make marginalized people aware of their importance and to signal that work is underway to change the untenable circumstances they face due to far-right intimidation. Currently, we're reaching out to Democratic county parties in CD5 to seek permission and cooperation for this tour.We're fortunate to have experts like Glenn Rudolph, Chair of LD 13 (soon to become LD 15), lending their expertise. Glenn's understanding of one-on-one conversation techniques in far-right areas is invaluable.If you'd like more information or are able to support this project, please respond to this email or reach out to Shirley at emacap@comcast.net. 2.3 There are twenty counties that comprise C/EW, and some have as few as two people identified keeping the Democratic values torch burning. RAU's core belief is to rebuild the political infrastructure, and it is here that we can help. A team based in Yakima, with volunteers all across C/EW, is reaching out to Democratic organizations to offer support if needed for the important second contact for newly registered voters.Graph of Washington State New Voter Registrations. | | | | We know that it takes multiple contacts to prompt action from a person. With first-time young voters supporting Trump 3:1 over Biden and newly registered Latinx voters still showing low voter turnout, it is critically important to maintain a level of connection. We are offering to send postcards to all newly registered voters to let them know that others who believe in Democratic values are here, organized, and can offer support and guidance.If you are an organization active in voter registration or new voter outreach, we would like to hear from you. | | | | | We need your support! Thanks to your incredible generosity and belief in our communities, we've grown faster and achieved more than we ever imagined. But to keep pushing Democratic values into the heart of rural Washington, we need your help. Please consider making a generous monthly donation to support our cause. Every makes a difference! | | | | Our new mailing address is:420 S. 7nd AveSuite 180 PMB #110Yakima, WA 98908 | | | | | 3\. Unveiling Yakima's MAGA-Driven City Council Power Play: Exposing Local Governance's Disturbing Reality | | What has been shared in previous newsletters are fragments that comprise a larger picture: a concerted effort to seize control of local government, reshape it as an effective tool, and impose a narrow and unpopular ideology on the majority, thereby distorting and corrupting the very foundation of our nation – democracy. ( MAGA members of the Yakima City Council (MMYCC) recently moved to diminish community input on council decisions by disconnecting from several Community Committees addressing issues such as Climate and Diversity. These committees previously had a legal bond with the Council, necessitating collaboration. However, MAGA's aversion to oversight led to their dissolution. Mayor Patricia Byers justified this action by stating that the committees could now operate more freely, but in reality, they have been stripped of authority, leaving the MMYCC unaccountable to community input or oversight.This is not the first brazen attempt by the MMYCC to reshape the Council and local government to advance the Project 2025 agenda. It's alarming to witness how easily our government can be corrupted, with few checks in place to protect against such abuse.Project 2025, when implemented at the local level, is termed "Territorial Transformation." Machinations are proceeding with disturbing precision. | | | | Lastly, the Yakima City Council's proclamation recognizing May 2, 2024, as National Prayer Day raises concerns. While a day of prayer may not be objectionable, falsely attributing a religious role in the founding of America undermines the secular nature of our government and the freedom to worship, or not, as one chooses.The purpose of starting the National Day of Prayer was to humbly come before God, seeking His guidance for our leaders and His grace upon us as a people. However, the first amendment of the constitution states, "Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion." name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: We cannot mistake our progress for victory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I was elected as the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2465%2E35263%2EK5TbTE)
Peter — When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public service, but I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly. [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240421_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2465%2E35263%2EK5TbTE) Seeing others in the LGBTQ+ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they love — I came to realize that I could do both. I could run for office and be honest about who I am. Thanks to the support of this incredible team, I was elected as the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history. **But I didn’t run for office to make history — I first ran to make a difference.** I understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives. From lowering prescription drug prices to protecting same-sex marriage through the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , I’ve worked hard every day since to do just that. Folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too. We’ve made incredible progress, but we cannot mistake our progress for victory. Republican-led state legislatures across the country continue to pass harmful legislation, especially targeting the transgender community and LGBTQ+ youth. A Republican Senate majority would do the same at the national level if they take back control this November. It’s going to take all of us to counter these right-wing attacks. So, as my right-wing opponent and Republicans nationwide threaten to advance an extreme and hateful agenda, I'm humbly asking: **[Will you help me defend the Senate from far-right extremists who want to undo our progress? Together, we can stop them and prove that kindness and inclusion, not hatred and division, are true American values.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240421_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2465%2E35263%2EK5TbTE)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-apr24.Xs9pUr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240421_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2465%2E35263%2EK5TbTE)

clean_body: America’s future is in great danger! | | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Fellow Patriot, America's future is in great danger! According to a recent poll, 64% of young adults aren't proud to be Americans! 20% of young Americans have a positive view of Osama Bin Laden! Do you know how we got here? The schools we send our children and grandchildren to are indoctrinating young people at a record-breaking pace. Leftist professors and administrators are filling students' minds with transgender ideology, Critical Race Theory, and climate alarmism! You and I grew up in an America where we said the Pledge of Allegiance and where higher education meant freedom to learn opposing viewpoints. Now, colleges and universities regularly silence conservative viewpoints and discriminate against students eager to learn your conservative values. Enough is enough. We conservatives need to stop giving our money to institutions that counter our values! The Left pours millions into reaching young people-they know the power in recruiting an entire generation to liberalism! Did you hear that leftist billionaires George and Alex Soros declared they would invest $50 million to "boost...civic engagement among women and young people"? Young America 's Foundation (YAF)-the leading youth outreach organization in America-is fighting back to win the hearts and minds of our nation's youth! YAF created an exclusive eBook for you! reveals the Left's playbook and equips EVERY American to fight back with us! name: Shamaine Daniels
subject: 🚨The Time is NOW! 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Daniels For Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Friend,
The Pennsylvania primary election is just 2 days away and my team and I are running through the tape. We’ve spent the last few weeks knocking on doors, making calls, going to events, and reaching voters in every way we can! The response has been overwhelming. The folks in this district are excited and ready to take on insurrectionist Scott Perry this Fall.
I am proud of the campaign we ran in 2022–when no one was paying attention and the national Democrats weren’t investing in the race. Because of the work we did in 2022, this district is now a top target to help Democrats take back the House. They did this based on my performance and before any candidates had even announced they were running. In fact, they did it when one of my opponents was still living in California with his family and another opponent was still a registered Republican!
With just 2 days left in this primary, I need your help now more than ever. I’m falling short of my fundraising goals for our aggressive GOTV efforts. Can you help me fill the gap and make a contribution to my campaign today? Click here to donate. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Your contribution will help me directly reach voters in the district. It will allow my team and I to make sure that those voters know what’s at stake in this election and that I am the best candidate to take on Scott Perry in November.
My opponents’ campaigns have been funded by large outside groups but I’m proud of our grassroots funders–donors like you. It’s going to take all of us working together to defeat Perry this Fall and I know that with your support, I’ll have the resources I need to win.
Please rush a contribution to our campaign today by clicking here.
Onward to Victory!
Shamaine
Make a RUSH Contribution NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Paid for by Daniels For Congress
Daniels For Congress
2018 North 3rd Street

clean_body: [] Friend, The Pennsylvania primary election is just 2 days away and my team and I are running through the tape. We’ve spent the last few weeks knocking on doors, making calls, going to events, and reaching voters in every way we can! The response has been overwhelming. The folks in this district are excited and ready to take on insurrectionist Scott Perry this Fall. I am proud of the campaign we ran in 2022–when no one was paying attention and the national Democrats weren’t investing in the race. Because of the work we did in 2022, this district is now a top target to help Democrats take back the House. They did this based on my performance and before any candidates had even announced they were running. In fact, they did it when one of my opponents was still living in California with his family and another opponent was still a registered Republican! With just 2 days left in this primary, I need your help now more than ever. I’m falling short of my fundraising goals for our aggressive GOTV efforts. Can you help me fill the gap and make a contribution to my campaign today? Click here to donate. [] Your contribution will help me directly reach voters in the district. It will allow my team and I to make sure that those voters know what’s at stake in this election and that I am the best candidate to take on Scott Perry in November. My opponents’ campaigns have been funded by large outside groups but I’m proud of our grassroots funders–donors like you. It’s going to take all of us working together to defeat Perry this Fall and I know that with your support, I’ll have the resources I need to win. Please rush a contribution to our campaign today by clicking here. Onward to Victory! Shamaine Make a RUSH Contribution NOW! name: Jon Tester
subject: I’ll never take your dollar for granted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
They’ll spend and say anything to defeat me
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7a5e8953-7efb-4b92-baab-0741469858dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| | | | | Peter— I see it happen all the time. A lot of campaigns and politicians waste your money when you contribute to them. Not us. When you pitch into this campaign, we immediately use that investment to fight back against a mountain of super PAC attacks headed my way, and organize and turn out Montanans. I don’t take a single dollar for granted. I still get my flattop haircut at my local barbershop—and all it costs me is $12, including tip! [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0dfc66e9-b567-4bdc-8517-8d84dd719e65/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) My finance team just told me that we’re running short of our mid-month fundraising goal, and that can make a huge difference in whether or not we have what it takes to win. These super PACs are ramping up their plans for Montana. They’ll spend upwards of $50 million to try and change me into something I’m not with misleading attacks. We need your help to gather the resources to fight back. [Peter, they’ll spend and say anything to defeat me. But my word is my bond—if you can split $10 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today, it’ll go a long way. I promise we’ll put your money to good use. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0bac8964-4753-4ee2-9ffb-76356be40ca2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
|
---
| | | | | Thanks, Jon

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_op_tester24042114?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5004592a-cbf1-407b-b0b1-eaf8cf9aa26b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

clean_body: 2024 is shaping up to be one of the most consequential election years in history. Over 44 states have legislative elections, and there will be hundreds of competitive races nationwide. | | | | | ---|--- We’re reaching out with an important request: 2024 is shaping up to be one of the most consequential election years in history. Over 44 states will have legislative elections on the ballot, and there will be hundreds of competitive races nationwide. Reproductive freedoms, LGBTQ+ rights, and access to the ballot box are all on the ballot this fall. So much is at stake – our rights, values, and even our democracy – so we can’t afford to fall a dollar short of our fundraising goals. Democrats are using their power to safeguard abortion rights, pass red flag laws, and grow our economy. We need to win in November to continue this progress, break Republican strongholds, and empower Democrats up and down the ballot. As the Biden-Harris team puts together a winning strategy for the White House, the DLCC is focused on making 2024 the Year of the States – but it’ll take grassroots Democrats like you, donating early and often, to help our party cross the finish line. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between DLCC PAC and the Biden-Harris campaign. | | | | | With so much on the line, we’ll talk soon. Right now, House Republicans are gearing up to throw Congress, and the nation, into another round of chaos and dysfunction.

Led by Marjorie Taylor Greene, and backed by another MAGA extremist, Speaker Mike Johnson now faces a real threat to his job and could be ousted just like former Speaker Kevin McCarthy.

Who would try to take on this job if Johnson is fired? **The one person that the extremists went to the mat for: Jim Jordan.**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83444529/468423449/1419042639?refcode=240421_TW_SpeakerAgain&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmUwMTAxOTQtZmJmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1Sb58LNMDiD_aTKmVSDCl5x_suUlUZh_liuBPzp6RYE=)

The dysfunction in the House shows just how urgent it is to get rid of extremists like Jordan and flip the House for Democrats this November. **[**Will you stand with Tamie and help her defeat Jim Jordan? | | | [_**DEFEND AMERICA**_](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=d3ba4c08c78d49e9a1e8c6490faad61f&_e=Of7MIB2eXr6Gxw2EcyVHj45Jfy1_2RIpwMIRNTfQDuPJrIBEY0883QMj0mL52fxt1HRvc-RG_agpbZxt_CcFH_v-c7Nxef5Ki8RzH3nK99OhT1geYJzNiDUDC0eXIOzoUxUGR1O41Lf2u0NOTLxGKB2kCUEiV3Z-iNsAs9SMuRwZ0AY5xuf6nDWW_sIVXGQEOh8x1CODb51xhDK6fINnnY1j4R-glCenoJNDZjSQlBNNGKo14oQo9mq7VqgULPgsDIkRHPFKH5rzPc2knm3-TJzSJEYGyRjUAzHj2DefGT3IjArqCR0ER_iiaeNUurHjyTKGhmyT3rYLlOa2ei3YoX_ySN4Xf0GucivzqLvp108JDZrTS2TDR1inbWtHZchT)

**War in the Middle East. Ukraine under siege. Communist China expanding their spy army into the United States.

_It’s a disaster - and NONE OF IT would have happened under President Trump._

I’ve talked to soldiers who have served under both the Biden and Trump administrations, and every single one says the same thing: under President Trump, things were different. Our enemies were afraid. The U.S. exhibited strength everywhere we went.

Now, we’re well on our way to becoming the laughingstock of the globe.

__[_Make no mistake - our enemies will pay DEARLY when President Trump is back in office, but he needs your help to win this November._](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=d3ba4c08c78d49e9a1e8c6490faad61f&_e=Of7MIB2eXr6Gxw2EcyVHj45Jfy1_2RIpwMIRNTfQDuPJrIBEY0883QMj0mL52fxt1HRvc-RG_agpbZxt_CcFH_v-c7Nxef5Ki8RzH3nK99OhT1geYJzNiDUDC0eXIOzoUxUGR1O41Lf2u0NOTLxGKB2kCUEiV3Z-iNsAs9SMuRwZ0AY5xuf6nDWW_sIVXGQEOh8x1CODb51xhDK6fINnnaDHaQj53T9ya2qcwiEYC6t-QHoPt8NPP3grfEIvjAh74-XUUfais9ahkRP6T6FVlhkHvsuALEX0R-3hnFiDSzrJUfU2jbi-oBKFMm3vam_GMd4VLjeoU2QOOuorwupH6yUGbvtWnMcpGEBvyrJxb4mjL_-faTCbhpFJ0kgmFFZH)****
Pitch in now to re-elect President Trump and make America strong again!**__

[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=d3ba4c08c78d49e9a1e8c6490faad61f&_e=Of7MIB2eXr6Gxw2EcyVHj45Jfy1_2RIpwMIRNTfQDuPJrIBEY0883QMj0mL52fxt1HRvc-RG_agpbZxt_CcFH_v-c7Nxef5Ki8RzH3nK99OhT1geYJzNiDUDC0eXIOzoUxUGR1O41Lf2u0NOTLxGKB2kCUEiV3Z-iNsAs9SMuRwZ0AY5xuf6nDWW_sIVXGQEOh8x1CODb51xhDK6fINnnTzCLMnuMKNiMk0zdHkEd5iwQwWPZKVi10RyDe5LaDBeZM7vnj833iZ2NDl1TqXiuNlK6xbGNLTSWaWsNPJW0btbKGgsTEjt3uagelQlpv_jWRjSVljbYzs2xSHPQLV86i80R785lnTtdIzz8QRyTjBopZXW4BuXI3aVVKt2vuGc)

America is calling on President Trump more than ever.

Our citizens are fearing for our safety, and we need a Commander in Chief who’s up to the challenge.

President Trump proved he knows how to dominate our enemies before, and I now he can do it again. Now, he just needs your help.

**We CAN make America strong again - but President Trump and I can’t do it without you.**[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=d3ba4c08c78d49e9a1e8c6490faad61f&_e=Of7MIB2eXr6Gxw2EcyVHj45Jfy1_2RIpwMIRNTfQDuPJrIBEY0883QMj0mL52fxt1HRvc-RG_agpbZxt_CcFH0cqmOAgXcPM7WVzXdI7DsCNuYfMxd8ac53QBtNAtzKL4lsvYvS11YmNgw5zWeKO8jHCWRhK5tbTLodSeughH_b58TzZ9pILIMGWs78JjpURIDOie0HTSkw2NQih_NIB2IcLhJ66F6Lmf9x6NriE5XWI_DcrJAo4pprTJYunVI7wDNfDJa54H-MSc_QBL_Wi9XKzuot0IXMn-Sh34_JQAyik55ob1BT8Nmqxo94fFSnNjLqrLgs5rctzLjiXpF5i8mXqgiCG4fesgqSNQuYn4j-wL_6SbM0eJyjeV2q0AOXt)

We’re trying to help them learn something new today

Hey there, Today we celebrate a lesser-known holiday, National Big Word Day. In honor of this day, Team Pascrell took the liberty to help our GOP friends with words they seem to struggle with. Here goes it: **Representative:** An elected official voted in by voters in a certain district. In voting for a U.S. Representative, voters are entrusting them to make the right decisions on their behalf. Yet, we know that the House GOP is busy spinning its wheels with a sham impeachment inquiry and plotting ways to roll back the clock even further on abortion. It's mind-boggling. **Democracy:** A system of government run by the people, for the betterment of ALL people and NOT catering to large corporations and the top 1%. A system where voters decide who they want to elect and where the results of elections are accepted and respected. We know from January 6th, where 147 Republicans voted to overturn the results of the 2020 elections, that too many in the House GOP have zero regard for Democracy. It's why Bill is so steadfast in taking steps to safeguard it. **[With a bit of vocabulary out of the way, please consider chipping in $10, $20, or $50 to help Bill get back to Congress. There's so much at stake and what we raise helps us contact voters and turn them out to clean_body: We’re trying to help them learn something new today | | = Hey there, Today we celebrate a lesser-known holiday, National Big Word Day. In honor of this day, Team Pascrell took the liberty to help our GOP friends with words they seem to struggle with. Here goes it: Representative: An elected official voted in by voters in a certain district. In voting for a U.S. Representative, voters are entrusting them to make the right decisions on their behalf. Yet, we know that the House GOP is busy spinning its wheels with a sham impeachment inquiry and plotting ways to roll back the clock even further on abortion. It's mind-boggling. Democracy: A system of government run by the people, for the betterment of ALL people and NOT catering to large corporations and the top 1%. A system where voters decide who they want to elect and where the results of elections are accepted and respected. We know from January 6th, where 147 Republicans voted to overturn the results of the 2020 elections, that too many in the House GOP have zero regard for Democracy. It's why Bill is so steadfast in taking steps to safeguard it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = = — Team Pascrell | The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. name: Eric Sorensen
subject: water water everywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
[|
---](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/7gcvT3qV_Gyw5ZVRptAfIQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoB8UTP0QgaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXJpY2ZvcmlsbGlub2lzLmNvbS9XA3NwY0IKZhAUQCVmi6tkxVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)
| | Peter, Poll after poll shows that voters are tired of politicians who get sucked into the Washington circus and don't get things done. They want real results, not pithy tweets. Speaking of pithy, you may remember the line, “water, water everywhere and not a drop to drink” from your high school English class. Unfortunately, this isn’t fiction – **for too many working families, water is around, but not clean or safe enough to drink.** **And for those where it’s available, the costs are prohibitive.** Drinking water service is an essential lifeline, regardless of a person’s income. That’s why I’m excited to introduce an effort to help make water – a basic human right – both affordable AND reliable for all households. My bill helps working families access clean drinking water and wastewater services AND brings relief from high costs by bringing down water bills each month through supporting state programs. I’m proud to have stayed out of the circus and focused on the problems I hear from constituents and improve life for Central and Northwestern Illinois. But, this is a big challenge. And it requires partnership between Democrats and Republicans to get it done. [**I will always fight for everyone in our region, regardless of party, because we all deserve basic rights. If you’re committed to the same values, please donate $5 today.**](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/W4rK4R-ReoiT0YePytqEPg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoB8UTP0TkaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXEyLTIwMjQ_) I’m proud to roll up my sleeves to make life more affordable for our communities. Because that’s what IL-17 deserves. \- Eric | ****[Donate](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/W4rK4R-ReoiT0YePytqEPg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoB8UTP0TkaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXEyLTIwMjQ_)****

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: Why do folks volunteer with Powered by People?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
We asked one of our top volunteers why they do this work with us.
#
At Powered by People, our volunteers are the heart of everything we do.
So we want to share a bit about what motivates people to dedicate so much of their time to registering and organizing voters with us — told from a volunteer’s perspective.
Here’s what Liz, one of our top volunteers, had to say:
_Liz Bergt registering students to vote at the University of Houston._ Like many people, I was shocked with the turn our politics took when Donald Trump took office in 2016. It forced me to reflect on my responsibility to do my part to get our country back on track.

I asked myself: “Why stay at home in despair when you can get out there and be a part of the solution?” So when Powered by People made a call for volunteers, I knew I had to show up.

Ever since joining the team as a Volunteer Deputy Registrar to help register and turn out Democratic voters, I’ve found purpose in being a part of an organization with such a big vision for change.

Every day that we spend out in the community registering voters — whether it’s on college campuses or at voters’ doorsteps, we come one step closer to bringing the change we want to see.

The more people who are out there doing this work, the faster we will get there. So let's all get after it!

_— Liz_
---
[**Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can today to support the thousands of volunteers like Liz who are working to register and organize voters across Texas?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240421.TaY5gw&refcode=ema20240421-239557&t=1&akid=239557%2E444211%2ElvZF9n)

Thank you for supporting our dedicated volunteers!
Kate Roberts

Peter, few moments are more inspiring than the first few weeks of the New Year. It's a time for both reflection and looking forward, a time to weigh the ultimate question: "_How can we do better this year?_ "
And that's exactly why I'm reaching out to you now.
You see, we had a few wins for progress in 2023: States like Ohio and Minnesota moved to definitively defend reproductive rights. In California, lifesaving prescription drugs like insulin were made more affordable, and state leaders across the nation fought to protect and codify transgender rights.
But 2023 came with a series of devastating setbacks to our fight for justice too: More than a dozen states have banned abortions, book bans in schools and libraries in Republican-led states soared, our nation suffered from over 600 mass shootings, the conservative Supreme Court handed down a ruling that further stripped away the rights and protections of the LGBTQ+ community, and we experienced the hottest year ever recorded.
**And 2024 is not going to be _any_ easier.

This year, we're facing another defining presidential election and a decisive year for our fight for progress. That's why I'm working tirelessly to ensure that regardless of who wins the White House, the Senate, or the House of Representatives, _your_ life gets better. But to do that, I need to know which fights you want to see prioritized.**

**[That's why I'm counting on _you_ and [500] other Fearless Fighters to share your top priorities of 2024. Your response will help me shape my fight for you this year, so please: Will you take my 2024 Priorities Survey before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83445989/468427157/-660237284?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1413-su-nd&refcode=jtk1413-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjNjYTU4Ni1mZWZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f--9_g9H3urZV-qXpxAprfMJWej7fJjfPseEs3Y85Qk=&emci=749ba3d8-d5fc-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=bf3ca586-feff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=25369504)**

name: Carmen Goers
subject: Join Us in Celebrating Carmen's Birthday - A Milestone Day for Our Campaign
body:
Join the Team

| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **Join Us in Celebrating Carmen 's Birthday - A Milestone Day for Our Campaign!**
---

Dear Peter,
Today isn't just any day; it's a special occasion that marks the birthday of Carmen Goers, a dedicated community leader and longtime resident of Washington's 8th district. As we celebrate this milestone, we're reminded of Carmen's unwavering commitment to our community and the values we hold dear.

Carmen's journey has been fueled by a passion for public service and a deep dedication to making a tangible difference in the lives of every constituent. From advocating for quality education and supporting our military, to fighting crime & drugs and reckless government spending, her campaign is a beacon of hope and progress.

In honor of Carmen's birthday, we're not just celebrating the person; we're looking forward to her impactful work ahead. But to continue this vital work, we need your support.
---
| | | |
---
| Would you consider marking this special day with a contribution of $25, $50, or $100 to Carmen's campaign? Your donation will ensure that our message reaches every corner of the district and that our shared vision for a brighter future becomes a reality.

---
| [ DONATE TODAY! ](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/6625455db063a80ab91d5eb8/6619ca63d8931be710f328ec/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=063ed9f6c45ba376c1f3ee1617d5df017540a2b5af39eb9e3c7ea3c26f764a54)

With gratitude,

Team Carmen Goers

clean_body: Join the Team | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Join Us in Celebrating Carmen 's Birthday - A Milestone Day for Our Campaign! Dear Peter, Today isn't just any day; it's a special occasion that marks the birthday of Carmen Goers, a dedicated community leader and longtime resident of Washington's 8th district. As we celebrate this milestone, we're reminded of Carmen's unwavering commitment to our community and the values we hold dear. Carmen's journey has been fueled by a passion for public service and a deep dedication to making a tangible difference in the lives of every constituent. From advocating for quality education and supporting our military, to fighting crime & drugs and reckless government spending, her campaign is a beacon of hope and progress. In honor of Carmen's birthday, we're not just celebrating the person; we're looking forward to her impactful work ahead. But to continue this vital work, we need your support. | | | | | Would you consider marking this special day with a contribution of $25, $50, or $100 to Carmen's campaign? Your donation will ensure that our message reaches every corner of the district and that our shared vision for a brighter future becomes a reality. | | | | Let’s celebrate Carmen's birthday by coming together to support a future driven by common sense, integrity, and leadership. Thank you for your generosity and for being a part of our community's journey towards progress. With gratitude, Team Carmen Goers | | | | | | ---|--- or |

This exclusive event includes heavy hors d’ oeuvres and cocktails, a fireside chat with Robert F. Kennedy Jr., and a photo opportunity. Don’t miss this special event with a chance to engage RFK Jr. up close.

Join us for an elegant cocktail soirée in a museum-like atmosphere, an evening of intellectual discovery as Robert F. Kennedy Jr. shares his visionary outlook on the future, set against an inspiring backdrop.
[Long Island, New York](https://www.kennedy24.com/long-island-ny-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_21_24_r_a4&n=6) \- Sunday, April 28th at 2:30 PM
Join Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for a voter rally at Villa Lombardi’s and take part in history to collect more than 45,000 signatures in six weeks, something no other independent candidate has achieved within that time span.
[Melville, New York](https://www.kennedy24.com/melville-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_21_24_r_a4&n=7) \- Sunday, April 28th at 6:30 PM
Be a part of an exclusive evening that will spark inspiration and bolster Robert's presidential bid. This is your moment to join a visionary leader—don't let it pass by. You simply must be there!
[Boston, Massachusetts](https://www.kennedy24.com/boston-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_21_24_r_a4&n=8) \- Monday, April 29th at 6:30 PM
We are proud to host a very special event at the historic Park Plaza Hotel in the heart of Boston where Mr. Kennedy first announced his historic candidacy for President of the United States nearly one year ago.
[Nashville, Tennessee](https://www.kennedy24.com/country-and-comedy-nashville?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_21_24_r_a4&n=9) \- Wednesday, May 15th at 7:00 PM

[Castle Rock, Colorado](https://www.kennedy24.com/castlerock-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_21_24_r_a4&n=10) \- Saturday May 18th at 6:30 PM

[Santa Monica, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/santa-monica-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_21_24_r_a4&n=11) \- Sunday, June 2nd at 6:00 PM

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/ziplining-sweepstakes?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_21_24_r_a4&n=13)
* * *
RFK Jr.: How Nature Connects Us To God
If we want to meet our obligation as a generation, as a civilization, as a nation, we must create communities for our children that offer the same opportunities for dignity, enrichment, prosperity, and good health as the communities our parents provided for us.
To achieve this, we must begin by protecting our environment: the air we breathe, the water we drink, the wildlife, the fisheries, and the public lands.
These are not mere properties but belong to all of us—the commons, the commonwealth, the landscapes, and waterways that connect us to the 10,000 generations before the era of laptops, and ultimately to God.
God communicates with human beings through many vectors: through each other, organized religion, the great books of those religions, wise people, art, music, literature, and poetry. Yet, He does so nowhere with such detail, grace, color, and joy as through creation.
**When we destroy a species or a special place,_we diminish our capacity to sense the divine_ , to understand who God is, and what our own potential is as human beings.**
I believe we deserve a President who cares deeply about these issues and discusses them openly with the American people.
**I am committed to preserving our environmental heritage for future generations and need your support to make this vision a reality.** [Join our cause and help ensure that our children can inherit a world as rich and promising as the one we were given.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_21_24_r_a4&n=14)

RFK Jr.: How Nature Connects Us To God If we want to meet our obligation as a generation, as a civilization, as a nation, we must create communities for our children that offer the same opportunities for dignity, enrichment, prosperity, and good health as the communities our parents provided for us. To achieve this, we must begin by protecting our environment: the air we breathe, the water we drink, the wildlife, the fisheries, and the public lands. These are not mere properties but belong to all of us—the commons, the commonwealth, the landscapes, and waterways that connect us to the 10,000 generations before the era of laptops, and ultimately to God. God communicates with human beings through many vectors: through each other, organized religion, the great books of those religions, wise people, art, music, literature, and poetry. Yet, He does so nowhere with such detail, grace, color, and joy as through creation. When we destroy a species or a special place,we diminish our capacity to sense the divine , to understand who God is, and what our own potential is as human beings. name: Team Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: A second Trump term would be a disaster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
Your support is critical in ensuring that Donald Trump never returns to the White House. |
#
---
Team, Four more years of Donald Trump would be a disaster. Need proof? Just look at what he did during his first term. He signed a trillion-dollar tax cut for the wealthy and large corporations, appointed three far-right judges to the Supreme Court who overturned _Roe v. Wade,_ and presided over the single-largest hit to our economy since the Great Depression. **[We can’t survive another four years of Donald Trump, but we can do everything in our power to make sure he doesn’t win. Will you chip in to Fight Like Hell PAC to defeat him — again?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83447452/468429890/-983049648?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240421_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGMwYTk1YzQtMDAwMC1lZjExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kMKYSY32W4kcNsXcRihi1xP33Vn8Acyjb9TOqNmP3TM=)** **A second Trump term would be even worse than the first one.** Here are the facts:
* He’s supported a national abortion ban and will look for ways to go even further in restricting reproductive freedom.

* He supports cutting Social Security and Medicare.

* He recently told a gathering of **his wealthiest donors** that he’d look to pass _yet another_ **trillion-dollar tax cut for them.**

* He continues to signal that he’d repeal Obamacare and rip away health care from tens of millions of Americans with preexisting conditions.

* He’d once again put our democracy on the brink of collapse if he doesn’t win the election.

**The American people can’t afford a second Trump term.** Governor Gretchen Whitmer is fighting like hell to defeat Trump’s extremism in Michigan and around the country, but she can’t do it alone.
