clean_body: Your support is critical in ensuring that Donald Trump never returns to the White House. | Team, Four more years of Donald Trump would be a disaster. Need proof? Just look at what he did during his first term. He signed a trillion-dollar tax cut for the wealthy and large corporations, appointed three far-right judges to the Supreme Court who overturned Roe v. Wade, and presided over the single-largest hit to our economy since the Great Depression. = A second Trump term would be even worse than the first one. Here are the facts: He’s supported a national abortion ban and will look for ways to go even further in restricting reproductive freedom. He supports cutting Social Security and Medicare. He recently told a gathering of his wealthiest donors that he’d look to pass yet another trillion-dollar tax cut for them. He continues to signal that he’d repeal Obamacare and rip away health care from tens of millions of Americans with preexisting conditions. He’d once again put our democracy on the brink of collapse if he doesn’t win the election. The American people can’t afford a second Trump term. Governor Gretchen Whitmer is fighting like hell to defeat Trump’s extremism in Michigan and around the country, but she can’t do it alone. Her plans to spread the word and turn out voters for President Biden and Vice President Harris require a lot of money, and she’s counting on you to make sure she has the resources to execute our campaign plans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = This is one of the most important elections in recent history. **_This is the reality of our Democracy!!!_** | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42335?t=7&akid=21297%2E4449941%2EHzHUij) | [_$10,000 WEEKEND GOAL:_ Chip in $7 to fund our Abolish the Electoral College Ad Campaign »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42335?t=8&akid=21297%2E4449941%2EHzHUij)
---
Okay, folks, here’s the truth:

1️⃣ The Electoral College flies in the face of democracy – a candidate can win the presidency without getting the majority of the votes!

2️⃣ The Electoral College is an outdated system that has **_clearly proven ineffective and dangerous in the past!_**

3️⃣ If we do not abolish the Electoral College, Donald Trump could win AGAIN this November WITHOUT securing the popular vote!
**Committing to end the Electoral College will safeguard our Democracy and protect our right to vote -_but only if you can get us there!_**

[**We need our votes to count, team, so help us by chipping in $7 before midnight TONIGHT to destroy the unjust Electoral College and support our work to protect our Democracy »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42335?t=9&akid=21297%2E4449941%2EHzHUij)

[I’m about to ask for your help raising $3,917 before my End of Week deadline at midnight.](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/hj_eO3DEfvU3Yxa9AY9kwQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRoB85pP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDQyMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9maWdodGluZ2Zvcl9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yZktUUGFIckxacDRUM3FvWW1YU1Jac3RIdFkmcmVmY29kZTI9MmZLVFBhSHJMWnA0VDNxb1ltWFNSWnN0SHRZJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJmS1RQYUhyTFpwNFQzcW9ZbVhTUlpzdEh0WVcDc3BjQgpmIWlJJWYwrE36UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) But first, it is important you understand why I ran to serve one of the most diverse districts in the country, where there’s been a serious lack of investment and most people can’t afford an unexpected $300 expense. I’m fighting for the people of this country who politicians have failed time and time again. People who deserve better. **People like my mom and abuela.** My mother and grandmother came here from Cuba during the freedom flights in the late 1960s. What my family had to go through just to eat and have a roof over their heads, is a testament to the resilience and drive of immigrants. But it is also an incredibly sad story. What would it have been like if our country was committed to equity when moving here? If money wasn’t an issue? If she had not been exploited by Miami factories that had her working 70+ hours a week for almost nothing. Where would our people be? **People like my biological mother.** A victim of the system and enmeshed in trying circumstances, she turned to drugs and crime while pregnant with me. She had no access to healthcare and wasn’t able to see a doctor once during her pregnancy. In the wealthiest country in the world, she was neglected by society and left without anyone to turn to. As the mother of seven, she made the difficult decision to put me up for adoption because she lacked the resources to care for and raise another child. **People like my barber.** He was deprived of his right to vote due to a 20 year old felony. He committed a crime of desperation, served his debt to society, and became a successful businessman. Yet he still couldn’t participate in our democracy. I’m so very proud that while working at the ACLU, I organized the movement that restored voting rights to 1.6 million Floridians with previous felonies. But there is so much work to be done. **People like Josh.** A houseless man I met when I was pumping gas during my campaign. One of my campaign buttons rolled out the door when I was getting out of the car. He picked it up and asked “who is Maxwell Alejandro Frost?” I told him it was me and we got to talking about what I hoped to do if I was elected. He couldn’t conceive of the possibility of Medicare for All and healthcare as a human right, because he hadn’t been to the doctor in years. He asked me _“what do I have to do to deserve healthcare?”_ **This system that makes life more difficult for the most vulnerable among us is no accident, Peter. It is by design. And the people who want to keep it that way will spend countless sums of dark money to stop any chance of progress we have.** [I came to Congress so I could fight for my loved ones and yours, but I'll only stay here with the support of grassroots donors like you. Thank you for reading, now let’s keep fighting, together:](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/hj_eO3DEfvU3Yxa9AY9kwQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRoB85pP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDQyMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9maWdodGluZ2Zvcl9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yZktUUGFIckxacDRUM3FvWW1YU1Jac3RIdFkmcmVmY29kZTI9MmZLVFBhSHJMWnA0VDNxb1ltWFNSWnN0SHRZJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJmS1RQYUhyTFpwNFQzcW9ZbVhTUlpzdEh0WVcDc3BjQgpmIWlJJWYwrE36UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) | | | [Donate $10](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/Y16rzzyO8r2rxZV4tJ49Bg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRoB85pP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDQyMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9maWdodGluZ2Zvcl9lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MTAmY2RtYz0yZktUUGFIckxacDRUM3FvWW1YU1Jac3RIdFkmcmVmY29kZTI9MmZLVFBhSHJMWnA0VDNxb1ltWFNSWnN0SHRZJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJmS1RQYUhyTFpwNFQzcW9ZbVhTUlpzdEh0WVcDc3BjQgpmIWlJJWYwrE36UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

You may have already heard: This year, _TIME Magazine_ is celebrating our movement to combat the climate crisis. It’s a profound honor to be given this award alongside other champions fighting for our planet! [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83449160/468434197/1217645933?refcode=ea.4f34441d-0300-ef11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.4f34441d-0300-ef11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmMzQ0NDFkLTAzMDAtZWYxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HNh5otqn2wUF-n-KpUywAwZVu469Am4rCiOmhCnp6NY=) _Photograph by Erik Carter (@erik_carter) for TIME_ | [**ENTER TO WIN A SIGNED COPY**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83449161/468434198/1217645933?refcode=ea.4f34441d-0300-ef11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.4f34441d-0300-ef11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmMzQ0NDFkLTAzMDAtZWYxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HNh5otqn2wUF-n-KpUywAwZVu469Am4rCiOmhCnp6NY=)
---
During my interview with _TIME_ , we discussed how the escalating climate crisis is deeply personal to me. I’d seen firsthand what it was doing to California at the height of the wildfire season. I’d read accounts of birds falling out of the sky over New Mexico and Arizona. I’d heard the stories of fossil fuel companies poisoning entire communities — many of them Indigenous or communities of color — and _all of that_ , coupled with my own battle with cancer, only intensified my resolve.
We are the first generation to feel the climate crisis in full force and the last that can prevent its catastrophic outcomes. At a young 86, I am compelled more than ever to lead by example and prove that _no one_ is too old or too young to make a difference.
**The first step out of despair is simply showing up — something we must all do.**
As we face what may be the most critical election for our planet this year, each action we take, each voice that joins this chorus, each donation to support our work, can tip the scales toward a sustainable future.
**So, here’s what I’m asking of you today: To harness this moment, our team at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC launched a special Earth Month contest!**
Every donation made through the link below to the Jane Fonda Climate PAC automatically enters you into our contest to win one of 40 special editions of the _TIME_ issue signed by yours truly. **Just remember, you have until April 22nd at 11:59 pm ET to participate.**
**[Whether it's a small or large amount, your support fuels our relentless fight to elect bold climate leaders — to city councils, state legislatures, county commissions, and more! — who aren’t afraid to take on Big Oil and fight for a sustainable future.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83449162/468434199/1217645933?refcode=ea.4f34441d-0300-ef11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.4f34441d-0300-ef11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmMzQ0NDFkLTAzMDAtZWYxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HNh5otqn2wUF-n-KpUywAwZVu469Am4rCiOmhCnp6NY=)**

Folks, here’s what we can expect this election season: – Lies about voter fraud and elections being rigged. – Conspiracy theories blasted on Fox News and other right-wing outlets. – Attempts to block the election certification process in key states. **– And just like in 2020, we know the GOP will be flooding courtrooms across the nation with sham lawsuits. ** With Donald Trump, the ringleader of the election-denier movement at the top of the ticket this November, we expect more court cases and more chaos leading up to, and after, November 5th. That’s why we’re reaching out and counting on your support: [Can you make a donation to the DASS Legal Fund today? | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the _only_ organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States.

clean_body: Without the House majority, extremists could pass a national abortion ban, cut Social Security, and threaten our fundamental rights – everything’s at stake. | = | Peter, We’re running in a toss-up district again, and 2024 is shaping up to be our toughest election yet. This was the most expensive race in the state last cycle, and Republicans are already attacking me, making it even more important for us to keep our fundraising on track. = | = I’m counting on supporters like you to join me and my team so we can retake the House majority and continue delivering progress for everyone in PA-07. Without the House majority, extremists could pass a national abortion ban, cut Social Security, and threaten our fundamental rights – everything’s at stake. = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Susan Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: The national focus will be entirely on our race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
We have a challenging road ahead, but one that I know will again lead to victory — because of the incredible community we have behind this campaign.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83450397/468437009/-735451230?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-04-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNjNjc5MTAtMDYwMC1lZjExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fBwQSXAudkRiB4Ci_0l0ZZQcqSBXNFu-DFUoAGeGHsY=)
---
| Peter,

I know you receive many messages from my campaign about how important our early campaign work is to winning another election. For competitive races like ours, we have to defend against intense outside pressure and investment. **Since our election is in 2025, the national focus will be entirely on our race.** National Republicans will want to hold onto Virginia's Governor’s seat to send a message, and they’ll pour millions of dollars into it to try to get it done.

We’ve seen it before in my competitive congressional races. They’ll put up countless attack ads online, on TV, and on billboards. They’ll mobilize their field forces to campaign against me and the good work I’ve done in Congress, as well as our vision for Virginia. And they’ll recruit prominent national figures, like Trump, to visit Virginia to support my eventual opponent.

We have a challenging road ahead, but one that I know will again lead to victory — because of the incredible community we have behind this campaign.

[_**This network is the backbone of our campaign, and I’m counting on your support. Will you please make a difference for our campaign by making a contribution today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83450398/468437010/-735451230?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-04-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNjNjc5MTAtMDYwMC1lZjExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fBwQSXAudkRiB4Ci_0l0ZZQcqSBXNFu-DFUoAGeGHsY=)

clean_body: We have a challenging road ahead, but one that I know will again lead to victory — because of the incredible community we have behind this campaign. | = | Peter, I know you receive many messages from my campaign about how important our early campaign work is to winning another election. For competitive races like ours, we have to defend against intense outside pressure and investment. Since our election is in 2025, the national focus will be entirely on our race. National Republicans will want to hold onto Virginia's Governor’s seat to send a message, and they’ll pour millions of dollars into it to try to get it done. We’ve seen it before in my competitive congressional races. They’ll put up countless attack ads online, on TV, and on billboards. They’ll mobilize their field forces to campaign against me and the good work I’ve done in Congress, as well as our vision for Virginia. And they’ll recruit prominent national figures, like Trump, to visit Virginia to support my eventual opponent. We have a challenging road ahead, but one that I know will again lead to victory — because of the incredible community we have behind this campaign. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

Friend,
We have partnered with PolitiBrawl, a leading platform for in-depth discussions on pressing economic and political issues. Together, we're dedicated to addressing the critical need for action in protecting your wealth against the erosion of currency value.
In February 1974, under a cloak of secrecy...
A group of strategic advisors, along with then Secretary of State Henry Kissinger, debated a full-scale military invasion of Saudi Arabia.
The idea was to secure their oil fields for the benefit of the West.
Kissinger eventually came up with another plan.
**[The Petrodollar Scheme.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jr1uwyAAhJ8GtlhwYBMGhv7IHSp170gwjqmgEEzk5u0rW1XXu0_3nU0lhvlhiHomwBKmlQBEPBHg9rmlev9K72-n7frTn27DR-r3Fi8EaI_i_9G_lc4nG-Keqlc6GTFPTFJvuOJCgWsh6GLYDItJCe8GpjAriR5OnrUa-kFrwWkwYJBMgnPVg507LZjeUTt7Ji7aEskOT2eTr8FZvrbN1ppz6lxONJqltbIex0aC0eWYv4ONyTcb12vN97JzBGPJMbRwqXaLBCOtZipbiDGsgyKSXQ-Hy-k3AAD__-1SWD0)**
The idea was as simple as it was novel.
All oil would be traded in US dollars...which...would be reinvested in U.S. Treasuries and U.S. banks.
Those petrodollars would fuel lending around the globe.
Sparking global growth.
The plan worked.
Until now.
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jj1vwyAYhH8NbLFeXsDYA0M_5A6VunckBsdUUAgQ0fz7KlbV9e7RPWdiDn67a6KeCeLubSWIhD8RxOtnj-X2Fd_fTv3yI0_X8SPKR4svBLHds_tH_1YGF40Pj1S9Uqv5ZkFQp5liXCGbOae7XnFyclIo5TbNaGEarREWOAjAERCo1wgoQCBjSiJMw8xhBoWb2Rzw82yIgMMzmOiKXw2rrZtSUorDmiINem8t1-PYQnBZU0jf3oTomgn1UtItPziCS07BN38upodT3VMnuNCibe4-BF9HRQRcDtGa4m8AAAD__6PIWhY) Because today, Russia, China, India and other emerging countries want to kill the petrodollar with impunity.
They are already making arrangements to replace it with the Chinese Yuan.
When that happens on a big enough scale...
Every American retirement account will drop in value dramatically.
Now is the time to protect your retirement savings.
Before it’s too late.
For further information, please **[visit our website](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jr1uwyAAhJ8GtlhwYBMGhv7IHSp170gwjqmgEEzk5u0rW1XXu0_3nU0lhvlhiHomwBKmlQBEPBHg9rmlev9K72-n7frTn27DR-r3Fi8EaI_i_9G_lc4nG-Keqlc6GTFPTFJvuOJCgWsh6GLYDItJCe8GpjAriR5OnrUa-kFrwWkwYJBMgnPVg507LZjeUTt7Ji7aEskOT2eTr8FZvrbN1ppz6lxONJqltbIex0aC0eWYv4ONyTcb12vN97JzBGPJMbRwqXaLBCOtZipbiDGsgyKSXQ-Hy-k3AAD__-1SWD0)** or contact us (800)-203-0422.
Regards,

Paul Stone
CEO, Colonial Metals Group

Dear Friend,

With just about 200 days until Election Day, the stakes of my campaign against Jim Jordan could not be higher.

Jim Jordan has spent so much time cozying up to Donald Trump that he’s completely abandoned his constituents. **Luckily, I’ve seen firsthand how ready this district is for a new voice and a new leader who will FIGHT for the working-class, not MAGA extremists.

**Simply put: Our district, our state, and our nation can’t afford another term of Jim Jordan.

This November there’s so many crucial reasons to vote:

* We are voting for our freedom.
* We are voting to protect a woman's right to choose.
* We are voting to save Social Security and Medicare.
* **_We are voting to protect our democracy from MAGA Extremists like Jim Jordan!_**
* And so, so much more....

It’s clear that we have a winning message and that Democrats CAN flip this seat. **We just need to get our message out there to as many voters as possible!_

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friend, With just about 200 days until Election Day, the stakes of my campaign against Jim Jordan could not be higher. Jim Jordan has spent so much time cozying up to Donald Trump that he’s completely abandoned his constituents. Luckily, I’ve seen firsthand how ready this district is for a new voice and a new leader who will FIGHT for the working-class, not MAGA extremists. Simply put: Our district, our state, and our nation can’t afford another term of Jim Jordan. This November there’s so many crucial reasons to vote: We are voting for our freedom. We are voting to protect a woman's right to choose. We are voting to save Social Security and Medicare. We are voting to protect our democracy from MAGA Extremists like Jim Jordan! And so, so much more.... It’s clear that we have a winning message and that Democrats CAN flip this seat. We just need to get our message out there to as many voters as possible! Can I count on you to chip in today?_ | | | | | | | With Gratitude, Tamie W. | | | | | | | | | | | Tamie Wilson Candidate for Congress (OH-4) | | | | | Mail checks to: Tamie Wilson for US** 273 Saratoga St, Delaware, Ohio, 43015 | | |

name: Schrier for Congress
subject: We must end the attacks on abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
What may have seemed like a win for women’s rights was only just one of many steps in the long journey for anti-abortion activists whose mission is to end the right to bodily autonomy for all. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83452811/468443716/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjkyYjc4OC0wYTAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jWLpGy5_rDBChU1Y0hVybc3lmioe1v7ffOcAGcxiw0w=&emci=6dc7d35c-5afe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=ff92b788-0a00-ef11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

One year ago today, the Supreme Court of the United States ruled that the abortion pill, Mifepristone, would continue to be widely available for women to use. This ruling struck down a state ruling in Texas that tried to ban the usage of the FDA approved drug for all women.

What may have seemed like a win for women’s rights was only just one of many steps in the long journey for anti-abortion activists whose mission is to end the right to bodily autonomy for all. It started with the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , and still continues today with _another_ case against the abortion pill being argued _again_ in the Supreme Court.

**[Peter, today and every day is a stark reminder that our right to bodily autonomy will always be in jeopardy when Republicans are in charge. That’s why the work we are doing to take back the majority has never been so important. If you agree that we need leaders in charge who will _always_ protect the right to abortion, chip in $5 or whatever you can today. clean_body: What may have seemed like a win for women’s rights was only just one of many steps in the long journey for anti-abortion activists whose mission is to end the right to bodily autonomy for all. Peter, One year ago today, the Supreme Court of the United States ruled that the abortion pill, Mifepristone, would continue to be widely available for women to use. This ruling struck down a state ruling in Texas that tried to ban the usage of the FDA approved drug for all women. What may have seemed like a win for women’s rights was only just one of many steps in the long journey for anti-abortion activists whose mission is to end the right to bodily autonomy for all. It started with the overturning of Roe v. Wade , and still continues today with another case against the abortion pill being argued again in the Supreme Court. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- As a doctor, Kim has always been an advocate for safe and effective reproductive care. name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: The discussion on loneliness continues...on Tuesday, 4/23
body:
6:30 PM on Tuesday, April 23rd | | | |
---
| | |
# [Join me Tuesday, April 23rd in Atherton!](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=3e75f83e03&e=c0babbc643)
---
|
---
| [](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=1b2bb8fa24&e=c0babbc643) **Meet local author Kevin F. Adler in Atherton next Tuesday at 6:30 PM. I'll be there to learn more about him and his book, When We Walk By.**

Think about the last time that you saw or interacted with an unhoused person. What did you do? What did you say? Did you offer money or a smile, or did you avert your gaze?

_When We Walk By_ takes an urgent look at homelessness in America, showing us what we lose—in ourselves and as a society—when we choose to walk past and ignore our neighbors in shelters, insecure housing, or on the streets. And it shows what we stand to gain when we embrace our humanity and move toward evidence-based people-first, community-driven solutions, offering social analysis, economic and political histories, and the real stories of our unhoused neighbors.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---

name: Harry Dunn
subject: we're being outspent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Team – can we huddle real quick? I need to relay the level of seriousness this campaign just reached.
1️⃣ Public polling shows me and one of my opponents are neck-and-neck.
2️⃣ But that same opponent just collected a check for $600,000 from a PAC that backs election deniers and insurrection supporters.
3️⃣ So now we're being outspend on ads, and that's a dangerous spot to be in less than 4 weeks out from the election.
Billionaires who donate to Donald Trump, Ron Desantis, Ted Cruz and Lauren Boebert are trying to influence this election, folks. And if I can't raise $50,000 by tomorrow at midnight to renew my ads, they'll dominate the airwaves and crush our chance to defend democracy.
Can you chip in anything between me and Seth Moulton to help me win on May 14? We need someone seasoned at protecting democracy to serve in Maryland's 3rd, and that's me >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Together,
Harry

name: Mark Pukita, GFI Ohio
subject: 📣 Breaking: Election Integrity Lawsuit
body:
Don't miss the latest news on the Ohio election integrity lawsuit! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0b099d5e82&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| This week's 3 most important things you need to know or actions you need to take to help us recapture our cities, state, and nation.

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!
---
| | | **
OHIO ELECTION INTEGRITY!
LAWSUIT! • LITIGATION!
OHIOANS FIGHTING BACK!
THEY NEED OUR HELP!**

---
|
Help protect civil rights and Ohio's elections by donating to the [**United Sovereign Americans**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6f7422ca87&e=5c740fa3e2) (USA) lawsuit. USA, a grassroots group active in 27 states, uses voter roll analyses to initiate lawsuits safeguarding election integrity and civil rights, referencing federal laws and the US Constitution. In Ohio, significant voter roll discrepancies have been identified, necessitating immediate legal action to ensure fair elections. USA volunteers have identified many suspected anomalies in our voter rolls including:
* 1,046,431 ineligible or uncertain registration violations within the Ohio State voter roll database.
* 602,631 votes cast by ineligible or uncertain registrants.
* 1,162,079 more votes counted than voters who voted in the 2022 general election at the time of certification. No one knows who cast them.
* 713,262 apparent voting violations in excess of the legal standard of system accuracy for a valid federal election. Maximum allowable system errors for the 2022 general election in Ohio was 34.
* Certification, as defined by law, an attestation of accuracy and compliance, appears to have been fraudulent and illegal.

With the 2024 elections approaching, USA aims to file in 10 federal courts and needs $50,000 to launch the Ohio lawsuit. Economic challenges persist, but your support is crucial. Please donate generously to this critical initiative by clicking [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7052a34bec&e=5c740fa3e2) or on the image below.

Thank you!

---
| [](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=bfc930d11b&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| |
**OHIO PARENTS ALERT!
FIX OUR PUBLIC SCHOOLS!
BECOME A BOARD MEMBER!
HERE'S HOW!**

---
|
Next year, in November of 2025, all public school districts in Ohio will have at least 2 school board seats up for re-election, or if there is no incumbent for the seat, up for election.

We need concerned citizens who are for parental rights, a return to the basics of education, and completely depoliticizing Ohio's public schools, to run for these school board seats.

Anyone can run & there is no need for any kind of special qualifications, experience, or skills. All that's needed is a desire & common sense.

And, the Ohio School Board Constitutional Coalition (OSBCC) can help you every step of the way. 40% of the candidates they helped last election won!

If you are interested, or know someone who is, please, please, please make sure you (or they) visit the OSBCC website & register to start getting OSBCC's regular emails & training notices [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9a1eff6f73&e=5c740fa3e2) or by clicking on the image below

If you (or they) are anxious to start preparing to run for a school board seat, go to (or have them go to) the contact page & send OSBCC an email or fill out the contact form [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e909467eba&e=5c740fa3e2). The volunteers at OSBCC will get back to you to get you started off strong. It's not too early to start your campaign!

THANK YOU!

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=525d850949&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| |
**CONVENIENT TEXT (SMS)
"SHORT CODE" KEYWORDS
HELP FREEDOM GROW!**

---
|
Phone text (SMS) short-code keywords are specific words or phrases assigned to a short numeric code, typically five or six digits, used for sending and receiving text messages, especially in marketing and customer service. When users text a keyword to a designated short code, they can subscribe to services, participate in promotions, or request information. The system automatically processes these messages based on the keyword. For example, texting "JOIN" to a certain number might subscribe a user to a promotional newsletter.

The Grassroots Freedom Initiative (GFI) has implemented several text short-code keywords for your use, and we’ll likely be adding many more over time. They are:

**1) GFI**
Text “GFI” to 66866 and follow the prompts to add an email directly into our mailing list to receive emails like this one you are reading!
_* If you are already subscribed & receiving this email, please refrain from sending this keyword. *_

**2) LIST**
Text “LIST” to 66866 and follow the prompts to be sent a list of the most important grassroots websites and organizations that you need to be a part of!

**3) X**
Are you an X (formerly known as Twitter) user? If so, text “X” to 66866 and follow the prompts to join our "Community" on X! It's called "The Ohio X Brigade". Don't know what an X Community is? Don't worry, we'll help you out!

Use these keywords and short-code with your friends and neighbors to get them introduced to self-governance activism in Ohio! Thank you (and them!) for joining us!

---
|
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c18a8117a2&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
| [April 14, 2024 - - This Week's Must-Know Trio!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=31be42f356&e=5c740fa3e2)

[April 7, 2024 - Secure American Freedoms This Week!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a8a2ef9333&e=5c740fa3e2)

[February 18, 2024 - Vote on or before March 19th!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=92e3d2c4b3&e=5c740fa3e2)

[January 14, 2024 - ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=88b28aeb3a&e=5c740fa3e2)[Ohio Liberator List!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=40c6bd18c2&e=5c740fa3e2 "URGENT! Ohio Liberator List!")

[November 9, 2023 - What now?

October 15, 2023 - Critical Volunteer Needs!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f4f220f9c3&e=5c740fa3e2)

[August 12, 2023 - Download Our FREE App!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=dcd07bb851&e=5c740fa3e2)

[July 30, 2023 - Select Better Candidates

July 23, 2023 - Help Trevor Cain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=cdef2eea5b&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=48d81650fe) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=48d81650fe).

---

If you are already subscribed & receiving this email, please refrain from sending this keyword. 2) LIST Text “LIST” to 66866 and follow the prompts to be sent a list of the most important grassroots websites and organizations that you need to be a part of! 3) X Are you an X (formerly known as Twitter) user? If so, text “X” to 66866 and follow the prompts to join our "Community" on X! It's called "The Ohio X Brigade". Don't know what an X Community is? Don't worry, we'll help you out! Use these keywords and short-code with your friends and neighbors to get them introduced to self-governance activism in Ohio! Thank you (and them!) for joining us! | | | | | Prior Issues of This Email You May Find Valuable | "URGENT! Ohio Liberator List!" | | | Thank you for being a GFI person as part of the GFI network. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here! Best regards, Mark Pukita A GFI Person mark@gfiohio.com 614-499-0599 (c) | | Copyright © 2024 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved.

name: Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy
subject: I’m asking you for just $9. Let me tell you why
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
My time as a Navy SEAL taught me the cost of service and sacrifice; I will bring my battle-tested leadership experience to the United States Senate and be a voice every American can count on to consistently put voters' interests FIRST. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=28f050512d284e6298d5aaf707d98b94&_e=Q8524geP6p_ilzgJRjHoiGKzw-8u4uAwF2Lei01EwKm8AwIa6e0dMqsDwJHNSxj-V2zgKC3lFiOFNTYfO2rv-BM-oXuUyKJJRgchoklNutltTdfYIeTc8hfKbPaiJWCMCm-DCNrJVIVcHsD6wbdWHBNGUQldGf6OwTiHh1ndHGfAa5bsvFXfuXyCrUcs_wey-LdE8Xz-lO4R5P3EhqSoD08oEewRHp7I67x3TcByrWjfOJvxVwEixd59nIk0Yoj71NK8BndRIGHrzTOjxEaCpYUEAUzUqEiQp-YrH8wAo0JRHkafvODwTDKeUt7woVhyLEZV0G77cWylZJjhEfHE4G5YOFGy-oA6Ghh_oK43ulrv3pcN1C1sTCrp9FlI2Td3mSxj8GJQsX0W25gSC6WWxZ5H7TbQKhZ6W1VCMCuSMC4%3D)

That’s what it will take to help me stay competitive in this race. Our fundraising has fallen off – and honestly, it’s happening at a _**TERRIBLE**_ time. We’re preparing to report our 1st quarter fundraising numbers to the FEC, and we can’t leave a single penny on the table.

This race is getting more expensive every day and is shaping up to be **the most expensive Senate race in the country**. This is an irrefutable fact.

[**CHIP IN $9
HELP TIM FINISH April ON TOP->** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=28f050512d284e6298d5aaf707d98b94&_e=Q8524geP6p_ilzgJRjHoiGKzw-8u4uAwF2Lei01EwKm8AwIa6e0dMqsDwJHNSxj-V2zgKC3lFiOFNTYfO2rv-BM-oXuUyKJJRgchoklNutltTdfYIeTc8hfKbPaiJWCMCm-DCNrJVIVcHsD6wbdWHBNGUQldGf6OwTiHh1ndHGfAa5bsvFXfuXyCrUcs_wey-LdE8Xz-lO4R5P3EhqSoD08oEewRHp7I67x3TcByrWjfOJvxVwEixd59nIk0Yoj78S4GOg5z8jkQ2tdUPu12dBLP8zFc0ozH9VmYeXqZEG123eVtezzkBrPf1Hvgug5A0bUGPwZQnhinWKjr97rKamN6OuS-3rfGHlvqJyBQX6un4SWbWCgp7OfgxOrAEmccQ2MsHlodH9wUxVNsfu5X5jvcH5WIHV16HSJHhKrM0yE%3D)

But don’t take my word for it - _**$120 million in advertising has already been reserved on Montana airwaves, with tens of millions more soon.**_

Here is why**[I’m asking you for $9 today](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=28f050512d284e6298d5aaf707d98b94&_e=Q8524geP6p_ilzgJRjHoiGKzw-8u4uAwF2Lei01EwKm8AwIa6e0dMqsDwJHNSxj-V2zgKC3lFiOFNTYfO2rv-BM-oXuUyKJJRgchoklNutltTdfYIeTc8hfKbPaiJWCMCm-DCNrJVIVcHsD6wbdWHBNGUQldGf6OwTiHh1ndHGfAa5bsvFXfuXyCrUcs_wey-LdE8Xz-lO4R5P3EhqSoD08oEewRHp7I67x3TcByrWjfOJvxVwEixd59nIk0Yoj7xBIgxQPci99b344GTKFzXx9NtVINm09vq0HmDgSPWrHNTLWpZ0o3MMGue4DjOcF02jYKNCu2e1jXarU6OrN_FozZ4jAJt05SwzC2zlxwCl-RrwfH7wRZ4pWW9terKmkxckyu5-is150qsyBusgth0bIyGin5bsMYcaNdzSTMKqs%3D)** \- our average April donation to date: My opponent is a career politician who not only **votes with Biden 91%** of the time and tries to cover it up back here at home, but he’s the top Senate fundraiser in the country.**>From January to February, his small-dollar donations online increased by more than 30%!**

[**CHIP IN $9
HELP TIM FINISH April ON TOP->** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=28f050512d284e6298d5aaf707d98b94&_e=Q8524geP6p_ilzgJRjHoiGKzw-8u4uAwF2Lei01EwKm8AwIa6e0dMqsDwJHNSxj-V2zgKC3lFiOFNTYfO2rv-BM-oXuUyKJJRgchoklNutltTdfYIeTc8hfKbPaiJWCMCm-DCNrJVIVcHsD6wbdWHBNGUQldGf6OwTiHh1ndHGfAa5bsvFXfuXyCrUcs_wey-LdE8Xz-lO4R5P3EhqSoD08oEewRHp7I67x3TcByrWjfOJvxVwEixd59nIk0Yoj7R5tqfI819_9_mpqQBMz-NofVAvLvgURzdZL29Tbm-9hs25qVpgKh1vGHa47ZPALefml7VXIiv1HKO7iCzdtwP_yMYtlFKFXM1ZocE5FYzDOjiZFwP-TQRDPchr_1B-m1O8JOJcapaKO8lZ0O-NIa0Xh1xO9XBgDc4Y-MJILY6dE%3D)

Your help today will enable me to keep spreading my conservative America First message to voters while fighting back against the lies that career politician Jon Tester pushes out against me.

My time as a Navy SEAL taught me the cost of service and sacrifice; I will bring my battle-tested leadership experience to the United States Senate and be a voice every American can count on to consistently put voters' interests FIRST.

**[Please consider donating to my campaign for the U.S. Senate today:](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=28f050512d284e6298d5aaf707d98b94&_e=Q8524geP6p_ilzgJRjHoiGKzw-8u4uAwF2Lei01EwKm8AwIa6e0dMqsDwJHNSxj-V2zgKC3lFiOFNTYfO2rv-BM-oXuUyKJJRgchoklNutltTdfYIeTc8hfKbPaiJWCMCm-DCNrJVIVcHsD6wbdWHBNGUQldGf6OwTiHh1ndHGfAa5bsvFXfuXyCrUcs_wey-LdE8Xz-lO4R5P3EhqSoD08oEewRHp7I67x3TcByrWjfOJvxVwEixd59nIk0Yoj7HLrETn6E5lbE1InrWMTqT5ELMf7agdb25GvOdSkJ5huQxawHe0pcSxL2TAH0j6qtno_hB66QK-3Jw5h3tzXRg-RFM-RXwTLhy1fPJ5q2x9ttNvNJKPUOE89bucWCBzG_QnpWl_2ZaEtAV_wMyl3MvM5RK-EOUuOAmyjq1ZKFCgo%3D)**

[**CHIP IN $9
HELP TIM FINISH April ON TOP->** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=28f050512d284e6298d5aaf707d98b94&_e=Q8524geP6p_ilzgJRjHoiGKzw-8u4uAwF2Lei01EwKm8AwIa6e0dMqsDwJHNSxj-V2zgKC3lFiOFNTYfO2rv-BM-oXuUyKJJRgchoklNutltTdfYIeTc8hfKbPaiJWCMCm-DCNrJVIVcHsD6wbdWHBNGUQldGf6OwTiHh1ndHGfAa5bsvFXfuXyCrUcs_wey-LdE8Xz-lO4R5P3EhqSoD08oEewRHp7I67x3TcByrWjfOJvxVwEixd59nIk0Yoj7gxRcX6X-17EiDbEronINX0QKF5Svm1OQTGvIYmZbTy3zpIBOdoKSql0AGIdQryWrs1ILfbB9r4ZqpEumL05guC9T-2djeCCZX1j6D7je7S7MPAUWsfWU2x37VegYofqdSLvk_xiUReaq0ylHsMftMxMZL8QvKdlfAC7MT4QU3Bg%3D)

I’m in this race to bring common sense back to Washington, D.C. and save our country.

_**I hope you will stand with me in this critical moment.**_****

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0c7c9a9c341d46afbb349434cc9ccf06&_e=TSHmogdAlHYMDLcThoHyRl1M0cTNGuZb0ECBi0i3TppOo3HCZl6dokvBK_rsYWOPcb7xkslVr3HdTRe6VK46fzqC4vSM2b6vgihakL9Sk0pvLTlG3ruGbQikqctOkz98RsIh1v2-t9JWEx58sdgmXgA2tfi4x5HnIsDQ2leqxc7ypoDExQyJYLOi9ZDLBAdYs-0IYKdSQXz6SjcynbpMUuwsl9MbWwhOGXbzJXd2PDRICXC84aiRKWypWuqbUyEmauUO8TbURmiyztZQILxCsKgi2RQFSOcJkuInWqgx-AB5MaeaYBUM4gG3Ab8lCG0gDLBF0QDfiymHibWtOt2kE-56z-4QoQmvEcBxrobEa0h_AJFXP85LxHGvObL7Cgni1wSVNJm_mJ_MuUH2eLMB_hY4cRx3zOv4lXJTyRR1rvp3Hm6PmyErRjjMnJLCnDZu)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0c7c9a9c341d46afbb349434cc9ccf06&_e=TSHmogdAlHYMDLcThoHyRl1M0cTNGuZb0ECBi0i3TppOo3HCZl6dokvBK_rsYWOPcb7xkslVr3HdTRe6VK46fzqC4vSM2b6vgihakL9Sk0pvLTlG3ruGbQikqctOkz98RsIh1v2-t9JWEx58sdgmXgA2tfi4x5HnIsDQ2leqxc7ypoDExQyJYLOi9ZDLBAdYs-0IYKdSQXz6SjcynbpMUuwsl9MbWwhOGXbzJXd2PDRICXC84aiRKWypWuqbUyEmauUO8TbURmiyztZQILxCsKgi2RQFSOcJkuInWqgx-ADWDN5WcfugrUV_Umw8J9w90w7Pw78UP-W254Nb4XOVpcVJywMD8ohaErxmin1lhQwYlDgv8BCsf04WvfjVYhguq4k2IwPNX2gSR5q345_7zmelBZdO8ZG-BtFB14GaKsNYEShMof73uOnbRjbi3ct6)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0c7c9a9c341d46afbb349434cc9ccf06&_e=TSHmogdAlHYMDLcThoHyRl1M0cTNGuZb0ECBi0i3TppOo3HCZl6dokvBK_rsYWOPcb7xkslVr3HdTRe6VK46fzqC4vSM2b6vgihakL9Sk0pvLTlG3ruGbQikqctOkz98RsIh1v2-t9JWEx58sdgmXgA2tfi4x5HnIsDQ2leqxc7ypoDExQyJYLOi9ZDLBAdYs-0IYKdSQXz6SjcynbpMUuwsl9MbWwhOGXbzJXd2PDRICXC84aiRKWypWuqbUyEmauUO8TbURmiyztZQILxCsKgi2RQFSOcJkuInWqgx-ACgQehmv_VOKkySbjat7LULy5GWNJ1CilD1z-AiSnahCdlLmmKyCcDtPteWsue-OI-Kf5968Q6a7-uk-eupjHg-bjK1LGaO8U9OkNzqXJZaOceaprkIJsMfHsCKs0GDzVGz47BgowrqD3k0O5-OAWWV).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

Peter — It’s Andrei’s Campaign Manager, Emma, here. I’m reaching out because we’re getting into crunch time! We’re OFFICIALLY 100 days from our July 30 primary, and there’s no backing down now. We’re charging full-speed-ahead to defend abortion rights, build an economy that works for everybody, and protect our democracy and freedom. [Any amount you pitch in — whether it’s $1, $10, or $100 — will make a meaningful impact as we enter the next phase of this race. If you’re able, will you please make a contribution to fuel Andrei’s campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83456425/468451245/-1061249283?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240421_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGNkMmEyNTMtMTEwMC1lZjExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wIS6tdWOVYqjg-o6FHZvzGSCLnpAQSkgc3d55goRdI0=) **I keep coming back to this number: 1%** That’s by how much David Schweikert won in 2022. He’s one of the most vulnerable Republicans in the House, and Democrats’ best chance at flipping a seat in Arizona. **But to defeat Schweikert this November, Democrats need a nominee who can build a coalition big enough to win this toss-up district.** Andrei’s experience as an Arizona Assistant Attorney General prosecuting border smuggling rings, serving in uniform after 9/11, and leading a business that created thousands of jobs is exactly the background that the swing voters who will decide this race are excited about. So our job over the next 100 days is to make sure as many voters as possible hear Andrei’s background and plans to make progress on all the issues that matter to Arizonans. I mean it when I say we can’t do it without you, Peter, so I’m humbly asking for your support: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = With your help, we can defeat David Schweikert and replace him with a proven leader who will deliver for Arizonans. On behalf of all of us on Team Andrei, thank you. Yours in earnest, Emma Gore Campaign Manager Andrei for Arizona PO Box 26058 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States ** | mailto:info@andreiforarizona.com | Paid for by Andrei for Arizona | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U.S. Navy Reserves. subject: Most vulnerable Democrat NAMED
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA<-
body:
->-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5436800.2369.1.000fa58ca83335de43d217b40d24c061 )<-<-

->_ \*\* \*\* _<-

Fellow Conservative,

It’s becoming clearer by the day that this Senate race in Montana is going to be the race that will decide control of the Senate.

But don’t take my word for it. Recently, the political newspaper The Hill published an updated list of the five Senate seats most likely to flip.

Can you guess which race was listed at the top of the article?

_ \*\*If you guessed Montana, you’d be correct.\*\* _

If polls are to be believed, then this race is too close to call. \*\*A survey released this week had our campaign leading our opponent by three points, a statistical dead-heat.\*\*

\*\*I’m asking you to spare $3 right now if you can. $3 from several thousand conservatives will allow us to start reaching out to voters following the whirlwind end-of-quarter push. ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5436800.2370.1.bee78bed8293c030174345977dd895c5 )\*\*

-> \*\*CHIP IN $3→\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5436800.2371.1.049753062332d71fe56bc651dca08179 )<-

\*\*Your $3 contribution will be put toward: ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5436800.2372.1.c59714c251c1d73f5a5ff1f95653d69c )\*\*

1. Paying for airtime on Montana TV markets

1. Buying yard signs that will increase our campaign’s visibility around our great state

In a race as close as the one we’re facing, every dollar is make or break.

\*\*Please let us know if we can count on you for your support today! ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5436800.2373.1.98b82e20e6c0cb43b9f694893ae466a5 )\*\*

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy

Former Navy SEAL

Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

->

\* \* \*

“

"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY — NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY — NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." ( ) \ \ \ <- -> ( ) ( ) ( ) <- -> -> ->PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA<- <- ->

name: Bob Casey
subject: A quick hello
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Hi Peter,
Greetings from the turnpike! I’m writing to you as my team and I head out for the On Our Side Road Trip.
**Pennsylvania is my home, it always will be -- and I’m grateful to be traveling across the Commonwealth and hearing from the Pennsylvanians I fight for down in Washington.**
Whether you live out in Erie County or Westmoreland County, or out in Lancaster County or Bucks County, I’m working to make sure we are a Commonwealth in life as well as in name.
I’m looking forward to building support for my campaign, as November is going to be a tough fight. We’re in an uphill battle to defend this seat and keep Pennsylvania blue.
[**With that in mind, will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can today to help us keep our campaign going strong?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240421-1?refcode=em20240421-1&refcode2=2750_552475_N3rHiE&akid=2750%2E552475%2EN3rHiE)
I look forward to meeting some of you on the road — and to sharing updates in these emails during breaks in our travels.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=2750%2E552475%2EN3rHiE)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=2750%2E552475%2EN3rHiE)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

subject: Response missing from dpwillis67@gmail.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
Peter, five presidents in history, including Donald Trump, captured enough Electoral College votes to win the election, but actually lost in the popular vote. In fact, in 2016, Hillary Clinton walked away with nearly 3 million more votes than Trump.
This system should trouble us all! The fate of our nation's leadership should not be left to chance or complicated electoral calculations.
Prominent elected officials, like Representative Jamie Raskin, have voiced their support for dismantling the Electoral College:
https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240421_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917 [https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240421_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
Please take 30 seconds right now to tell us before midnight: [https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240421_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
Should we abolish the Electoral College?
YES [https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240421_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917] NO [https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240421_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
The Electoral College allows minority rule, bypassing basic democratic principles. It favors white and rural areas, reducing the value of more diverse populations and minorities.
Above all, the Electoral College ensures that only a handful of swing states receive any attention during the presidential race.
One person should equal one vote.
To gauge the pulse of our community, we need 294 more responses from PA. Let your voice be heard: Should we abolish the Electoral College? [https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240421_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
Thank you for your participation,
Defeat Republicans

Defeat Republicans

body:
Your number is being called today, Friend.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ed367d3566a149cc8f1a477c013e9ad2&_e=yTXMwrOHUcMhMnkTCHcP0Llo_91aV5u3-JJbQBFAyhkF26YHHWOF1biUPZpZy6c_HmtT8JT2uNeGDYACa-AE25OZoxuDagzwnnybIrvaOz9s6HhEWsRZab6LOMpEQSSP7FqvCGwpgXmA6uzwOQnxvXHkpMz3L6_fDCWRkNRJDm_VG-YAGf4zrvlpElSucsw7P6ar2-jIy-KWYcW5SDXCJqf38777ukh9-2bazRbGDx-3bbvR8rJd9D6_z0Dt7hPQSd5EYmfYV5iF9eruZf-rYUVzr6QOLY8fiWQCZ6JdJsKWP3EwWbX8fK8pDa5fYgg8YmVPYuZgkQzPa_AeYhn5IXBr7o3xKlcbrrNCYe6sQjst77Mb5BIlX6weJOMRxLVYP-BxjUPXOcy-POy6j7hXpDmKiWuFR68kWzkfN74CA9s%3D "Rob O'Neill")

**I put a bullet through Osama bin Laden's skull, Friend. **

It's Rob O'Neill. I'm a Navy SEAL. At my core, I am built to serve this country; I will do _**WHATEVER**_ it takes to make America safe and prosperous.

I hope you share that sentiment. And if you don't, then the rest of this message just isn't for you. Feel free to delete this email and move on with your life if you're not committed to American excellence.

**If you 're still reading, then I thank you for your commitment. And now, I'm counting on you to rise to the occasion, Friend. **

My Navy SEAL brother, Senior Chief Derrick Van Orden, needs your help. He served our nation for over 25 years in the Navy and fought extremists from the Taliban to Al-Qaeda. He's one of the most patriotic & hard-working men I know. Today, he's still serving our country by representing true American patriots like you & me in Congress.

Is "puerile" giving boys a bad reputation? The adjective (used to describe something immature, childish, or altogether silly) comes from the Latin word "puer," meaning "boy." The French word "puéril" came from the Latin "puerilis," and when "puerile" entered English in the early 16th century, it was used in the sense of "like a boy." ...

body:
Did you see our newest additions to the Official Democratic Store featuring Congressman John Lewis? | |
---
Derek -- You won’t want to miss **the newest addition to the Official Democratic Store, featuring Congressman John Lewis.** Congressman Lewis was a trailblazer whose impact on the American Civil Rights Movement and in Congress helped shape democracy today as we know it today. **We hope you’ll join us in honoring his legacy by shopping the**[**Democratic Trailblazers collection**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtU55R90tXmTx8rCFJkj1yIgqiJBZ8aNpS8f0Vka5AzngZ5CL8iAyxChuxZvhUyDIDZL8XVX4_pGZycVXlA1HTY2oDHDi7igERiWvW8AhmmfAXHaSjCZjoJSuvfD4Fc5bGSqL67e55p3lgVUh8DDSQsLjHuhWY6mp6znESEuNU_-QpF7EAwT8dvk1GaPHDBHARVV8HdH57SRTrGHiKYZ2UdS_CEkFP5OTU_XZUa029zdVdDBuqwYT7FADIBjFdfYR4hEZmHm44b7X62DAVIarQYwzhLuyRcohV8AMeAft0_UKG8wLYWRkVN1sbE6r1Ie-PamU6ahukDgPCgSl4A2WdtlOzkrIaJxqcTNXnf1f0Fcj4G3mNdDVpGKXYo1RTStPhQ/45p/gqG_YlWqT7qFAl0rrN9ANg/h0/h001.8G7Vth0U6SjGISdiImAGaYjrxOimFLAWL8bzhqSecYI)**today!** Happy shopping, ❤️ Emma
Merchandise Director
Democratic National Committee [](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtU55R90tXmTx8rCFJkj1yIgqiJBZ8aNpS8f0Vka5AzngZ5CL8iAyxChuxZvhUyDIDZL8XVX4_pGZycVXlA1HTY2oDHDi7igERiWvW8AhmmfAXHaSjCZjoJSuvfD4Fc5bGSqL67e55p3lgVUh8DDSQsLjHuhWY6mp6znESEuNU_-QpF7EAwT8dvk1GaPHDBHARVV8HdH57SRTrGHiKYZ2UdQdhVrbykHUbpLqzdLyM0uttq9mkMvDTAHJ5ylAYXp9_C7RANF93NX0akzpSbVxWsnqnd5RtfcRSN5-W5IEM4qtdKoihvr33hfFkMNoF7QR5dBBmuGON79yf71QMG0JUEVjRmwVxRZlhH5K8_twjQ1hQrsV9SqYoWLndZabx0aJyA/45p/gqG_YlWqT7qFAl0rrN9ANg/h1/h001.U_ON8qF5jXyRltZ0vsTo_nBgExIAmjVrPpO47Bd_8T8)

Subject: New TODAY: John Lewis Merch
Sender: DNC Merch Team
Date: April 15, 2024 Team -- Today, we’re excited to share with you that we’ve added **_brand new_** products to the Democratic Trailblazers collection **featuring Congressman John Lewis.**
[](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtU55R90tXmTx8rCFJkj1yIgqiJBZ8aNpS8f0Vka5AzngZ5CL8iAyxChuxZvhUyDIDZL8XVX4_pGZycVXlA1HTY2oDHDi7igERiWvW8AhmmfAXHaSjCZjoJSuvfD4Fc5bGSqL67e55p3lgVUh8DDSQsLjHuhWY6mp6znESEuNU_-QpF7EAwT8dvk1GaPHDBHARVV8HdH57SRTrGHiKYZ2UdTosGy8OMOEp2nkEncO40-E7DZx7mDsFj9oOfMiCLNblrbOvtR7FrR8cFi7Dyj2Lc0sPMG1bCHlH7cnIBIWDwcj70ZKuOstcGMDlqHEAqddtJBBGIKj5fdMwva7Ywmltkv9XHI6ItWvoMfYuRQYlCSTnh8ryLn2nv9tqBKGbIzqNg/45p/gqG_YlWqT7qFAl0rrN9ANg/h2/h001.yKZmU2IYZP_kINBbY3gFJAbhOtrqXaB--pJ3a0GCHCk) It’s impossible to summarize Congressman Lewis’s legacy, but here are some of the ways he blazed trails for our Party and this country:
* **He championed civil rights** as chairman of the Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee (which he helped found **_on this day_** in 1960!).

* **He led the March on Selma** , bravely crossing the Edmund Pettus Bridge on Bloody Sunday.

* **He served as a U.S. representative** for more than 30 years, earning himself the nickname “the conscience of Congress.”

[**Celebrate Congressman Lewis’s legacy in the Democratic Party with these new designs inspired by his legendary call to “get in good trouble, necessary trouble, and redeem the soul of America.”**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtU55R90tXmTx8rCFJkj1yIgqiJBZ8aNpS8f0Vka5AzngZ5CL8iAyxChuxZvhUyDIDZL8XVX4_pGZycVXlA1HTY2oDHDi7igERiWvW8AhmmfAXHaSjCZjoJSuvfD4Fc5bGSqL67e55p3lgVUh8DDSQsLjHuhWY6mp6znESEuNU_-QpF7EAwT8dvk1GaPHDBHARVV8HdH57SRTrGHiKYZ2UdQKHrcgzf_WZkBx6oIhV7AH7BMSMsGOIhroTJsm_FqjshldLixbKA2iyWe7I9bCAr9h_hwS0X7ZP4QXfcejJFTKoMi2AUGG4JAHu_gkfzVdQuYueiYNM7As2IFB5tpMvWnZAbQ9ZyW9HgPZ8AQWf2HiAHZajD0T-7RnW0YFHsrXaA/45p/gqG_YlWqT7qFAl0rrN9ANg/h3/h001.eWzbFzObs_hg_o9--0goYAzknd2eKMctzaGVvI08SX0) Your purchase supports the next generation of trailblazing Democrats up and down the ballot fighting to protect and build upon John Lewis’s legacy. clean_body: Did you see our newest additions to the Official Democratic Store featuring Congressman John Lewis? | | Derek -- You won’t want to miss the newest addition to the Official Democratic Store, featuring Congressman John Lewis. Congressman Lewis was a trailblazer whose impact on the American Civil Rights Movement and in Congress helped shape democracy today as we know it today. We hope you’ll join us in honoring his legacy by shopping the! Happy shopping, ❤️ Emma Merchandise Director Democratic National Committee \-----Forwarded message----- Subject: New TODAY: John Lewis Merch Sender: DNC Merch Team Date: April 15, 2024 Team -- Today, we’re excited to share with you that we’ve added brand new products to the Democratic Trailblazers collection featuring Congressman John Lewis. It’s impossible to summarize Congressman Lewis’s legacy, but here are some of the ways he blazed trails for our Party and this country: He championed civil rights as chairman of the Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee (which he helped found on this day in 1960!). He led the March on Selma , bravely crossing the Edmund Pettus Bridge on Bloody Sunday. He served as a U.S. representative for more than 30 years, earning himself the nickname “the conscience of Congress.” Your purchase supports the next generation of trailblazing Democrats up and down the ballot fighting to protect and build upon John Lewis’s legacy. Thank you, ❤️ Emma Merchandise Director Democratic National Committee | | | | ---|---|--- Text JOIN to 43367 Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . body:
https://engelforarizona.com [https://engelforarizona.com]
Peter,
At the end of March, Kirsten stopped by the Sierra Vista Herald office for a Q&A with their editorial team.
It was a great conversation, and they talked about everything from reproductive rights to the border to how this year’s race is different from 2022.
If you want to check it out, you can read it here >> [https://www.myheraldreview.com/news/elections/kirsten-engel-speaks-with-the-herald-review-about-what-will-be-different-in-her-rematch/article_13b745ce-ec9e-11ee-a5fa-ef28c3b18616.html]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_042124_QA_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_042124_QA_act]
Here are a couple of highlights from the article:
On representing rural communities:
“One of the biggest divides that we really need to bridge is the rural/urban divide. That's something that I experienced in the legislature and there are so many issues that I think I am the strongest candidate to speak to the people in rural areas such as water, such as making sure we've got rural broadband in all parts of this district, such as health care.”
On reproductive rights:
“ This is an issue that women should be able to make for themselves; [...] And what we're seeing is politics getting in the middle of it. Juan Ciscomani has been voting with the Republicans for national abortion restrictions. And this is not what people want or deserve.”
On the border:
“We saw a bipartisan border security immigration reform bill that could have been passed that would make significant strides in terms of border security, in terms of bringing in the resources to process the surge in migrants to deal with the humanitarian issues and the security issues. Let's remember, this was a bill that was labeled by The Wall Street Journal as the most restrictive immigration bill to be proposed in decades. And we also know that the Border Patrol Union endorsed this bill, and what do the Republicans do? What does Juan Ciscomani do? Trump says he wants to keep the border a crisis, and they walk away from this bill. That's just that's the dysfunction. ”
Kirsten is the voice we need fighting for Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District in Congress.
This is going to be one of the most competitive races in the country, and control of the House hangs in the balance.
Will you help us take on the Republican PACs trying to defeat our campaign by chipping in now? With your support, we can elect Kirsten this November >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_042124_QA_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_042124_QA_act]
Thank you!
Team Engel
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_042124_QA_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_042124_QA_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_042124_QA_act]

name: =?utf-8?q?Katie_Porter=E2=80=99s_Truth_to_Power_PAC?=
subject: Members of Congress should work for their constituents, not their stock portfolio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=38835%2E3422442%2Em_Ex43)
Derek,
A 2022 New York Times report found that nearly a fifth of all Members of Congress reported a stock trade that reveals a possible conflict of interest.
The American people are right to question if their elected officials are working for them.
That’s why since getting to Congress, Katie Porter has led the fight to ban congressional stock trading and introduced the Stock Act 2.0, a strong, substantive ban on stock trading for Members and their spouses.
This isn’t just a Republican or a Democrat issue, leaders from both sides are trading stocks related to the industries they oversee. **And leadership on both sides of the aisle has failed to ever bring this legislation up for a vote. It’s one of the issues Katie’s prioritizing in her final eight months in Congress.**
**Truth to Power only supports candidates who pledge to continue our fight against congressional stock trading.** Only by electing new leaders who will stand up for what’s right and implement a ban, can we start to clean up the corruption in Washington.
**[We can’t do this without you. Can you chip in $5 to help Katie Porter continue her fight against corruption by electing Democrats to Congress who will stand against stock trading?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20240420?refcode=em20240421-38835&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=38835_3422442_m_Ex43&akid=38835%2E3422442%2Em_Ex43)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20240420?refcode=em20240421-38835&refcode2=38835_3422442_m_Ex43&akid=38835%2E3422442%2Em_Ex43)
Thanks so much,
Team TTP

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20240421-38835&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=38835_3422442_m_Ex43&akid=38835%2E3422442%2Em_Ex43)**

The American people are right to question if their elected officials are working for them. That’s why since getting to Congress, Katie Porter has led the fight to ban congressional stock trading and introduced the Stock Act 2.0, a strong, substantive ban on stock trading for Members and their spouses. This isn’t just a Republican or a Democrat issue, leaders from both sides are trading stocks related to the industries they oversee. And leadership on both sides of the aisle has failed to ever bring this legislation up for a vote. It’s one of the issues Katie’s prioritizing in her final eight months in Congress. Truth to Power only supports candidates who pledge to continue our fight against congressional stock trading. Only by electing new leaders who will stand up for what’s right and implement a ban, can we start to clean up the corruption in Washington. Thanks so much, Team TTP Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. Paid for by Truth to Power PAC

subject: I’m running to protect reproductive rights.

body:
Mariannette Miller-Meeks and Republicans across the country continue to push extreme anti-choice measures that threaten our fundamental rights.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83461353/468460752/180180251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDFhOGViYS0xYTAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cBF2Vsf2PjUHi2V1eVfYirGD63y3zWEp661U8r1VljQ=)
Peter,

One year ago, the Supreme Court of the United States ruled to preserve access to mifepristone, a critical medication used for abortion care. This decision blocked a dangerous ban imposed by a Texas U.S. District Judge and reaffirmed the importance of protecting reproductive rights.

But the battle is far from over. **Mariannette Miller-Meeks and Republicans across the country continue to push extreme anti-choice measures that threaten our fundamental rights.**

I’m proud to be running for Congress to stand up for reproductive rights and ensure that every person has the freedom to make their own healthcare decisions. I’m incredibly honored to be endorsed by Emily’s List, Reproductive Freedom for All, and the Planned Parenthood Action Fund.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83461355/468460753/182211867?refcode=em24_240421_reprit_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240421_reprit_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&refcode2=fd1a8eba-1a00-ef11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDFhOGViYS0xYTAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cBF2Vsf2PjUHi2V1eVfYirGD63y3zWEp661U8r1VljQ=)

subject: This is my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83461342/468460712/2034486384?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3733-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjBjZWE3My0xYTAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p_8GnFn4lgHUb89liirM_CTRU1vtEPYbDwUrKmje1Go=)
| | Hi friend, it’s Jacky Rosen. The story below is a special one about my faith and how I first got involved in politics. **This one means a lot to me, so I hope you’ll take a moment to read it.** But if you don’t have the time to take a look right now, [**could you still chip in $5 to help me keep Nevada and the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83461343/468460713/2034486384?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk3733-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjBjZWE3My0xYTAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p_8GnFn4lgHUb89liirM_CTRU1vtEPYbDwUrKmje1Go=)
---
Friend,

My career in public service began in 2016, when I was recruited to flip a competitive House seat blue. I was serving as the president of Nevada’s largest synagogue, and looking back now, that was incredibly fitting – **because my Jewish faith and values have always been at the very core of my work in Congress.**
In fact, my decision to run for public office was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam _–_ _to leave the world a better place than how we found it._
I’m so proud of the progress we've made in the years since. And in the face of growing antisemitism, attacks on reproductive freedom, and threats to tear down our democracy, I'm as committed as ever to making positive change happen. **But** **I****need _your_ help.**
**Right now, polls are showing me locked in a dead heat with Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate – who just set a major GOP fundraising record in the race that will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking:**
[**If you're with me in the fight to continue making progress for the people and communities we love, will you chip in $5 or more today to help me defend my seat in Nevada and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83461344/468460714/2034486384?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3733-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjBjZWE3My0xYTAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p_8GnFn4lgHUb89liirM_CTRU1vtEPYbDwUrKmje1Go=)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83461345/468460715/2034486384?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk3733-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjBjZWE3My0xYTAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p_8GnFn4lgHUb89liirM_CTRU1vtEPYbDwUrKmje1Go=)

If you’ve been waiting for the absolute perfect time to make your first donation to President Biden’s campaign, we’re here to tell you that TODAY is that day. We’ve accomplished so much in the past three years, but we still have more work to do, Peter.
* If we’re going to save the planet from the climate crisis, we need your help.
* If we’re going to keep communities safe from gun violence, we need your help.
* If we’re going to restore reproductive freedom, we need your help.
* If we’re going to continue lowering health care costs, we need your help.
* If we’re going to defend our democracy, we need your help.

We know you might be wondering -- can one $25 donation really do all of that? **Yes. The answer is yes. Absolutely yes.** Because by the time you read this, lots and lots of people have already chipped in their first $25. Now, they’re counting on you to do the same. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: All I had was a pen
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
Kari Lake thinks the January Sixers are patriots. I think that anyone who supports those terrorists and traitors shouldn’t be allowed anywhere near the U.S. Senate.
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21298%2E4449941%2El2OzB8)
---
I won’t ever forget it.

Standing on the House floor. Hearing shouts, pounding, breaking glass. Barricading the door, teaching my colleagues how to use their gas masks. Texting my staff, telling them to hide.

I carried a rifle in Iraq and all I had to defend myself on January 6th was a pen. But I was ready to fight.

And after that day, Trump’s loyalists crawled right back to him. Witnessing them reject what they lived through, watching them ignore the testimony of the police officers that defended us that day while they were beaten, bloodied, pepper sprayed, cursed at... it makes me sick.

Kari Lake thinks the January Sixers are patriots who were “invited in” — she even campaigns with them.

I think anyone who supports those terrorists and traitors shouldn’t be allowed anywhere near the U.S. Senate.

This race in Arizona is just me and her. It’s on us to stop her march to more power and influence. Whoever wins in Arizona is going to determine which party holds the Senate, and could even decide whether Trump takes back the White House.

I need you with me, and I need you to take this race seriously. [**Please split a donation of $10 — that or anything you can give — between my campaign to crush Kari Lake’s campaign and Fight for Reform to help elect pro-democracy state and local Democrats.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42345?t=7&akid=21298%2E4449941%2El2OzB8) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Ruben Gallego will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42346?t=8&akid=21298%2E4449941%2El2OzB8)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42347?t=9&akid=21298%2E4449941%2El2OzB8)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42348?t=10&akid=21298%2E4449941%2El2OzB8)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42349?t=11&akid=21298%2E4449941%2El2OzB8)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42345?t=12&akid=21298%2E4449941%2El2OzB8)
Thanks for your support. As we gear up for one of the toughest elections of our lives, it means a lot to have you behind me.

Ruben
