name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Why we needed to support the Ukraine Supplemental
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Peter -
I'll give you the answer that our President should have given from day one: We have two choices, we can keep the aggressive Russian Army where they are, or we can let them murder tens of thousands more Ukrainians and place their Army on the border of four more NATO countries. There are no other choices. There is no magical third option where we get "peace." Putin won't agree to peace as long as he thinks he can keep advancing. Which one of those choices is more likely to draw American forces into the fight? The answer should be obvious: the one where Putin takes Ukraine, realizes the West has given up, and continues his aggression against the Baltic states (NATO allies). This scenario absolutely brings us to the brink of a shooting war. There is no question about that. Maybe not this year or next, but surely our children will one day have to again be in Europe fighting for our allies. Putin's own words in his comments and speeches over the years have always indicated his imperialist ambitions and we should listen. So, despite the critic's claim that "we are perpetuating a war" by assisting Ukraine, the truth is that THEIR preferred option brings us closer to war. Unfortunately, President Biden has never made this very simple argument of why it matters to AMERICAN INTERESTS. This isn't about lofty arguments of "defending democracy" or "standing up to dictators." This is about stone-cold American interests. The modern American way of life is dependent on a stable world and the global economy that we have effectively led since WWII. The world before WWII was always in relative chaos, and it's not a world you want to return to. If we allow that world to come back, where dictators can just invade other countries because they want their territory and resources, what do you think happens to global commodity prices, supply chains, and availability of basic necessities? Massive disruptions. Even if Putin stops at Ukraine, the economic consequences are large, considering Ukraine's abundance of grain exports and critical minerals like nitrogen, neon, and iron. Now imagine China claiming control of Taiwan and their production of 90% of the world's advanced semiconductors. And imagine Iran as it creates chaos in the Middle East, raising up global oil prices with it. And can you see how giving up on Ukrainian allies makes it easy for China to assume we will also give up on Taiwan? There is a clear domino effect based on our actions now. These are the simplest geopolitical reasons why stopping Russian aggression matters, and unfortunately our leaders rarely give you these reasons. OTHER QUESTIONS: "They are corrupt, how do we know where our money is going? What is it spent on?" Lets get a few points clear right up front: 1) I have been adamant that any additional funds must be accompanied by strict accountability measures, which is exactly what this aid bill does. Those that accuse Ukraine of rampant corruption are not totally wrong - it's a problem in all ex-Soviet states and especially in Russia - but Ukraine is one of the few countries that has taken significant steps in rooting it out. There is no evidence it has seriously affected the use of our aid and our weapons. 2) On average we have only spent 5-10% of our annual defense spending on this war. From a purely economic view, it is a small investment for an enormous strategic gain: halting Russian aggression that could have led to greater war with NATO, re-establishing deterrence, and seriously damaging the Russian army. 3) Most of the money (around 80%) in the most recent bill is actually spent on the American industrial base and American DoD requirements. 4) The Ukrainians have been getting our old dusty equipment while we buy new equipment to replace it with. 5) We have benefitted massively in a future war against China by "waking up" our largely dormant defense industrial base. Some details: The bill includes rigorous oversight by multiple inspectors general and careful end-use monitoring of equipment. In fact, the legislation requires in person monitoring - by U.S. personnel or vetted third party monitors. To be clear, much of the money in the bill is to replenish U.S. military equipment, including expiring munitions and supplies that would otherwise be wasted. The bill requires a cost-matching requirement from other U.S. allies and requires a repayment agreement from the government of Ukraine. Furthermore, this bill includes the REPO Act which authorizes the seizing of Russian frozen assets that will be used to pay for Ukraine economic assistance so that we don't have to. How can we be confident that equipment is used as intended? We do this with scanners and software that tracks equipment and ensures there isn't fraud or corruption with on-site visits and even front-line units sending pictures of equipment. For some munitions, Ukrainian forces are required to return spent casings to show they have been used. Inspectors general for the Defense Department, State Department, and U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID) are continuously conducting audits and investigations to make sure equipment and funds reach their destination and aren't diverted. We have been working with Ukraine since before the Russian invasion to eradicate corruption. When I was in Ukraine in May 2022 to conduct oversight and see the situation firsthand, I was highly focused on our efforts to prevent the diversion of funds and equipment. It is clear that significant strides have been made since then. President Zelensky has clearly been eager to address instances of corruption, including firing and prosecuting ministers and advisors suspected of impropriety. By all indications, Ukraine has made and continues to make significant efforts to root out corruption. In fact, Ukraine ranks among the world's top performers in the anti-corruption index. Yet another indication of progress is that their reform efforts have led to the European Union granting them candidate status and they are working on becoming full members of the EU. "So do we just have to keep giving them aid forever?" No. The Ukrainian defense industry is rapidly building up on its own but it needs our support. Their economy is actually growing now, but again, still needs military support to keep it safe. And we are supplying (finally) more advanced weapons that will create tactical victories that lead to strategic victories. The primary strategic goal for the United States is pushing Putin back far enough that he agrees to peace negotiations. Our overall mission is re-establishing deterrence and thus lasting peace, and that only happens if Putin regrets his decision to invade. We will know that moment has come when he is at the negotiating table. We can't get him to that table by retreating. "What about our border?" I agree, our border is much more important. For months I have outlined reasonable positions on border policy for our leadership to take to the Democrats and strike a deal. Senator Lankford attempted to do this in the Senate, as well. What became clear (and you may not want to hear this, but it's true), is that the "hardline" right doesn't want a deal on border security. Lies were told about what was in the Lankford deal, and so my attempts in the House were also severely degraded. You have to understand the political lay of the land in Congress. The truth is that our far-right members will never vote for any Ukraine package even if it has major border policy wins in it. They would rather see Russia win than get some progress on securing the border. They have made this very clear over and over. They won't take a 50% win, they only want a 100% win, which of course means we end up with ZERO. I have heard them behind closed doors say "It's better to lose, and appear like we are fighting." They do not want any progress on the border. So why is this a problem? Because it destroys our leverage against the Democrats. They know we don't have a real majority when our members publicly say they won't vote as a team, and so Democrats know they don't have to give an inch. Furthermore, the Republican position strangely and suddenly became "We don't need new laws, only a new President can fix this." But this is insane. We absolutely need new laws that a better President (Trump) could benefit from. If you recall, Trump had serious challenges securing our border with our own laws. He had to make the "Remain in Mexico" deal with Mexico to get the border under control. The majority of the Republican plan to secure the border, HR2, is changes to immigration law. Of course, we need new laws and of course, we need a new President. Both things can be true. In summary, I don't think our leadership team leaned in hard enough, early on, even though I gave them what they needed and offered a plan to do it. But what ultimately made any deal on border security impossible was that our hard right-wing simply didn't want it. That's the truth. I don't like where we are now, but I can tell you with a clear conscious that I am one of the only members who did everything possible to push our leadership toward a deal. Most members just waved their hands with vague "demands" and now use that as an excuse to vote to allow Russia to win. I can't vote with a clear conscious to allow Russia to win and advance us closer to a real war, just because I didn't get the package I wanted. It is a great honor to represent the district, and I will continue serving it with honesty and integrity. You will always get straight answers from me, not talking points. It is often much easier to vote "no" and avoid tough explanations of difficult topics. But I refuse to be that kind of representative. These issues are complicated and extremely consequential for our children's future, and we deserve leaders that are willing to examine them carefully before taking votes. I promise to always be that kind of leader.
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Dan Crenshaw Member of Congress

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | Peter - I'll give you the answer that our President should have given from day one: We have two choices, we can keep the aggressive Russian Army where they are, or we can let them murder tens of thousands more Ukrainians and place their Army on the border of four more NATO countries. There are no other choices. There is no magical third option where we get "peace." Putin won't agree to peace as long as he thinks he can keep advancing. Which one of those choices is more likely to draw American forces into the fight? The answer should be obvious: the one where Putin takes Ukraine, realizes the West has given up, and continues his aggression against the Baltic states (NATO allies). This scenario absolutely brings us to the brink of a shooting war. There is no question about that. Maybe not this year or next, but surely our children will one day have to again be in Europe fighting for our allies. Putin's own words in his comments and speeches over the years have always indicated his imperialist ambitions and we should listen. So, despite the critic's claim that "we are perpetuating a war" by assisting Ukraine, the truth is that THEIR preferred option brings us closer to war. Unfortunately, President Biden has never made this very simple argument of why it matters to AMERICAN INTERESTS. This isn't about lofty arguments of "defending democracy" or "standing up to dictators." This is about stone-cold American interests. The modern American way of life is dependent on a stable world and the global economy that we have effectively led since WWII. The world before WWII was always in relative chaos, and it's not a world you want to return to. If we allow that world to come back, where dictators can just invade other countries because they want their territory and resources, what do you think happens to global commodity prices, supply chains, and availability of basic necessities? Massive disruptions. Even if Putin stops at Ukraine, the economic consequences are large, considering Ukraine's abundance of grain exports and critical minerals like nitrogen, neon, and iron. Now imagine China claiming control of Taiwan and their production of 90% of the world's advanced semiconductors. And imagine Iran as it creates chaos in the Middle East, raising up global oil prices with it. And can you see how giving up on Ukrainian allies makes it easy for China to assume we will also give up on Taiwan? There is a clear domino effect based on our actions now. These are the simplest geopolitical reasons why stopping Russian aggression matters, and unfortunately our leaders rarely give you these reasons. OTHER QUESTIONS: "They are corrupt, how do we know where our money is going? What is it spent on?" Lets get a few points clear right up front: 1) I have been adamant that any additional funds must be accompanied by strict accountability measures, which is exactly what this aid bill does. Those that accuse Ukraine of rampant corruption are not totally wrong - it's a problem in all ex-Soviet states and especially in Russia - but Ukraine is one of the few countries that has taken significant steps in rooting it out. There is no evidence it has seriously affected the use of our aid and our weapons. 2) On average we have only spent 5-10% of our annual defense spending on this war. From a purely economic view, it is a small investment for an enormous strategic gain: halting Russian aggression that could have led to greater war with NATO, re-establishing deterrence, and seriously damaging the Russian army. 3) Most of the money (around 80%) in the most recent bill is actually spent on the American industrial base and American DoD requirements. 4) The Ukrainians have been getting our old dusty equipment while we buy new equipment to replace it with. 5) We have benefitted massively in a future war against China by "waking up" our largely dormant defense industrial base. Some details: The bill includes rigorous oversight by multiple inspectors general and careful end-use monitoring of equipment. In fact, the legislation requires in person monitoring - by U.S. personnel or vetted third party monitors. To be clear, much of the money in the bill is to replenish U.S. military equipment, including expiring munitions and supplies that would otherwise be wasted. The bill requires a cost-matching requirement from other U.S. allies and requires a repayment agreement from the government of Ukraine. Furthermore, this bill includes the REPO Act which authorizes the seizing of Russian frozen assets that will be used to pay for Ukraine economic assistance so that we don't have to. How can we be confident that equipment is used as intended? We do this with scanners and software that tracks equipment and ensures there isn't fraud or corruption with on-site visits and even front-line units sending pictures of equipment. For some munitions, Ukrainian forces are required to return spent casings to show they have been used. Inspectors general for the Defense Department, State Department, and U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID) are continuously conducting audits and investigations to make sure equipment and funds reach their destination and aren't diverted. We have been working with Ukraine since before the Russian invasion to eradicate corruption. When I was in Ukraine in May 2022 to conduct oversight and see the situation firsthand, I was highly focused on our efforts to prevent the diversion of funds and equipment. It is clear that significant strides have been made since then. President Zelensky has clearly been eager to address instances of corruption, including firing and prosecuting ministers and advisors suspected of impropriety. By all indications, Ukraine has made and continues to make significant efforts to root out corruption. In fact, Ukraine ranks among the world's top performers in the anti-corruption index. Yet another indication of progress is that their reform efforts have led to the European Union granting them candidate status and they are working on becoming full members of the EU. "So do we just have to keep giving them aid forever?" No. The Ukrainian defense industry is rapidly building up on its own but it needs our support. Their economy is actually growing now, but again, still needs military support to keep it safe. And we are supplying (finally) more advanced weapons that will create tactical victories that lead to strategic victories. The primary strategic goal for the United States is pushing Putin back far enough that he agrees to peace negotiations. Our overall mission is re-establishing deterrence and thus lasting peace, and that only happens if Putin regrets his decision to invade. We will know that moment has come when he is at the negotiating table. We can't get him to that table by retreating. "What about our border?" I agree, our border is much more important. For months I have outlined reasonable positions on border policy for our leadership to take to the Democrats and strike a deal. Senator Lankford attempted to do this in the Senate, as well. What became clear (and you may not want to hear this, but it's true), is that the "hardline" right doesn't want a deal on border security. Lies were told about what was in the Lankford deal, and so my attempts in the House were also severely degraded. You have to understand the political lay of the land in Congress. The truth is that our far-right members will never vote for any Ukraine package even if it has major border policy wins in it. They would rather see Russia win than get some progress on securing the border. They have made this very clear over and over. They won't take a 50% win, they only want a 100% win, which of course means we end up with ZERO. I have heard them behind closed doors say "It's better to lose, and appear like we are fighting." They do not want any progress on the border. So why is this a problem? Because it destroys our leverage against the Democrats. They know we don't have a real majority when our members publicly say they won't vote as a team, and so Democrats know they don't have to give an inch. Furthermore, the Republican position strangely and suddenly became "We don't need new laws, only a new President can fix this." But this is insane. We absolutely need new laws that a better President (Trump) could benefit from. If you recall, Trump had serious challenges securing our border with our own laws. He had to make the "Remain in Mexico" deal with Mexico to get the border under control. The majority of the Republican plan to secure the border, HR2, is changes to immigration law. Of course, we need new laws and of course, we need a new President. Both things can be true. In summary, I don't think our leadership team leaned in hard enough, early on, even though I gave them what they needed and offered a plan to do it. But what ultimately made any deal on border security impossible was that our hard right-wing simply didn't want it. That's the truth. I don't like where we are now, but I can tell you with a clear conscious that I am one of the only members who did everything possible to push our leadership toward a deal. Most members just waved their hands with vague "demands" and now use that as an excuse to vote to allow Russia to win. I can't vote with a clear conscious to allow Russia to win and advance us closer to a real war, just because I didn't get the package I wanted. It is a great honor to represent the district, and I will continue serving it with honesty and integrity. You will always get straight answers from me, not talking points. It is often much easier to vote "no" and avoid tough explanations of difficult topics. But I refuse to be that kind of representative. These issues are complicated and extremely consequential for our children's future, and we deserve leaders that are willing to examine them carefully before taking votes. I promise to always be that kind of leader. | Sincerely, | | Dan Crenshaw Member of Congress | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS | | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

| | Fellow American, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8741ffd2709342eeb61e6630aa99774c&_e=4pqPpvUW6PyU2ftvrSukc2-Y1GGaMtwRWs7dSh5OCNrpP_-C6RaGM-ZzBCVOh295rn3cT9bLe63R1z3Y9NuNnh6-14WX8B9lLE_jRq95yKduWGgrwJBlRUieUP4KnxM61XGWMLXPcC7MQI94afn1UjdzrkqTULC45iEzl_92xqboONhSE5DbKVvOjySo1gKudCHny8xOwMj_DbM3jjXAXpxuerpuHGZt4StaUAu1WwcXDSNGdAWOf0Frh66T-5OVmOhjAjWMuslb04LHLPgt-l7uK24jiLaK4pmv_3T7q8iXFusBrNqaMPRBrbCqF_lDn_T3uGwRqvXz3EWefscziXkgCnaqwg9v26g0g7F7IkiCtSjTWAT6dkTGrj1M-jO-V0pBu-Ssxw43TZSGXEq0bg%3D%3D)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they'd rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8741ffd2709342eeb61e6630aa99774c&_e=4pqPpvUW6PyU2ftvrSukc2-Y1GGaMtwRWs7dSh5OCNrpP_-C6RaGM-ZzBCVOh295rn3cT9bLe63R1z3Y9NuNnh6-14WX8B9lLE_jRq95yKduWGgrwJBlRUieUP4KnxM61XGWMLXPcC7MQI94afn1UjdzrkqTULC45iEzl_92xqboONhSE5DbKVvOjySo1gKudCHny8xOwMj_DbM3jjXAXpxuerpuHGZt4StaUAu1WwflzoyRRcdxnjdoABPDWgPDWWryAzV75A_d0hVWrHLGWmXDs68pLFR3J_5S1WBRIt2_BIYS-miiHBqwjEgAu3iP8Yh5sA9gFVY_-Hg9juvVIfAjpgQvH_zcAOvEJdJVpsQeJZ3XTEGwbXhN1mXqVJdpUBrsKAptytOpBanhlJsgCg%3D%3D) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There's no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!

clean_body: I can’t help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. | | | | | Fellow American, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they'd rather face me: Be careful what you wish for. I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There's no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you! | | | | Steve Garvey #6 | | | P.S. Adam Schiff had $35 million in the bank. Well, reports are now coming out that he spent upwards of $25 million in the primary and is down to $10 million in the bank. Make no mistake, while his cash advantage is greatly diminished, as I write these words, Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are quickly reloading. The ActBlue political machine has the capacity to pump millions into his race in the blink of an eye. You and I cannot give them any daylight. Please don't delay. | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 |

name: Hirono HQ
subject: Mazie isn't your typical politician.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Mazie isn't a typical politician, Peter. She didn’t get into politics for money, fame, or power. She didn’t come from wealth or status. English wasn’t even Mazie’s first language — she first arrived to the United States when she was 8 years old with her mother, who worked low-wage jobs with no health benefits to give her daughter a better life. **Mazie committed herself to this work because her mother’s perseverance inspired her to fight for justice and dignity for all people.** She fights every day for legislation that will lift children and families out of poverty, stave off the worst effects of climate change, and defend reproductive rights — critical Democratic priorities that deliver for the American people. She speaks out passionately against the extremism, bigotry, and hatred of MAGA Republicans. She’s not afraid to stand up to corporate greed. She will be the first to tell you that we must abolish the Jim Crow filibuster, reform the right-wing Supreme Court, and codify _Roe v. Wade._ That won’t always make you friendships in Washington, but like we said, Mazie isn’t in the Senate to cozy up to corporate interests or wealthy CEOs. **She’s there to fight for you.** **[With 23 Senate seats to defend this November, including Mazie’s, she’s counting on the support of this grassroots team to help her stay the course and protect this seat. Peter, will you chip in $10 or any amount today to ensure Mazie can continue fighting for our working families, our freedoms, and our future in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83462515/468462795/-1348610820?amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240421_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTU1NWRmNS0xZDAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HsRMVtlYLiu3ZfyezuF6Cgjjfidj_72unOfNUJ7TT54=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83462518/468462796/-1348610820?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240421_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTU1NWRmNS0xZDAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HsRMVtlYLiu3ZfyezuF6Cgjjfidj_72unOfNUJ7TT54=)

name: Team ECU/LAV Action
subject: Your right to vote is being taken away!
body:
We talk to you a lot about corruption in our government. From Congress to the Supreme Court, corruption is everywhere, and it poses a major threat to our democracy. But our democracy is under attack from another direction: restrictive voter laws.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83462627/468462937/444630146?refcode=4-21-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3NDRjZjIzLTFlMDAtZWYxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z1BS3Ywwmgdl8JtcSWE_4Dwc9gCNdPxlSQin3JJ2jrc=)

| | Friend, We talk to you a lot about corruption in our government. From Congress to the Supreme Court, corruption is everywhere, and it poses a major threat to our democracy. But our democracy is under attack from another direction: restrictive voter laws. All across the country, Republicans are passing laws that make it harder to vote because they know they can’t stay in power without these restrictions. These voting restrictions have an outsized impact on already marginalized communities and Democratic strongholds. Actions like shutting down ballot dropbox locations, limiting the hours of voting sites, and instituting strict voter ID laws are all ways that Republican-led legislatures suppress the vote and keep themselves in power. [**Listen, we believe in election integrity, but there’s no proof that limiting access to the vote increases our security. We need to make it easier to cast a ballot, not harder, and that’s why we’re pushing for Congress to pass the**** _Freedom to Vote Act_****. The right to vote is crucial to a free and fair democracy. If you agree, please chip in $10 now so we can keep pushing this legislation through Congress.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83462628/468462938/444630146?refcode=4-21-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3NDRjZjIzLTFlMDAtZWYxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z1BS3Ywwmgdl8JtcSWE_4Dwc9gCNdPxlSQin3JJ2jrc=) Our votes hold power, and that’s exactly why Republicans want to suppress it. They are worried that if we’re all able to freely cast our ballots, they won’t stay in power. Voting rights should be a nonpartisan issue, but unfortunately, it’s not. Passing the _Freedom to Vote Act_ is crucial to counteract all of these unethical voter suppression tactics popping up nationwide. [**The**** _Freedom to Vote Act_****is a comprehensive piece of legislation that would ensure that every single American is able to vote for whoever they want to without interference or suppression. You know that the right to vote is one of the most basic rights we have as Americans, and it’s being attacked in many states as you’re reading this. If you’re ready to join us and support the right to vote, please contribute $10 or whatever you can now. We’re ready to have you on our team.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83462629/468462939/444630146?refcode=4-21-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3NDRjZjIzLTFlMDAtZWYxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z1BS3Ywwmgdl8JtcSWE_4Dwc9gCNdPxlSQin3JJ2jrc=) Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

name: Tax the Rich via Our Revolution
subject: Sign your name to urge Congress to pass the Ultra-Millionaire Tax Act!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, last week
was Tax Day for the vast majority of people in the United States, but was
it really Tax Day for billionaires like Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos?

We’re witnessing a historic crisis of greed in this country. A mere 0.1%
of Americans – the billionaire class of Musk, Bezos, Mark Zuckerberg, and
Jamie Dimon – hoards $20,000,000,000,000, or 14% of all the wealth in
America! And it’s not us just who’ve been talking about the likes of Bezos
and Zuckerberg:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16907?t=1011&akid=5824%2E5885482%2E37bf3Q ][IMG]

While the ultra-rich have watched their fortunes swell, the vast majority
of us have seen our slice of the American dream shrink. That’s exactly why
we need to tax millionaires and billionaires right now so that they pay
their fair share into Medicare, Social Security, public education, the
fight against climate change, and much much more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16901?source=email-20240421&t=1012&akid=5824%2E5885482%2E37bf3Q ]Add your name: Congress must pass the Ultra-Millionaire Tax Act to make
millionaires and billionaires pay up before the next Tax Day!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16901?source=email-20240421&t=1013&akid=5824%2E5885482%2E37bf3Q ]ADD YOUR NAME

Representative Pramila Jayapal and Senator Elizabeth Warren’s
Ultra-Millionaire Tax Act would apply a 2% tax on the wealth of families
with holdings between $50 million and $1 billion, and a 3% tax on
billionaires. This is an urgent and necessary measure to not only force
the rich to pay their fair share, but also to make sure the social safety
net has the critical funding we need.

The bill would bring in enough revenue to take Social Security and
Medicare off the chopping block forever, and begin to end the outrageous
concentration of wealth in the hands of the few.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16901?source=email-20240421&t=1014&akid=5824%2E5885482%2E37bf3Q ]Add your name: Tax the rich now to end the outrageous tax breaks and
loopholes that millionaires and billionaires get away with every year.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20240421.K0Kwtm&t=1008&akid=5824%2E5885482%2E37bf3Q ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: Lessons from my teenage self
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83463209/468463603/1072501871?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBhM2Y0MGQtMjAwMC1lZjExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zFKdmFvsbrT7SuO_Eq6I_bO0RuVbdxXJDyXrHwlIbHE=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83463210/468463604/1601308844?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=RRFC_20240421_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBhM2Y0MGQtMjAwMC1lZjExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zFKdmFvsbrT7SuO_Eq6I_bO0RuVbdxXJDyXrHwlIbHE=) Folks,

Have I ever told you how I got into public service?

**I grew up the son of hardworking farmworkers.** My family lived in a small trailer in rural California where my brother and I shared a bed that in the daytime converted into a kitchen table.

When I was a teenager, I walked in the desert heat to different businesses asking them to invest in our community by investing in me and my dreams of a college education. I made them a promise that I would come back to the Coachella Valley to serve our community as a physician in return for their trust in me.

I not only returned to serve as an emergency physician, but eventually was elected to serve my community in Congress. For more than a decade, I’ve fought every day for my family, friends, and neighbors who dream the same dream my parents had for me.

**Those memories have come flooding back lately.** Because I’ve spent entirely too much time listening to the MAGA circus go round after round, attacking each other, blaming Democrats, and doing everything they can _EXCEPT_ serving the American people.

**And that’s part and parcel for the extreme MAGA caucus.** Instead of doing the hard work of reaching across the aisle to build consensus, they grind our government to a halt to play partisan games.

Instead of building progress and promise for the next generation of Americans, they desperately scratch and claw their way to their own power, everyone else be damned. **They’re not public servants – they only serve themselves, and I’m sick of it.**

**They need to get their house in order. They need to end the chaos. They need to do their jobs. But I’m not waiting around for them, team, I’m taking action.**

[**I’m taking a lesson from my teenage self here – together we can defeat the MAGA chaos caucus and win back control of the House. But I can’t do it alone. So I’m counting on you here, friend. Can you pitch in $10 (or anything you can afford) toward our 1,000 donation goal today and help us take back our House Majority and end the MAGA chaos? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83463211/468463605/1601308844?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=RRFC_20240421_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBhM2Y0MGQtMjAwMC1lZjExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zFKdmFvsbrT7SuO_Eq6I_bO0RuVbdxXJDyXrHwlIbHE=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83463217/468463611/1601308844?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=RRFC_20240421_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBhM2Y0MGQtMjAwMC1lZjExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zFKdmFvsbrT7SuO_Eq6I_bO0RuVbdxXJDyXrHwlIbHE=)

clean_body: | = = Folks, Have I ever told you how I got into public service? I grew up the son of hardworking farmworkers. My family lived in a small trailer in rural California where my brother and I shared a bed that in the daytime converted into a kitchen table. When I was a teenager, I walked in the desert heat to different businesses asking them to invest in our community by investing in me and my dreams of a college education. I made them a promise that I would come back to the Coachella Valley to serve our community as a physician in return for their trust in me. I not only returned to serve as an emergency physician, but eventually was elected to serve my community in Congress. For more than a decade, I’ve fought every day for my family, friends, and neighbors who dream the same dream my parents had for me. Those memories have come flooding back lately. Because I’ve spent entirely too much time listening to the MAGA circus go round after round, attacking each other, blaming Democrats, and doing everything they can EXCEPT serving the American people. And that’s part and parcel for the extreme MAGA caucus. Instead of doing the hard work of reaching across the aisle to build consensus, they grind our government to a halt to play partisan games. Instead of building progress and promise for the next generation of Americans, they desperately scratch and claw their way to their own power, everyone else be damned. They’re not public servants – they only serve themselves, and I’m sick of it. They need to get their house in order. They need to end the chaos. They need to do their jobs. But I’m not waiting around for them, team, I’m taking action. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you for being with me in this fight, Dr. Raul Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566, Indio, CA 92202 www.drraulruiz.com/ Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact, make a=. to receive fewer emails. to update your information. Click here to . | | = =

Peter - Look, I don’t expect everyone to contribute each time we send one of these emails. But the truth is we’re a little bit behind on the fundraising targets we need to hit to win this election. We have to catch up. Fast. But I’m about to say something that would make my finance director’s head spin— **the amount you give doesn't matter to me **. Here’s why: I’m proud to run this campaign the right way—with over 500,000 individual contributions from folks like you powering everything we do. My opponent has the backing of shady billionaires and Mitch McConnell himself. Outside groups are flooding Montana with over $50,000,000 in TV ads to try and defeat me. ---
Fellow Conservative, Riley Gaines here. The integrity of girls’ sports is on the line, and it's time to get real about the fight ahead.

Imagine this: your daughter trains hard and puts in the sweat and tears, only to have her shot at victory taken away by males muscling their way into competitions meant for girls. That's not just unfair — it's wrong.

With your help, we're slamming the door shut on this madness. Your support fuels our battle to keep girls' sports for GIRLS — no exceptions, no compromises.
---
[**STOP THE MADNESS**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kEGPnDAMhX9NuIESOxDmwGFbRE897qq3KpMYxm0CKARt-fdVRqOV7Iv96T0_27gHnq9BmG8C4MH-EAAC3wTAmfHDvr__TFf99mupf7QfsJQlfBcA-drpi3yJNBQthzI1Y-UHDVbNrqJBGYUGUaKuHoPVbnZAt9kaVHeHRvagWt9q3aPUEiseQIKWGhTI1ijV0M3fydm7avHWz8oILZ9GzZyI8oPXv5S85XA1botVGB4578fzsEnAdJA7EzWfvCbyhRAw2UiJnV3rPfHqeA901Hva_pDLAqYtXPXToE4c6KoXyysdRQ2nM8ffzsbd8rIKHKWSsvStlAIBXQEieT6jwPH1j-7fuW4CR91pp9u2R4kSDfYvPFMq8Jy9EtDZuJ1rFjhCW6XB758cAh9dSb08U7st_g8AAP__JjqFqQ)
---
We won't rest until our daughters can compete fair and square.
---
[**DEFEND OUR GIRLS**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kEGPnDAMhX9NuIESOxDmwGFbRE897qq3KpMYxm0CKARt-fdVRqOV7Iv96T0_27gHnq9BmG8C4MH-EAAC3wTAmfHDvr__TFf99mupf7QfsJQlfBcA-drpi3yJNBQthzI1Y-UHDVbNrqJBGYUGUaKuHoPVbnZAt9kaVHeHRvagWt9q3aPUEiseQIKWGhTI1ijV0M3fydm7avHWz8oILZ9GzZyI8oPXv5S85XA1botVGB4578fzsEnAdJA7EzWfvCbyhRAw2UiJnV3rPfHqeA901Hva_pDLAqYtXPXToE4c6KoXyysdRQ2nM8ffzsbd8rIKHKWSsvStlAIBXQEieT6jwPH1j-7fuW4CR91pp9u2R4kSDfYvPFMq8Jy9EtDZuJ1rFjhCW6XB758cAh9dSb08U7st_g8AAP__JjqFqQ)
---
The momentum is growing around the country for our mission, so we can’t slow down now. There is an uphill battle to November, and we must elect politicians who will fight for our girls, not bend the knee to radical activists.

_**[_**Can I count on you for a donation of $25 to even the field?**_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kEGPnDAMhX9NuIESOxDmwGFbRE897qq3KpMYxm0CKARt-fdVRqOV7Iv96T0_27gHnq9BmG8C4MH-EAAC3wTAmfHDvr__TFf99mupf7QfsJQlfBcA-drpi3yJNBQthzI1Y-UHDVbNrqJBGYUGUaKuHoPVbnZAt9kaVHeHRvagWt9q3aPUEiseQIKWGhTI1ijV0M3fydm7avHWz8oILZ9GzZyI8oPXv5S85XA1botVGB4578fzsEnAdJA7EzWfvCbyhRAw2UiJnV3rPfHqeA901Hva_pDLAqYtXPXToE4c6KoXyysdRQ2nM8ffzsbd8rIKHKWSsvStlAIBXQEieT6jwPH1j-7fuW4CR91pp9u2R4kSDfYvPFMq8Jy9EtDZuJ1rFjhCW6XB758cAh9dSb08U7st_g8AAP__JjqFqQ)**_
For girls everywhere,
Riley Gains

clean_body: Fellow Conservative, imagine this...your daughter trains hard. | | | Fellow Conservative, Riley Gaines here. The integrity of girls’ sports is on the line, and it's time to get real about the fight ahead. Imagine this: your daughter trains hard and puts in the sweat and tears, only to have her shot at victory taken away by males muscling their way into competitions meant for girls. That's not just unfair — it's wrong. With your help, we're slamming the door shut on this madness. Your support fuels our battle to keep girls' sports for GIRLS — no exceptions, no compromises. We won't rest until our daughters can compete fair and square. The momentum is growing around the country for our mission, so we can’t slow down now. There is an uphill battle to November, and we must elect politicians who will fight for our girls, not bend the knee to radical activists. For girls everywhere, Riley Gains

name: Kurt Kroemer
subject: The role of government to protect its citizens

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Peter,
Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross.
More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most.
Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas.
I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue.
Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
CONTRIBUTE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023&amount=5]

CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023&amount=50]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Thanks,
Kurt

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83464195/468465675/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTA0MWI0Zi0yMjAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKF7Kk3WzGE0kLI9oNz4RE2p0LV8Kj3pYc08CgTDHnQ=&emci=0c167748-2200-ef11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=21041b4f-2200-ef11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=13185894) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83464196/468465676/270139708?refcode=email_042124_democracy&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTA0MWI0Zi0yMjAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKF7Kk3WzGE0kLI9oNz4RE2p0LV8Kj3pYc08CgTDHnQ=) Derek, there’s a reason I’m so passionate about defending our democracy.

I was willing to risk my life when I served in Iraq. And when I came back, I didn’t give up on the hard work of protecting democracy. After becoming a lawyer, I worked to defend voting rights and fight for safe and secure elections.

When I started doing voting rights work, I couldn't have imagined that our country would be in such peril now. We had a president – along with his supporters in the House and Senate – who fought to overturn a free and fair election. A president who incited a violent insurrection at the U.S. Capitol when the American people rejected him at the ballot box.

Defending democracy is on the line as we head to the polls in 2024 – our future depends on it.

We need leaders in the House, Senate, and presidency who will stand up to extremists, and protect your right to vote, our free and fair elections, and our democracy. _That’s why I’m running for re-election._ [**Help me protect this seat, and help Democrats take back the House by making a donation to my campaign today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83464197/468465677/270139708?refcode=email_042124_democracy&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTA0MWI0Zi0yMjAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKF7Kk3WzGE0kLI9oNz4RE2p0LV8Kj3pYc08CgTDHnQ=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83464198/468465678/270139708?refcode=email_042124_democracy&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTA0MWI0Zi0yMjAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKF7Kk3WzGE0kLI9oNz4RE2p0LV8Kj3pYc08CgTDHnQ=)

clean_body: = Derek, there’s a reason I’m so passionate about defending our democracy. I was willing to risk my life when I served in Iraq. And when I came back, I didn’t give up on the hard work of protecting democracy. After becoming a lawyer, I worked to defend voting rights and fight for safe and secure elections. When I started doing voting rights work, I couldn't have imagined that our country would be in such peril now. We had a president – along with his supporters in the House and Senate – who fought to overturn a free and fair election. A president who incited a violent insurrection at the U.S. Capitol when the American people rejected him at the ballot box. Defending democracy is on the line as we head to the polls in 2024 – our future depends on it. We need leaders in the House, Senate, and presidency who will stand up to extremists, and protect your right to vote, our free and fair elections, and our democracy. That’s why I’m running for re-election. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = I've been standing up for democracy since I first took the oath to our Constitution as a 17-year old, and it’s a fight I’ve continued during my time in Congress. name: Sherrod (personal)
subject: I'm a fighter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
my motto has always been that when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83465032/468467417/-885173374?refcode=odp_em_240421_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDQ1NDM4MS0yNTAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5aOJ5gNAOCZ56ZcCP43bUvbH-CH329Ybx6FJeRDX-lY=) Team, my motto has always been that when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. That's what I'm doing every day in the Senate. **I'm fighting for the Dignity of Work.** No matter where you're from or what kind of work you do, hard work should pay off for everyone. Whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I'll fight for you. **I'm fighting for accountability.** For years, we've seen corporations lobby for tax breaks and bad trade deals that hurt workers. I'm not afraid to stand up to Wall Street or take on Big Pharma to level the playing field. ****I'm fighting for our fundamental rights.** **My opponent has made it clear he doesn’t have our best interests at heart. I will always fight for a more equal and inclusive country. **But here's the deal:** I need you to fight with me. I'm facing my toughest race yet, and polls show me neck and neck with my Trump-backed opponent. He’s spending millions of dollars to flip this seat and the Senate red, and I can't fight back without your help. **********[I need to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight to fight back, and I'm counting on your grassroots support to get there. Please, will you split a $5 donation between my campaign and the Ohio Dems to help me win in Ohio, defend our Democratic Senate majority, and keep fighting for you in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83465033/468467418/-885173374?refcode=odp_em_240421_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDQ1NDM4MS0yNTAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5aOJ5gNAOCZ56ZcCP43bUvbH-CH329Ybx6FJeRDX-lY=)********** Thank you, Sherrod ****** ****** | ************Control of the House and Senate runs right through Ohio this year. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to hold on to the Senate and flip the House? → ************ | ******************[********](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83465034/468467419/-885173374?refcode=odp_em_240421_1&amount=5;email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDQ1NDM4MS0yNTAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5aOJ5gNAOCZ56ZcCP43bUvbH-CH329Ybx6FJeRDX-lY=)****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83465035/468467420/-885173374?refcode=odp_em_240421_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDQ1NDM4MS0yNTAwLWVmMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5aOJ5gNAOCZ56ZcCP43bUvbH-CH329Ybx6FJeRDX-lY=) **********************

name: Senator Brian Lenney
subject: teletownhall
body:
|
---
| | Happy Sunday,

If you missed the TeleTownhall I did a few nights ago...

[You can listen to the replay here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=f754601c0f&e=dea908e0fe "listen")

[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=51ea7588d2&e=dea908e0fe)

That's it!

Cheers,

Brian

**P.S. **

The Idaho Republican Primary is just one month away.

We've already seen out-of-state door knockers in Nampa spreading lies, along with a new wave of TV ads and media campaigns targeting me. They're determined to see me gone because I refuse to be a "Yes Man" like my opponent, who does whatever he's told and votes as instructed. Not me. Interestingly, more than $100,000 has been spent to unseat me—not by my opponent, who hasn't raised much money, but by the super fringe leftist Republican PACs (yes, that's a thing).

So please, share the message of liberty, distribute the voter guides, and make sure to show up and make liberty win on May 21st!

**P.P.S. **

Bookmark May 1st if you're in and around the Nampa area. We're hosting a meet and greet at the V-Cut Cigar Lounge. Joining us will be Senator Trakel and Senator Nichols, along with our future Canyon County Prosecutor, Chris Boyd.

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

2) Want to get off this list? [Unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&t=b&e=dea908e0fe&c=c3f98cd094).

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

4) **Want to support the fight against the establishment hacks, phony conservatives, and progressive shills who want to turn Idaho into a progressive dumpster fire? >>> [Click here to contribute](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=fd710d2377&e=dea908e0fe "get in the fight")**

We're hosting a meet and greet at the V-Cut Cigar Lounge. Joining us will be Senator Trakel and Senator Nichols, along with our future Canyon County Prosecutor, Chris Boyd. \--- 1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com to your address book or whitelist me. 2) Want to get off this list? . 3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753 4) Want to support the fight against the establishment hacks, phony conservatives, and progressive shills who want to turn Idaho into a progressive dumpster fire? >>> "get in the fight" | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | Copyright © 2024 Brian Lenney for Idaho, All rights reserved.

our chance is disappearing before our eyes...
| We thought when we reached out to let you know that Colin Allred was within **STRIKING DISTANCE** of Ted Cruz in the polls, _donations would POUR IN!_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66050?t=6&akid=13881%2E878179%2ECYBu2-) **But we couldn’t have been more wrong.** We missed our $10,000 goal by a full $4,576!

If we don’t make up the difference immediately, we’ll be too far behind to catch up and we’ll lose our chance to send MAGA Ted Cruz packing!

name: SIGN ON via Wiley Nickel for North Carolina
subject: Access to Mifepristone is essential!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North CarolinaWiley Nickel for North Carolina
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/rufXtQOs-EeiyDCWt8gimA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/rufXtQOs-EeiyDCWt8gimA2]
Peter,
The Supreme Court is considering a case that could significantly impact access to mifepristone, a medication used for medication abortion and management of miscarriage. The outcome of this case can potentially restrict or even eliminate access to this safe and essential medication for countless individuals across the country.
Let us be clear: abortion is healthcare.
Denying women access to safe and accessible abortion options is unconstitutional and ultimately unsafe. While this case is being heard in the highest court, we must stand together to fight for a woman’s right to choose.
Can you sign on urging the Supreme Court to maintain access to mifepristone? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/rufXtQOs-EeiyDCWt8gimA2]
This petition can demonstrate the widespread support for ensuring that women have the right to make their own reproductive health decisions and access the care they need without government interference.
By signing on, you are standing up for reproductive rights and advocating for equitable access to healthcare for all individuals. Your support is crucial in sending a clear message that access to mifepristone and other reproductive healthcare services must be protected.
So, can you sign on to send the message to the Supreme Court that access to mifepristone is essential to women’s reproductive freedom? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/rufXtQOs-EeiyDCWt8gimA2]
Thank you for your support and commitment to reproductive justice.
– Team Wiley

clean_body: [] Peter, The Supreme Court is considering a case that could significantly impact access to mifepristone, a medication used for medication abortion and management of miscarriage. The outcome of this case can potentially restrict or even eliminate access to this safe and essential medication for countless individuals across the country. Let us be clear: abortion is healthcare. Denying women access to safe and accessible abortion options is unconstitutional and ultimately unsafe. While this case is being heard in the highest court, we must stand together to fight for a woman’s right to choose. Can you sign on urging the Supreme Court to maintain access to mifepristone? [] This petition can demonstrate the widespread support for ensuring that women have the right to make their own reproductive health decisions and access the care they need without government interference. By signing on, you are standing up for reproductive rights and advocating for equitable access to healthcare for all individuals. Your support is crucial in sending a clear message that access to mifepristone and other reproductive healthcare services must be protected. So, can you sign on to send the message to the Supreme Court that access to mifepristone is essential to women’s reproductive freedom? [] Thank you for your support and commitment to reproductive justice. – Team Wiley Support #TeamWiley with a donation today! name: Rob Bresnahan Jr.
subject: This Needs to be Kept Confidential
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB FOR PA
body:
Don't open this if you can't keep a secret
|
---
Fellow American,

**I 'm glad that you opened this email, but this needs to be kept a secret between us.**

**I 'm behind my next major fundraising deadline, even though President Trump just endorsed me. This is not good. How did we get to this point?**

**FIRST:** I launched my campaign to flip PA-08 red and fire Matt Cartwright, who is backed by Joe Biden. Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left Woke Money Machine. I want to empower my community and stand up for the little guy, and that means standing up to career politicians like Matt Cartwright, who has lied countless times to Americans and sided with Nancy Pelosi 100 percent of the time in Congress. Cartwright snuck by with victories in 2016 and 2020 despite President Trump winning in PA-08 both times.

**THEN:** President Trump endorsed me, noting the difference between my opponent and me, "Rob worked hard to Create Jobs and Grow the Economy, unlike his opponent, Matt Cartwright, who is completely beholden to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left." Speaker Johnson, Steve Scalise, Elise Stefanik, Tom Emmer, and countless others also endorsed me.

**NOW:** [**I 'm asking you to endorse me and to chip in a donation of whatever you can afford.**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=30628e39eba14f72a1c204fcba857630&_e=tRfVpXo7E4MEeT16CB5RfwqW_C_2gZuO9-xe2IB0PClOJZX2dH2RwSvLlh7EyAgUwvXOU9BGXSgJDhkexCZ6CpJdGohykCNRG6_RZeAf9HcNys5mA84y9BWHWS7Zc2zOUNxYf3Z0qtWaT0IceRwFk-nUYxt1QMoLRUQG0y7Fwl0ns69lBp_Y2Dwl9YA145IJare-FrKVUfWARv1YyuNbUXpbMaw0zBLu2WFkldhgHKgTc42AQyBDETK2Sz0DCixttyzrzPdVogh4eov2nfd22HYXJ8VmtKG4D5QkokBvUrqOU3yqrT57DMzKtdPZpYutj8CYHfoHCq4fF7eL9b07MdlabioQe9ryRvb-tFBaDITMY6vr-d3g_1fu4Vk_-6uEHcqCgj57hXtEf_vJEsIpJDpyxm4fEXUAqgF3a-gd_SM%3D) It may not seem like much, but having a strong flow of grassroots donors and supporters will help me finally unseat Cartwright, expand our House Majority, and give President Trump one more much-needed ally in Congress when we win on November 5. This is only achievable if we meet our fundraising goals, and it starts with my next major deadline. Help me catch up.

**President Trump endorsed me because he knows I 'll fight hard to Secure the Border, Cut Wasteful Spending, Strengthen our Military, Support our Veterans, Protect our Second Amendment, and Hold Joe Biden and his Thugs accountable for their Unconstitutional Lawfare, Corruption, and Election Interference.**

If you care about any or all of those issues, then you should care about supporting my campaign, even if you're not within the PA-08 boundary lines. This race is about more than just Northeastern PA; it's about the future of our country.

[**So, I 'm humbly asking you to co-endorse me with President Trump by contributing whatever you can afford and helping me catch up on my next major fundraising deadline.**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=30628e39eba14f72a1c204fcba857630&_e=tRfVpXo7E4MEeT16CB5RfwqW_C_2gZuO9-xe2IB0PClOJZX2dH2RwSvLlh7EyAgUwvXOU9BGXSgJDhkexCZ6CpJdGohykCNRG6_RZeAf9HcNys5mA84y9BWHWS7Zc2zOUNxYf3Z0qtWaT0IceRwFk-nUYxt1QMoLRUQG0y7Fwl0ns69lBp_Y2Dwl9YA145IJare-FrKVUfWARv1YyuNbUXpbMaw0zBLu2WFkldhgHKgTc42AQyBDETK2Sz0DCixtCEkPvT9pFMjJwpE6T_jUMbdiMicyr3H2z8nSsoWkYYuje0V2MDODUun0ryKfqOJKAgRrkh1jl0q3soEBjUzREBiperT1a_v-SP1tfDxxRPLwHxClkvmrWZr9Z-IJ0KMHi83PkDReaxo9sa8UwmkGV04jHsCftCO5c1yctK-69n4%3D)

Meet Rob Bresnahan:

**A fifth-generation Northeastern Pennslyvanian, Rob Bresnahan took the reins of his grandfather's union electrical contracting company at age 19 and expanded the business across the commonwealth while tripling the number of good-paying union careers they provided to Pennsylvanians. Rob is focused on facing challenges head on to solve problems.

_That's why he's running for United States Congress._

Rob is committed to bringing people together and is uniquely qualified to send a jolt of energy through Congress and deliver results for everyone here in Northeastern Pennsylvania.

** [**SPARK MY CAMPAIGN NOW**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=30628e39eba14f72a1c204fcba857630&_e=tRfVpXo7E4MEeT16CB5RfwqW_C_2gZuO9-xe2IB0PClOJZX2dH2RwSvLlh7EyAgUwvXOU9BGXSgJDhkexCZ6CpJdGohykCNRG6_RZeAf9HcNys5mA84y9BWHWS7Zc2zOUNxYf3Z0qtWaT0IceRwFk-nUYxt1QMoLRUQG0y7Fwl0ns69lBp_Y2Dwl9YA145IJare-FrKVUfWARv1YyuNbUXpbMaw0zBLu2WFkldhgHKgTc42AQyBDETK2Sz0DCixtHRuqenbrElJLXU-xT6aXUQZyf__hxPMJSt18VKrSYcLu7VV9YEcRJOEbLgBjBAw4ki1fX457CzphJ1F2lVM4zt9kx6KhkRuiq2nuK5lduMTMhF6Tj519Aou5ua4vYAt1X3lPL_QieE3dZC1uHCgYyJnbFl2dnXHdEbOst2MiW6M%3D)

name: David
subject: Celebrate My 40th Birthday with a Special Gift!
body:
This birthday, I’m reaching out for a special reason. Unlike my opponent, who has accepted over $400,000 from corporate PACs | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidkimforca/celebrate-my-40th-birthday-with-a-special-gift?e=fee98d637f)
---
| | |
---
| | | | **Dear Friends,

Today, I turn 40—a time for both celebration and reflection. As I mark this personal milestone, I am deeply committed to our campaign for California’s 34th Congressional District. Together, we've built a movement powered entirely by individuals like you, not Corporate PACs and special interest groups.**
---
| This birthday, I’m reaching out for a special reason. Unlike my opponent, who has accepted over $400,000 from corporate PACs and special interests, including nearly $150,000 from AIPAC and similar groups, our campaign thrives on grassroots support. We are 100% funded by people like you, ensuring that our policies and priorities remain unswervingly focused on the needs of our community, not the demands of big-money donors.
---
| [Contribute $40 for my 40th Birthday](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=eba946da31&e=fee98d637f "Contribute $40 for my 40th Birthday")
---
| Every $40 donation empowers us to continue our fight for justice, equality, and progressive change. Your support allows us to reach more voters, challenge the entrenched powers, and ensure our district’s voice is heard loud and clear without corporate interference.

Thank you for celebrating this day with me, not just as a birthday but as a reaffirmation of our shared values and goals. Your contribution isn’t just a gift—it’s a statement that we are ready to reclaim our politics for the people.
---
| [Support Our Movement!](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=5083909ebb&e=fee98d637f "Support Our Movement!")
---
| Let’s continue to stand together for a democracy that represents us all. Thank you for your relentless support and for believing in a better, fairer future.

Onward,
David Kim
---
|
---

Dear Peter,
The race for president took a major turn last week.
First is the news that three states (Texas and Ohio and Alabama) _may disqualify Biden from appearing on the ballot;_
Second, according to press reports, a new centrist party dubbed “No Labels” _could not convince_ Republicans Nikki Haley, Larry Hogan or Democrat Joe Manchin to run on their party ticket.
These two dramatic developments further catapult our campaign onto the mainstage, further cementing our claim that _this is a three-man race_.
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. _is now the only viable third party option for voters casting their votes in November_ – and RFK Jr. is the only option for voters fed up with voting Democrat and/or Republican and getting the same-old, same-old in the end.
We are writing to you today to ask you to please help us keep this momentum by contributing to [our ambitious $4 million goal](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=major_news_4_21_24_nd1&n=3) for April.

**Flipping OR-05 is one of our best chances to take back the House – but I am the _only_ candidate in this race prepared to defeat Lori Chavez-DeRemer in November.** (I’ve already beaten her – twice!). So what we do in this final stretch will determine the outcome of this race.
**I know how to fight and win for all Oregon families, and I’m ready to bring that fight to Congress.** But first, we have a primary to win.
If you’ve already donated to my campaign, I can’t thank you enough. So what we do in this final stretch will determine the outcome of this race. I know how to fight and win for all Oregon families, and I’m ready to bring that fight to Congress. But first, we have a primary to win. If you’ve already donated to my campaign, I can’t thank you enough. And if you’ve been waiting for the right time to make a donation, it’s now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = As we enter this final month, I also want to say thank you. This next stretch won’t be easy, but there’s no team I’d rather have by my side than this one. Janelle Bynum Janelle Bynum is running to represent Oregon's Fifth Congressional District. With a reputation as a tireless champion for real progress, Janelle has worked in the State Legislature to safeguard our rights, lower costs, and create pathways to success for the next generation. Oregon's 5th District is one of the most competitive – and most flippable – seats in the country. Janelle has what it takes to win, but she can't do it without you. Will you make a grassroots donation today? | = | Janelle Bynum is running for in Oregon's 5th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit . | PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS Janelle Bynum For Congress 10121 SE Sunnyside Road #300 Clackamas, OR 97015 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Bob Casey
subject: I want to emphasize how grateful I am
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2754%2E552475%2E2vf01a)
Peter, I want to emphasize how grateful I am for your support.
I know you have a lot to get done in your day other than read emails from me, and I’d rather not have to ask you to chip in some of your hard-earned dollars.
**Let me explain why it’s so important.**
Our election in PA this year could be the most expensive Senate race in the Nation. I’m facing a mega-millionaire opponent who can self-fund his campaign, and he has the backing of Wall Street billionaires as they try to buy PA’s Senate seat.
When you make a donation to this campaign, we put it right to work fighting back against the millions they are already spending to blanket our Commonwealth with ads against me. **Whatever you can chip in has a real impact, Peter.**
[**So please, will you chip in $5, $10, $25, or whatever makes sense for you today so we can keep our ads on the air and fight back against my opponent and the GOP?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240421-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240421-2&refcode2=2754_552475_2vf01a&akid=2754%2E552475%2E2vf01a)

name: Team Gallego
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
198\. That’s the number of days we have until Election Day. That might seem like a long time, but it’s only eight months from now.
#

Peter -
**January 23, 2023**
That was the day we launched this Senate campaign. Truthfully, Ruben had zero idea of what to expect. He knew we’d get a bunch of donations, but the idea that he would raise more than $1 million in 24-hours mostly from small-dollar donations was absolutely humbling.
**131,412**
That’s how many people have given 1 donation to our campaign so far.
**198**
That’s the number of days we have until Election Day. That might seem like a long time, but it’s only eight months from now. We’ve got two more fundraising quarters, two more FEC deadlines, until Election Day.
It’s going to be here way sooner than anyone expects. And we’ve got to do everything we can to defeat Kari Lake between now and then.
So today, we’re humbly asking if you can make your first contribution to our campaign. Only 131,412 people have given 1 donation so far — it’s an unbelievably small percentage of our supporters.
Please join that very important group at this link before it’s too late:
[**Can Ruben please count on you to make a $3 donation? It would mean so much to our chances this November, and Ruben really needs your support.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr24.p6MMmT&refcode=em240421-1-160&t=1&akid=2232%2E734936%2E7V8wGT)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-apr24.n4wMKz&amount=3&refcode=em240421-1-160&t=2&akid=2232%2E734936%2E7V8wGT)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-apr24.n4wMKz&refcode=em240421-1-160&t=3&akid=2232%2E734936%2E7V8wGT)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for chipping in. This is so important.
Team Gallego

subject: A simple question

body:
|

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’ll never take your dollar for granted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1358%2E135344%2E2uHjXc)

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-tester-apr24.V7hi1V&refcode=em240421-1-PD&t=2&akid=1358%2E135344%2E2uHjXc)
---
Team, I see it happen all the time. A lot of campaigns and politicians waste your money when you contribute to them.
Not us. When you pitch into this campaign, we immediately use that investment to fight back against a mountain of super PAC attacks headed my way, and organize and turn out Montanans.
I don’t take a single dollar for granted. I still get my flattop haircut at my local barbershop—and all it costs me is $12, including tip!
My finance team just told me that we’re running short of our monthly fundraising goal, and that can make a huge difference in whether or not we have what it takes to win.
These super PACs are ramping up their plans for Montana. They’ll spend upwards of $50 million to try and change me into something I’m not with misleading attacks. We need your help to gather the resources to fight back.
[**Friend, they’ll spend and say anything to defeat me. But my word is my bond—if you can split $10 between my campaign and Elissa Slotkin today, it’ll go a long way. I promise we’ll put your money to good use.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-tester-apr24.V7hi1V&refcode=em240421-1-PD&t=3&akid=1358%2E135344%2E2uHjXc)**

Liberal media would have made a feast of me

| [](http://links.gopindependent.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0e46d51408a7428ebed3e068da3fb21e&_e=WVyEOT4rNO1YWeCEaZ88ecYgxxi-P5TwDzRdf4yqxlZCxxrcKSl_7T1294neEDEPOd46pSN5rkL23cFPGqZsefWdZnwgHupgCKWIQyZ9_fAJJP4h4fjnmDi0hDBHo2dI4M3xUr1XGCNRtjYtUvko2uGpflMfQZee0lNF3A8wUKJ2_BCzuW4ucRPutrt8EHHgQkzPD5KixYq2D5DTJc6IddLQUwLdgywamk47k6v2zW8tC-D2BFrNX3o_HjC-wVBuRm-HSDw4X0I3T3uqz62eCaT2Oj384PEOczW4we5uFJtTr6cVxbYEM4h8oEJDoD-lzSP-8SIg2fPYRmFzlGRNGAiUTR3KuhmxZsc-hkgxyx3qVY8vOYED3xZ0-u4n1Udm1l3CH5s_tlIr_a_aDu-8Vp7zy4Q07XmnOsx-FsKHdtAvzUi_yNs0aS0GpB2Pf3pV)

Friend,

The attacks of the radical left continue to get more and more gruesome with each hour that passes.

First, my opponent even hired a twisted left wing pervert to attack me & sexually degrade me.

And when that didn't work- they started to bombard me with insults on social media.

They wish horrific things against me and my family.

We knew this stretch of the campaign was coming, and I can now tell you that it is officially here.

My existence, my story, and my firm adherence to the values of God, Family, Country drives the radical Democrats through the roof.

They'll spend, say, and do whatever it takes to punish me for not falling in line & they won't stop until they permanently destroy me.

They're leaving no stone unturned in this election & the polls are already tied- making it the closest race in America right now & your support today will give us the extra inch to take the lead & never look back.
[](http://links.gopindependent.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0e46d51408a7428ebed3e068da3fb21e&_e=WVyEOT4rNO1YWeCEaZ88ecYgxxi-P5TwDzRdf4yqxlZCxxrcKSl_7T1294neEDEPOd46pSN5rkL23cFPGqZsefWdZnwgHupgCKWIQyZ9_fAJJP4h4fjnmDi0hDBHo2dI4M3xUr1XGCNRtjYtUvko2uGpflMfQZee0lNF3A8wUKJ2_BCzuW4ucRPutrt8EHHgQkzPD5KixYq2D5DTJc6IddLQUwLdgywamk47k6v2zW8tC-D2BFrNX3o_HjC-wVBuRm-HSDw4X0I3T3uqz62eCaT2Oj384PEOczW4we5uFJvu3Fa6AmXlyFmeCuO54f8Y-djzTNDbzI_gtAVyYAs8z07XINxycX4kLhldN1BH58U2XsP1VwsiqAJA3F5ugNf1iqaw1A7Q237s4IFMUb1FVwoGee0tXdEyMPOdifT6J5P2QEmQXtGqKOyYZ4E8MaAT)
---
Look, I immigrated to America when I was 6 and grew up working in the fields. I know the value of a hard earned dollar so I wouldn't ask you to donate if it truly wasn't important.

_**But everything is on the line in this election & I mean EVERYTHING. **_
[](http://links.gopindependent.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0e46d51408a7428ebed3e068da3fb21e&_e=WVyEOT4rNO1YWeCEaZ88ecYgxxi-P5TwDzRdf4yqxlZCxxrcKSl_7T1294neEDEPOd46pSN5rkL23cFPGqZsefWdZnwgHupgCKWIQyZ9_fAJJP4h4fjnmDi0hDBHo2dI4M3xUr1XGCNRtjYtUvko2uGpflMfQZee0lNF3A8wUKJ2_BCzuW4ucRPutrt8EHHgQkzPD5KixYq2D5DTJc6IddLQUwLdgywamk47k6v2zW8tC-D2BFrNX3o_HjC-wVBuRm-HSDw4X0I3T3uqz62eCaT2Oj384PEOczW4we5uFJt10wCLC2hPZJaoIIJvtZWOPS1FUqnpkVzNDu1U1oySbUK26FjLMADAgQ0IGFSyQ1FCyBDzRiZXX9zeOiqzBJPiG3a0ZkZBNpQBGSLht_-nocdHQW8kl8OjXsEMZCVvqkzcZfwOeFGDD2AFpRq-_vmV)
