This race will be decided by a handful of votes- and a handful of dollars from generous conservatives like you.

So I'm asking you from the bottom of my heart to contribute one more time- no matter how big or how small, every dollar has the potential to drastically change the trajectory of this race.

I hope I can once again count on your help today.

With great respect & admiration,
Mayra Flores

I hope I can once again count on your help today. With great respect & admiration, Mayra Flores | | Paid for by Mayra Flores for Congress PO Box 516 Los Indios, TX 78567

| | In 2020, people laughed at the Georgia Dems when we told them that we could flip Georgia blue for Joe Biden – that we could determine the Senate majority. **_We showed them how wrong they were._**

We know how to win Georgia because we’ve been doing it for years now.

We build a volunteer movement, and we meet voters where they’re at, all across Georgia. name: Rob Bresnahan Jr.
subject: This Needs to be Kept Confidential, Friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB FOR PA
body:
Don’t open this if you can’t keep a secret |
---
Fellow American,

**I’m glad that you opened this email, but this needs to be kept a secret between us.**

**I’m behind my next major fundraising deadline, even though President Trump just endorsed me. This is not good. How did we get to this point?**

**FIRST:** I launched my campaign to flip PA-08 red and fire Matt Cartwright, who is backed by Joe Biden. Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left Woke Money Machine. I want to empower my community and stand up for the little guy, and that means standing up to career politicians like Matt Cartwright, who has lied countless times to Americans and sided with Nancy Pelosi 100 percent of the time in Congress. Cartwright snuck by with victories in 2016 and 2020 despite President Trump winning in PA-08 both times.

**THEN:** President Trump endorsed me, noting the difference between my opponent and me, “Rob worked hard to Create Jobs and Grow the Economy, unlike his opponent, Matt Cartwright, who is completely beholden to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.” Speaker Johnson, Steve Scalise, Elise Stefanik, Tom Emmer, and countless others also endorsed me.

**NOW:** [**I’m asking you to endorse me and to chip in a donation of whatever you can afford.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=0b6bdb61b5f14a93bb56b88b70c71fcb&_e=Zk1-BGb67vzu4r-icau2Y2e7qTzv2QgkPkvLsCa3Vd3-4X0MFcdtA0ml9UwFjW1Ip6a6sP3iTc8VeVbSkw27dy2--pCkR5Q8B0U1BIEg2sU1CQDCUcpevKsBXDgUyMLyFFFcWLHUKjUXB3jY0XltWp5Yjq9WUUJpvKG6EPUgBxS7tcCLJJYaDShDgx-71XOTg8m5q9a2AERyDfAkZiwgwgVNGP_92QytLt4g_X23M0st_c0l616_TsMVxwqvk6RChDt56uGtPyGM7U45m0rcGykJFbZRo1kuuBqIeccd-N-MVshS4hPI_xgDLoy1I3yBX7dQTnX606p5y1cFpUic9nTqBf8U6kbWwnH0ksHrXyURQK0hOCKZ6ihtH08l4E8WhySK9ruwPx2kJd4rEv0sLHCcidJNtfH94Kq71yEfpF8%3D) It may not seem like much, but having a strong flow of grassroots donors and supporters will help me finally unseat Cartwright, expand our House Majority, and give President Trump one more much-needed ally in Congress when we win on November 5. This is only achievable if we meet our fundraising goals, and it starts with my next major deadline. Help me catch up.

**President Trump endorsed me because he knows I’ll fight hard to Secure the Border, Cut Wasteful Spending, Strengthen our Military, Support our Veterans, Protect our Second Amendment, and Hold Joe Biden and his Thugs accountable for their Unconstitutional Lawfare, Corruption, and Election Interference.**

If you care about any or all of those issues, then you should care about supporting my campaign, even if you’re not within the PA-08 boundary lines. This race is about more than just Northeastern PA; it’s about the future of our country.

[**So, I’m humbly asking you to co-endorse me with President Trump by contributing whatever you can afford and helping me catch up on my next major fundraising deadline.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=0b6bdb61b5f14a93bb56b88b70c71fcb&_e=Zk1-BGb67vzu4r-icau2Y2e7qTzv2QgkPkvLsCa3Vd3-4X0MFcdtA0ml9UwFjW1Ip6a6sP3iTc8VeVbSkw27dy2--pCkR5Q8B0U1BIEg2sU1CQDCUcpevKsBXDgUyMLyFFFcWLHUKjUXB3jY0XltWp5Yjq9WUUJpvKG6EPUgBxS7tcCLJJYaDShDgx-71XOTg8m5q9a2AERyDfAkZiwgwgVNGP_92QytLt4g_X23M0st_c0l616_TsMVxwqvk6RCKhR0xJipl6CTd8rUxy7jHjTTSqvMxPSRMxDJAKMI7-fQIvxiuZ0aYRmlM0kFEZSlxXv20LFNEm529c7IhI_6reVaS0PO_lczejbs-EkwURVQBp_G0mR_oacQrAstJXarA2ryQRnnb7JeGFrC78fetB1cVm4pBFbV8AAgiYK9vB4%3D)

Thanks for charging⚡️ my campaign,
[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=0b6bdb61b5f14a93bb56b88b70c71fcb&_e=Zk1-BGb67vzu4r-icau2Y2e7qTzv2QgkPkvLsCa3Vd3-4X0MFcdtA0ml9UwFjW1Ip6a6sP3iTc8VeVbSkw27dy2--pCkR5Q8B0U1BIEg2sU1CQDCUcpevKsBXDgUyMLyFFFcWLHUKjUXB3jY0XltWp5Yjq9WUUJpvKG6EPUgBxS7tcCLJJYaDShDgx-71XOTg8m5q9a2AERyDfAkZiwgwgVNGP_92QytLt4g_X23M0st_c0l616_TsMVxwqvk6RCGMZRUBnxmNna-NVUmpK84BGDGuDKzpZqsqf97loNz3X5gO2eV6pTqCdW0KZI39JnnykSGpDSUf84Fif_60_lEKPnLk4WueOnTABVr01WScOK3-YKB993-osre37K33wOsghYCFoLmG6oYQ8e4HNEmBTZkSvjCm1Qq3A2T4J8Ujw%3D)
[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=0b6bdb61b5f14a93bb56b88b70c71fcb&_e=Zk1-BGb67vzu4r-icau2Y2e7qTzv2QgkPkvLsCa3Vd3-4X0MFcdtA0ml9UwFjW1Ip6a6sP3iTc8VeVbSkw27dy2--pCkR5Q8B0U1BIEg2sU1CQDCUcpevKsBXDgUyMLyFFFcWLHUKjUXB3jY0XltWp5Yjq9WUUJpvKG6EPUgBxS7tcCLJJYaDShDgx-71XOTg8m5q9a2AERyDfAkZiwgwpICiUnQBEUNXwQLnu8B_30xC33nAP9L0S_Prc6DOKESE2m-onmKslm6c8aIko6MkZfLTkUwv1KwgJ3ZtJONkZ8wuFX4t6ZasoBzGudl4DZ_knVRHiL0szrAC89-2bQSerTrnedHoHylfJGVUKZvJ1_lJoCNNCrBwiY2KlClS-QJdn1IyBiHylWf1y4iJ-JSrQ%3D%3D)

| [](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=0b6bdb61b5f14a93bb56b88b70c71fcb&_e=Zk1-BGb67vzu4r-icau2Y2e7qTzv2QgkPkvLsCa3Vd3-4X0MFcdtA0ml9UwFjW1Ip6a6sP3iTc8VeVbSkw27dy2--pCkR5Q8B0U1BIEg2sU1CQDCUcpevKsBXDgUyMLyFFFcWLHUKjUXB3jY0XltWp5Yjq9WUUJpvKG6EPUgBxS7tcCLJJYaDShDgx-71XOTg8m5q9a2AERyDfAkZiwgwgVNGP_92QytLt4g_X23M0st_c0l616_TsMVxwqvk6RCFaD3zg4OubOHtwyQCNSB3S6QyCt0lr0N07_6i6HSK1UqyY7RiLFl6x227v2QWZi-pYCz0Oj9Y0npH_YPc_wqX_qO5Rmw7lviYGCsFuIngHIKfG4vNqcEoj7QVsCtV6inFcnFrifBewJWGcVSjoLN8LjM2KnCFzLj0MHpVz9dXFw%3D)

Meet Rob Bresnahan:

**A fifth-generation Northeastern Pennslyvanian, Rob Bresnahan took the reins of his grandfather's union electrical contracting company at age 19 and expanded the business across the commonwealth while tripling the number of good-paying union careers they provided to Pennsylvanians. Rob is focused on facing challenges head on to solve problems.

_That's why he's running for United States Congress._

Rob is committed to bringing people together and is uniquely qualified to send a jolt of energy through Congress and deliver results for everyone here in Northeastern Pennsylvania.

** [**SPARK MY CAMPAIGN NOW**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=0b6bdb61b5f14a93bb56b88b70c71fcb&_e=Zk1-BGb67vzu4r-icau2Y2e7qTzv2QgkPkvLsCa3Vd3-4X0MFcdtA0ml9UwFjW1Ip6a6sP3iTc8VeVbSkw27dy2--pCkR5Q8B0U1BIEg2sU1CQDCUcpevKsBXDgUyMLyFFFcWLHUKjUXB3jY0XltWp5Yjq9WUUJpvKG6EPUgBxS7tcCLJJYaDShDgx-71XOTg8m5q9a2AERyDfAkZiwgwgVNGP_92QytLt4g_X23M0st_c0l616_TsMVxwqvk6RCeVFMwPnhEjje3hA7UhT48k1xg1wGSBPLi3ihuwUMeDSyDU1U_cOGOZ4VaBrf3OXdMun_OxDnibAN91M0bqO9b9ZALnr89A3L77-vxYS-1-Jv--agJ4tGmwGxeW5Doz5K0SLOHoppw3YUJ2naVzDmu5WR3A9nv6bM65NQWxpY5Jw%3D)

name: Scott Spector
subject: Tough call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Hi Derek —
It’s Scott, Tammy Baldwin’s campaign manager.

We just increased our weekly fundraising goal with only a few days to go
before the deadline. [ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2247?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20240422_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TammyBaldwinsplit_ScottSpector_NA_mmfr.1.4&t=1001&akid=6690%2E1827488%2EqN6peA ]I’m going to ask you to split a donation between
Tony Evers and our campaign to help us close the gap in a moment, but
first I want to explain why.

Recently, we made a difficult decision. We decided to increase our
advertising budget so we could go up with our first campaign ads as soon
as possible. The money wasn’t in the budget, but I gave the green light
anyway.

Why? Because Republican megamillionaire Eric Hovde had been flooding
Wisconsin’s airwaves for weeks. He’s already spent more than $3 million on
campaign ads.

His strategy is working too, with one of the first polls since he
announced his campaign showing this race TIED.

Hovde has pledged to spend at least $20 million of his own personal
fortune to flip this seat red, and he’s on track to spend even more than
that.

Whoever has more resources will likely win this election. That’s why we
needed to raise our fundraising goal.

clean_body: Hi Derek — It’s Scott, Tammy Baldwin’s campaign manager. We just increased our weekly fundraising goal with only a few days to go before the deadline. [ ]I’m going to ask you to split a donation between Tony Evers and our campaign to help us close the gap in a moment, but first I want to explain why. Recently, we made a difficult decision. We decided to increase our advertising budget so we could go up with our first campaign ads as soon as possible. The money wasn’t in the budget, but I gave the green light anyway. Why? Because Republican megamillionaire Eric Hovde had been flooding Wisconsin’s airwaves for weeks. He’s already spent more than $3 million on campaign ads. His strategy is working too, with one of the first polls since he announced his campaign showing this race TIED. Hovde has pledged to spend at least $20 million of his own personal fortune to flip this seat red, and he’s on track to spend even more than that. Whoever has more resources will likely win this election. That’s why we needed to raise our fundraising goal. [ ]So, can I count on you to split a donation between Tammy’s reelection campaign and Tony Evers today? Every dollar we raise will help us close this budget gap so we can keep our new ads on the air and get Tammy’s message out to voters across the state. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. [ ]Donate $10 Now [ ]Donate $25 Now [ ]Donate $50 Now [ ]Donate $100 Now [ ]Donate $500 Now [ ]Another Amount Make no mistake: This was a tough call that carries a real risk, but Tammy knows we need to be doing everything we possibly can to defeat our opponent and win this election. Thanks for chipping in today, if you can. We’re so grateful to have you on this team. — Scott Scott Spector Campaign Manager Tammy Baldwin for Senate Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

we must stop this in its tracks

---
**FACT:** Republican priorities couldn’t be more backwards. As working families struggle and corruption festers, THIS is what they’re prioritizing!

**FACT:** Unless we step up and stop them now, they’ll honor an accused criminal who incited an insurrection with an airport named after him.

**FACT:** To stop this ridiculous proposal, we need a huge wave of support – _10,000 grassroots supporters strong_ – to call for this bill to end.

**[__ADD YOUR NAME BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign on to demand Congress doesn’t advance this ridiculous bill to rename Dulles Airport after Donald Trump »__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/dont-rename-dulles?source=FFR_20240421_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21303%2E4449941%2EJdp1zZ)** | [10,000 SIGNATURE GOAL: SIGN ON TO CALL FOR AN END TO THE BILL TO RENAME DULLES AIRPORT AFTER DONALD TRUMP »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/dont-rename-dulles?source=FFR_20240421_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21303%2E4449941%2EJdp1zZ)

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I wanted to make sure you saw this.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I wish I had better news.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2468%2E35263%2ESUe5Oj)
Hi Peter, it’s Tammy. I wanted to bump this email to the top of your inbox. On Wednesday, a Marquette University Law School poll found Wisconsin’s Senate race is a dead 50-50 tie among likely voters. This came just days after Eric Hovde reported giving his campaign a record breaking $8 million check. **My out-of-state megamillionaire opponent is trying to buy this seat and secure the Senate majority for Republicans. The scariest part is, he’s well on his way to doing so.** If you can spare any amount to help my campaign fight back and keep this seat blue, I’d greatly appreciate it. You can use this secure link to make a donation: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/tbe-em-apr24](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240421_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2468%2E35263%2ESUe5Oj)** \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Tammy Baldwin
Date: Wed, Apr 17, 2024 Peter — I wish I were reaching out with better news. This afternoon, a new poll from Marquette University Law School showed that my Senate race is **tied** 50% - 50%. There’s virtually no gap between me and my megamillionaire Republican opponent in the race that could determine which party controls the Senate. Now that this race is officially tied, whoever has more resources to reach voters will win this race. After loaning himself $8 million, Eric Hovde has surged in the polls. He’s spent more than $4 million on ads alone to reach voters across Wisconsin. His strategy is working, so he’s going to spend even more to finish the job and flip this Senate seat red. **I need your help to stop him.** Unlike my wealthy opponent, I can’t self-fund this campaign with seven-figure checks. Instead, I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you to help us build a campaign that’s strong enough to win in November. **[So if you can, please chip in an urgent donation to help us protect Wisconsin’s Senate seat and our Democratic Senate majority. I can’t do this without you.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240421_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2468%2E35263%2ESUe5Oj)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-apr24.Xs9pUr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240421_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2468%2E35263%2ESUe5Oj)

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: I wouldn't be who I am without my mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
my fight for people like her
| | |
---
Friend, every Sunday my mom and I spend the afternoon playing dominoes together. It's our special tradition — and it's one of the most meaningful parts of my life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83467696/468476210/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1105-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTZlYzE4ZTEtMzkwMC1lZjExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qcAhn0XDEoW85fBlE6fw2AGtLgP6koeSdqzS3WWorkM=)
I owe just about everything in my life to my mom. She made the brave decision to move my family from our home in Ecuador to America. It wasn't easy moving to a new country as a 14-year-old, but I can't imagine what it was like for my mom, having to start all over and working double shifts just to pay rent for a one room apartment.
But friend, my mom never wavered once. **Her constant reassurance, work ethic, and firm belief in the American dream inspired me to fight for a better life.**
I studied hard, got a minimum wage job, and earned scholarships to pay for college. After school, I found a career giving back to my community through public service, eventually becoming the first South American immigrant elected to Congress. I've found purpose in my life, become part of a unique community, and raised a beautiful family.
**Because of my mom's sacrifices, my family got our American dream. And now, it's both a privilege and a joy to be my mom's caretaker, ensuring that she can age with dignity and comfort.** There are a lot of big things that come along with that job — managing her doctor's appointments, advocating for her care, and navigating the all-too-complicated Medicare and Social Security systems.
But it's the little parts of caring for my mom — playing our weekly domino games, cooking a big dinner for her, taking her on trips to her favorite places — that matter most to me.
My ability to give my mom a good retirement is one of the things that I am most grateful for. It's not easy by any means, but I know all too well just how lucky my mom and I are. **These days, it's getting harder and harder for Americans to age with dignity and comfort.**
Far-right Republicans have fought for major cuts to Social Security and blocked efforts to expand Medicare, leaving seniors living paycheck to paycheck. Instead they want to cut or privatize these critical public programs — my opponent Rick Scott actually came up with a plan to _end_ them altogether. Even though I've been able to give my mom a good retirement, the shortcomings of these programs still make it incredibly hard to get her the care and support she needs.
**Every American deserves a good, stable retirement. That's why I'm running for Senate — to fight for people like my mom.[Polls show that we've got a real chance to win, but I'm counting on your help to power my grassroots campaign. Please, if you believe in a better future for seniors, will you rush $5 to help me defeat Rick Scott and protect Social Security and Medicare?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83467697/468476211/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1105-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTZlYzE4ZTEtMzkwMC1lZjExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qcAhn0XDEoW85fBlE6fw2AGtLgP6koeSdqzS3WWorkM=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83467698/468476212/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk1105-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTZlYzE4ZTEtMzkwMC1lZjExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qcAhn0XDEoW85fBlE6fw2AGtLgP6koeSdqzS3WWorkM=)

Thank you so much,

Debbie
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83467702/468476216/-31196584?refcode=jtk1105-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTZlYzE4ZTEtMzkwMC1lZjExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qcAhn0XDEoW85fBlE6fw2AGtLgP6koeSdqzS3WWorkM=)

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
